title: Full-Time Video Editor (Instagram Reels + YouTube) — Remote
description:
We're hiring a full-time video editor to join our team. You'll be editing short-form content (Instagram Reels, TikToks) and long-form YouTube videos

  for a personal brand in the creator economy / talent management space.



What you'll do:

  - Edit 5–7 short-form videos per week (Reels/TikToks) from raw iPhone footage

  - Edit 1–2 YouTube videos per week (talking-head, vlog style)

  - Add captions, sound design, transitions, text overlays

  - Follow brand guidelines and style references provided

  - Turnaround edits within 24–48 hours



Requirements:

  - Proficient in CapCut and/or Adobe Premiere Pro

  - Strong eye for pacing, hooks, and short-form trends

  - Reliable internet, available 9am–5pm EST (Mon–Fri)

  - Experience editing for personal brands, influencers, or creators

  - Portfolio or sample edits required to apply



Nice to have:

  - After Effects for motion graphics

  - Experience with fitness, lifestyle, or business content



Pay: ?30,000/month, paid twice monthly via Wise. Clear path for promotions and increase in pay as well.



To apply: Send your portfolio/sample edits and a brief intro.

title: Administrative Manager
description:
Administrative Manager (Full-Time | Remote | Residential Construction)



Schedule: Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Pacific Time (1-hour unpaid lunch)

Employment Type: Full-Time (40 hours/week)



About Us:

We are a growing residential construction and development company focused on high-quality infill housing projects. We are a small, high-performing team that takes pride in delivering exceptional results for our clients. Every tea
mber plays a meaningful role and is trusted to take ownership of their work. We value people who are highly organized, detail-oriented, proactive, and comfortable working independently within well-defined systems and processes. Our culture is built around accountability, clear communication, and supporting one another so everyone can perform at a high level. This role is best suited for someone who enjoys taking initiative, keeping things organized, and being part of a professional team that holds itself to a high standard.



Compensation: 

We offer competitive full-time compensation based on experience and performance. We value long-term tea
mbers and reward reliability, strong performance, and growth within the company. This position is best suited for someone looking for stable, long-term work with a professional team, not short-term freelance work.



Position Overview:

We are hiring a full-time Administrative Manager to oversee and coordinate the administrative operations of our company. This role serves as the organizational backbone of the team—managing communication, scheduling, documentation, and internal coordination while ensuring a smooth and professional experience for both our team and our clients.



Key Responsibilities:

• Manage company and executive
 inboxes and calendars

• Communicate with U.S.-based customers by phone and

• Schedule consultations, meetings, and follow-ups

• Maintain organized digital files and documentation

• Track compliance items such as insurance certificates, lien releases, and tax filings

• Monitor deadlines and follow up with tea
mbers to keep projects moving

• Lead weekly tea
etings and help maintain accountability across the team

• Help improve and maintain company systems, organization, and workflows



Required Qualifications:

• Excellent spoken and written English

• Proficiency in Microsoft Word & Excel

• Highly organized and detail-oriented

• Able to work independently and manage responsibilities proactively



When applying, please address your application message to David, and begin your application message with the phrase Systems Create Success. Also please include a 30–60 second video recording of yourself describing your relevant work experience. 



Thank you!

We look forward to hearing from you!

title: US Accounting Project Manager
description:
Location: 100% Work from Home

Job Type: Full-time

Reports To: CEO/Founder

Schedule: Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM PST



If interested apply through this link: 





About ProfitWorks:



We serve the home trades and construction industries with a unique, concierge-style approach to Controller and CFO services. Our growth is entirely referral-based, and we maintain a waiting list of clients ready to onboard. In just five years, we’ve built lasting partnerships, many from day one.



Our team spans the U.S. and the Philippines, and we are deeply proud of our blended-shore model—one built on over a decade of collaboration and mutual growth. One tea
mber from the Philippines has been with the founder for 12 years.



Now, as we scale from 17 to 40+ tea
mbers, we’re looking for a tech-savvy, people-first Accounting Project Manager to help lead that growth and elevate our standards of excellence even higher.



What We Do Differently



No taxes—we’re all about operations, insights, and scalable financial solutions.

Pod-based teams that combine U.S. and PH accountants for support, continuity, and better work-life balance. We don’t hide our blended team

Deep client relationships over transactions.

Cutting-edge cloud tech and modern systems.

People before process. Always.

The Role: Accounting Project Manager



You’ll lead, develop and support our Senior Accountants who manage multiple U.S.-based client accounts. These are primarily in the trades and construction industries. In this key leadership role, you will ensure financial accuracy, process efficiency, tech adoption, and client satisfaction across the board.



This is ideal for an experienced, tech-savvy Accounting Operations Manager who thrives in a fast-growing, tech-forward, relationship-driven remote firm.



Key Responsibilities

Team Leadership



Supervise and support client based Accountants across multiple client portfolios.

Provide ongoing training, mentoring, and performance evaluations.

Set quality standards for all deliverables (e.g., monthly close, financial reports, etc.).

Review complex transactions and guide GAAP-compliant accounting treatment.

Lead onboarding of new tea
mbers and ensure culture fit and performance.

Operations & Process Optimization



Own the consistency and accuracy of accounting workflows and outputs.

Lead improvements in systems, reporting, and automation.

Maintain and enhance our accounting tech stack (QuickBooks Online, cloud-based tools).

Ensure documentation and process standardization across teams.

Drive adoption of new technologies and best practices.

Client Success & Escalation Support



Serve as a point of escalation for technical and client-related challenges.

Collaborate with leadership to ensure exceptional service delivery and retention.

Assist with client onboarding and alignment of services to client expectations.

Technical Oversight



Ensure accurate application of GAAP, job costing, WIP, deferred revenue, etc.

Support full-cycle accounting for accrual clients ($1M–$20M revenue range).

Oversee timely and accurate reporting across 20-35 client accounts.

Qualifications



8+ years of U.S.-based accounting experience (preferably client-facing)

3+ years of project accounting experience in a remote or hybrid environments

Extensive experience with QuickBooks Online (QBO ProAdvisor preferred)

Strong command of GAAP, construction accounting, WIP, job costing

Proven track record scaling systems and developing accounting teams

Excellent written and verbal communication skills

Advanced Google Sheets/Excel skills

Experience with cloud-based tools, automation, and remote collaboration

Bonus: Experience with home services/trades industries

Role Overview

This role will drive growth by generating new leads, managing sales pipelines, and converting opportunities into long-term clients.

title: Agency Operator / Head of Operations
description:
? Why This Role



We're building one of the fastest-growing AI-powered lead gen agencies in North America, and we're just getting started. We have paying clients, proven results, and a model that works. Now we need the operator who's going to help us pour fuel on it.



This isn't a maintenance job. This is a ground-floor opportunity to build something real alongside a founder who's all-in. We have aggressive growth plans, a clear roadmap to scale, and the infrastructure to back it up. As we grow, so does your role, your income, and your impact.



We're talking performance-based commissions, profit-sharing potential, and a direct seat at the table, not buried in some org chart. If you want to be part of something early, move fast, and get rewarded for the results you create, keep reading.



—



ROLE: Agency Operator / Head of Operations — Scale Partners AI



Location: Remote (Global)**Contract Type:** Long-term, full-time commitment**Start Date:** Immediate







---



About Scale Partners AI



Scale Partners AI is an AI-powered lead generation agency that helps local service businesses and B2B companies fill their calendars with qualified appointments. We run paid ads, cold
, LinkedIn outreach, and AI-powered follow-up systems to generate, qualify, and convert leads on behalf of our clients.



We're not starting from zero. We already have paying clients, proven results, and a working model. What we need now is the right operator to take what's working and build the infrastructure to scale it — systematically, efficiently, and profitably.



The current team is lean: the founder and one account executive. This role is the key hire that changes everything. You'll work directly with the founder as a true right-hand — owning operations, building systems, and driving the agency toward consistent, scalable revenue.



---



The Role



You are the Head of Operations. You own the day-to-day execution of the agency while the founder focuses on growth, partnerships, and strategy.



Infrastructure & Systems



You'll build and manage the full operational backbone of the agency inside GoHighLevel — sub-accounts, pipelines, automations, workflows, funnels, landing pages, AI voice agents, conversation bots, appointment calendars,
/SMS sequences, and reporting dashboards. You'll also organize all projects, SOPs, and team workflows inside ClickUp so nothing falls through the cracks.



Client Acquisition & Fulfillment



You'll ensure client acquisition systems are running and optimized — ad campaigns on Meta and Google, cold
 and LinkedIn outreach, and the funnels that convert traffic into booked calls. Once clients are signed, you own fulfillment: ads running, leads flowing, AI following up, appointments being booked, and reports going out on schedule.



AI Implementation



A core part of this role is integrating AI across the business. We use AI voice agents that call leads within 60 seconds, AI chatbots that qualify via SMS, and AI tools for content, reporting, and internal operations. You don't need to be an AI engineer, but you need to understand what's possible and either implement it yourself or hire the right specialist to build it. Tools in our ecosystem include Claude, GoHighLevel AI Employee, Vapi, and Make/Zapier.



Hiring & Team Building



As we scale, you'll identify skill gaps and hire to fill them — whether that's a closer, media buyer, VA, or automation specialist. You source, vet, and onboard. You don't wait to be told what's needed — you see the gap and address it.



Communication & Accountability



We do daily check-ins (async or live) and a weekly strategy call. Between those, you operate with full autonomy. You over-communicate rather than under-communicate. You flag issues early and come with solutions, not just problems.



---



Who You Are



You have real experience working inside agencies — not as a freelancer doing one task, but as someone who understands how an agency runs end-to-end: acquisition, onboarding, fulfillment, retention, and scaling.



You are fast. Not "I'll get to it tomorrow" fast - same-day, same-hour fast. When something needs to happen, you make it happen now. You're highly available, responsive, and flexible. You don't disappear for 6 hours without a word. You're the person who sees a Slack message and acts on it, not the person who "circles back." 



The founder moves quickly, you need to match that pace and thrive in it, not resent it.



You are revenue-focused. Every decision you make is filtered through whether it generates or protects revenue. You prioritize ruthlessly and don't get lost in busy work.



You are a builder. You thrive when there's a working foundation that needs to be systematized and scaled. You don't need hand-holding — you need a direction and the autonomy to execute.



You are resourceful. When you hit a wall, you find a way around it. When you don't have a skill, you hire someone who does. You make progress, not excuses.



You understand that AI is a real operational advantage, not a trend. You're either already using AI tools in your work or you're deeply motivated to integrate them into everything you touch.



---



Required Experience



- GoHighLevel: Expert-level. You've built agency accounts, sub-accounts, pipelines, workflows, funnels, and automations. Non-negotiable.



- Paid advertising: Hands-on experience managing Meta Ads and/or Google Ads campaigns.



- Agency operations: You've worked inside a digital marketing, lead gen, or growth agency and understand the full client lifecycle.



- AI tools and automation: Working knowledge of AI assistants (Claude, ChatGPT), automation platforms (Make, Zapier), and willingness to implement AI voice and chat tools.



- Cold outreach: Experience with cold
 and/or LinkedIn outreach. Familiarity with tools like Instantly, Smartlead, or similar.



- Project management: Proficiency with CRMs, Hubspot, ClickUp, Asana, or similar. You document everything.



- Hiring: You've sourced, vetted, and onboarded freelancers, VAs, or tea
mbers before.



- Communication: Fluent English, written and verbal.



---



Nice to Have



- Experience white-labeling GoHighLevel for clients



- Familiarity with AI voice platforms (Vapi, Bland, Retell, Synthflow)



- Experience with Stripe billing and SaaS subscription models inside GHL



- Knowledge of CASL (Canada) and TCPA (US) compliance



- Background in HVAC, real estate, or legal lead generation



- Experience building AI agent workflows (Relevance AI, CrewAI, or similar)



---



To Apply



If you've read this far and you're thinking "this is exactly what I've been looking for" - good. That's the reaction we want.



We're scaling fast. The clients are there. The systems are being built. The founder is locked in. What's missing is the right operator to run alongside and help turn a working agency into a machine.



This is the kind of role where the right person looks back in 12 months and says "I got in at exactly the right time."



High commissions, growth into a leadership role, and real ownership over what you build, that's all on the table for someone who delivers.



Please answer the questions in your proposal with genuine thought and detail.



We'll schedule a call with qualified candidates to discuss the role, compensation, and growth path in detail.

title: Senior Accountant & Financial Advisor
description:
About Us



Encore Pacific Brands is a growing e-commerce company that acquires and operates consumer

brands on Amazon, TikTok Shop and Shopify. We are a small, nimble team that values

ownership, resourcefulness, and clear communication. We’re looking for someone who can take

full ownership of our bookkeeping and accounting function and grow with us as we scale.



Role Overview



We’re hiring a detail-oriented Senior Accountant & Financial Advisor to manage our day-to-day

financial operations across multiple brands and sales channels. You’ll be the person who keeps

our books clean, our COGS accurate, and our financial picture clear. This role touches

everything from transaction reconciliation and bank account management to supplier payment

coordination and cost analysis.



Key Responsibilities



Bookkeeping & Reconciliation

• Manage and maintain our books in QuickBooks Online, including chart of accounts,

journal entries, bank reconciliations, and monthly close processes.

• Pull and reconcile transaction data from multiple sources: Amazon Seller Central, TikTok

Shop, Shopify, and any future sales channels.

• Download, categorize, and reconcile credit card statements from Chase, Capital One,

and American Express.

• Ensure all transactions are accurately coded and recorded on a timely basis.

COGS Management & Updates

• Maintain accurate and up-to-date Cost of Goods Sold (COGS) across all products

whenever new inventory batches arrive.

• Update COGS figures across our internal SKU master spreadsheet, QuickBooks, and all

other reporting systems and tools so that margins and profitability data remain consistent

everywhere.

• Flag significant COGS changes and communicate the impact on gross margins to

leadership.



Supplier Payments & Wire Transfers

• Review, track, and file all invoices, payments, and shipping documents. (We work with

25+ suppliers, 1,000+ SKUs, and 50+ shipments per year.)

• Plan, prepare, and set up outgoing wire transfers to suppliers in our Chase business

account for the CEO to review and approve.

• Maintain a payment calendar and ensure suppliers are paid on time per agreed terms.

• Keep organized records of all supplier invoices, payment confirmations, and banking

documentation.



Reporting & Analysis

• Generate regular financial reports, including P&L statements, balance sheets, and cash

flow summaries for each brand.

• Support ad-hoc financial analyses as needed, such as profitability by product line,

channel-level performance, or cost-saving opportunities.

• Assist with preparing financial data for tax filings and work with our external CPA as

needed.



Typical Questions You Will Find the Answer To

• What is the current profitability of each brand in our portfolio?

• What is our profitability at a SKU level? Which products are dragging down margins?

• How much did we spend on shipping and freight in the last quarter, and how does that

compare to the prior period?

• What are our landed COGS for this new batch, and how does it change our margin on

these SKUs?

• How much cash do we need to set aside for upcoming supplier wires over the next

30/60/90 days?

• What is the inventory value across Amazon FBA, third-party warehouses, and in-transit

shipments?

• What does leadership need from this financial data to make a sound decision, and how

can I present it in the clearest way possible?



Qualifications

Required

• Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field.

• Strong proficiency in QuickBooks Online – this is our primary accounting platform and

you should be very comfortable navigating it.

• Experience pulling and reconciling data from e-commerce platforms (Amazon Seller

Central, Shopify, TikTok Shop, or similar).

• Experience reconciling credit card and bank statements from U.S. financial institutions.

• Excellent attention to detail and ability to manage multiple brands/entities

simultaneously.

• Strong written and verbal English communication skills.

• Reliable internet connection and a professional remote work setup.



Strongly Preferred

• Master’s degree in Accounting or a CPA/CMA designation.

• Prior experience as a bookkeeper or accountant for Amazon FBA or e-commerce

businesses.

• Familiarity with COGS tracking, landed cost calculations, and inventory accounting.

• Experience setting up or preparing international wire transfers through U.S. bank portals

(Chase, etc.).

• Comfort working with spreadsheets (Google Sheets / Excel) for SKU-level data

management and analysis.

title: Ecommerce Team Lead (Shopee, Lazada, Tiktok, Bigseller)
description:
URGENT HIRING

Collaborate closely with our regional teams to grow an exciting portfolio of leading Korean brands, including Beauty of Joseon, Needly, Tirtir, and other top-trending names in the market.

mbers.

ing e-commerce platforms (e.g., Refund/Return disputes, customer complaints, and fraud prevention).

title: Sales Rep – Warm Leads Only – No Cold Calling – $300–$800 Weekly Potential
description:
We are hiring multiple sales reps this week and interviewing immediately.

This is a SALES role for people who want to earn commissions and bonuses.

We are hiring confident phone sales representatives with excellent English to work from home for a stable US-based weight loss company.

If you enjoy sales, competition, and earning commissions, this job can pay very well.

You will be calling warm leads only.

Customers have already:

• Started an order

• Requested information

• Opted in to be contacted

You will NOT be cold calling strangers.

Your job is to help interested customers complete their order and earn commission on every sale.



Pay and Earnings

Base Pay: $3.50 per hour

PLUS

• Sales commission

• Daily bonuses

• Weekly bonuses

• Sales contests

Base pay averages $140 per week ($300-$800 average), as commissions and bonuses increase earnings significantly.

Typical total earnings:

Average reps: around $300 per week

Strong performers: $400–$600 per week

Top performers sometimes reach $800+ per week

Many reps earn more from commissions and bonuses than their hourly pay.

This position is ideal for people who enjoy sales and increasing their income through performance.



What You Will Do

• Call warm leads who abandoned their order

• Speak with customers interested in weight loss

• Answer basic questions

• Guide customers to complete their purchase

• Send payment links if needed

• Follow up with interested customers

This role focuses on closing sales and helping customers complete orders.



Work Schedule

Monday – Friday

9:00 AM – 6:00 PM Eastern Time (USA)

Includes:

• 1 hour unpaid lunch

• 2 15 minute unpaid breaks



Requirements

• Excellent spoken English (very important)

• Confident and energetic 

• Sales personality and positive attitude



Technical Requirements

• Noice cancelling USB headset (wired)

• Reliable high-speed internet

• Must connect directly to modem with ethernet cable (no WiFi)

• Quiet home workspace

• Windows or Mac computer capable of Zoom or Google Meet calls



Sales Experience

Previous phone sales experience is preferred but NOT required.

We will train confident applicants with strong English and a great attitude.



Work Environment

• Fully remote (work from home)

• Stable US company

• Long-term opportunity

• Competitive sales environment

• Daily and weekly bonuses

• Sales contests and incentives



How to Apply

To help us identify strong applicants, please include the word “Closer” in the first sentence of your application.

Also include:

Your previous work experience

A short paragraph explaining why you would be good at phone sales

A 30–60 second voice recording introducing yourself in English

Applicants with strong English will be prioritized.



Immediate Hiring

We are interviewing and hiring multiple sales reps immediately, with a start date of March 23rd.

If you are confident on the phone and want to earn more through commissions and bonuses, we encourage you to apply.

title: Account Manager (Remote) — Work With Global Clients at Pearl Lemon
description:
Tired of managing accounts where you’re treated like a middleman instead of a strategic partner?



At Pearl Lemon, our Account Managers sit at the center of growth. You won’t just relay messages between teams and clients — you’ll drive relationships, guide strategy, and help businesses across the world scale through digital marketing, lead generation, PR, and emerging ventures.



About Pearl Lemon



Pearl Lemon Limited is a UK-registered company (Company No.
) headquartered at 152–160 City Road, London EC1V 2NX. Founded in 2016 by entrepreneur and TEDx speaker Deepak Shukla, the company has grown into a global, remote-first agency ecosystem spanning SEO, B2B lead generation, PR, gaming, professional services, and hospitality brands.



Our international team works across multiple continents supporting clients in industries ranging from finance and SaaS to legal services and e-commerce. With strong inbound demand driven by SEO and content marketing, our account management team focuses on nurturing relationships and delivering measurable results.



What You’ll Do



As an Account Manager, you will be the trusted advisor for our clients and the internal champion for their success.



Key responsibilities include:



• Managing client relationships and ensuring smooth communication between clients and delivery teams

• Leading onboarding calls and setting clear expectations for campaigns and outcomes

• Monitoring campaign performance and ensuring client goals are achieved

• Coordinating with SEO, outreach, content, and sales teams to execute strategy

• Identifying upsell and cross-sell opportunities within the Pearl Lemon ecosystem

• Maintaining detailed records in CRM systems and reporting on account performance

• Acting proactively to solve problems and strengthen long-term partnerships



What We’re Looking For



We’re searching for someone who thrives in a fast-moving environment and enjoys working with international clients.



Ideal candidates will have:



• 2+ years experience in account management, client success, or agency environments

• Strong communication and relationship-building skills

• Ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines simultaneously

• Analytical thinking and a results-driven mindset

• Experience with digital marketing, SEO, or lead generation (preferred but not essential)

• Comfort working remotely with distributed teams



Why Join Pearl Lemon



Working with Pearl Lemon means joining a company that moves fast, experiments constantly, and values entrepreneurial thinking.



You’ll gain:



• Exposure to clients across multiple industries and countries

• A fully remote working environment with a global team

• Opportunities to grow into senior client strategy or leadership roles

• Hands-on learning across marketing, sales, and operations

• A culture that values accountability, transparency, and continuous learning



If you’re someone who enjoys building strong relationships, solving problems, and helping businesses grow — this role will put you right at the center of that impact.



Ready to Apply?



If this sounds like the opportunity you’ve been waiting for, we’d love to hear from you. Apply today and become part of a team helping companies around the world grow faster and smarter.

title: Graphic Designer – E-commerce & Amazon (Full-Time)
description:
About the Role

We’re looking for an experienced Graphic Designer (around 3+ years) to join our growing e-commerce team. This role is ideal for a strong executor - someone who works confidently within established brand systems, has excellent visual taste, and understands how design functions in an Amazon-led commercial environment.

You’ll be given clear briefs, templates, and direction, and trusted to deliver high-quality work with a good level of autonomy. While this is not a conceptual or leadership role, we value designers who stay up to date with visual trends and can suggest thoughtful refinements to existing assets when appropriate.

You’ll work across 4–5 consumer brands, with a strong focus on Amazon product imagery, A+ content, and packaging design.

 

Key Responsibilities

• Design and execute Amazon product imagery, including:

o Main images

o Lifestyle images

o Infographics

o A+ Content / Enhanced Brand Content

• Use AI image generation tools to create or enhance visual assets (e.g. backgrounds, scenes, lifestyle contexts), and refine them in Photoshop to achieve high-quality, realistic, and on-brand results

• Execute designs using existing templates and brand guidelines, ensuring consistency across SKUs and brands

• Refresh and evolve existing design templates where appropriate, based on trends and performance direction

• Design product packaging using established templates and dielines

• Prepare final files for digital and print use, ensuring technical accuracy

• Manage assigned design tasks independently in Monday, meeting deadlines and quality standards

• Make considered design decisions independently, while welcoming feedback when needed

• Collaborate with the wider team to support product launches and ongoing improvements

 

Required Experience & Skills

• Approximately 3+ years of professional graphic design experience

• Strong e-commerce experience, with Amazon as a primary sales channel

• Proven experience creating:

o Amazon listing images

o A+ Content

• Confident use of AI image generation tools as part of a production workflow

• Advanced Photoshop skills, including compositing, retouching, and realism refinement

• Packaging design experience using existing brand systems and templates

• Strong understanding of brand consistency and visual identity

• Excellent attention to detail and ability to work accurately from briefs

• Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign)

• Comfortable working across multiple brands simultaneously

 

Nice to Have

• Experience working with physical consumer products

• Familiarity with Amazon image guidelines and best practices

• Experience refreshing or optimizing existing ecommerce templates

• Understanding of how visual changes can impact conversion

 

What We’re Looking For

• A designer who can work independently without requiring micromanagement

• Reliable, organised, and comfortable managing multiple projects at once

• Confident in execution and day-to-day design decisions

• Commercially minded, with an understanding of how design supports sales

• Curious about new tools and trends, particularly in AI-assisted design

 

How to Apply

Please submit your CV and portfolio, including examples of:

• Amazon product imagery

• A+ Content (if available)

• Packaging design

• (Optional but encouraged) examples of AI-assisted imagery refined in Photoshop

title: Amazon SEO/SEM Ranking Expert Category Manager for American E-commerce Outdoor Sporting Goods Company
description:
Sales & Marketing Team Category Manager



OUR COMPANY

We're a rapidly growing outdoor sporting goods and clothing e-commerce company. We design, manufacture, market and sell our own brands on 
. We are a market leader in many product categories such as sleeping bags, cots, ski gloves, ski goggles, running gloves, stand up paddles, surfing accessories, headwear and more.

 

We have been in business almost 10 years, and are still growing at over 50% 
PANY MISSION

Making the outdoors accessible to all through quality outdoor sporting goods



ABOUT THE ROLE

Think about platforms such as Google, Amazon and Airbnb. Which sites, products and properties get clicked on the most? The ones ranked at the top!

 

On Amazon, our sales are 100% dependent on our product/keyword rankings — even if we have the best products in the world at the lowest prices, it doesn't matter unless our products rank for the relevant keywords. You will be responsible for the keyword rankings (and thereby sales) of our products. This is an incredibly important role.

 

We are looking for a data-driven, process-oriented, analytical, quantitative, curious, proactive, accountable and hard working individual to be our full-time Sales & Marketing Category Manager.



RESPONSIBILITIES OF THE ROLE:

- Ensure our products are a top 5 seller in the category that you will be responsible for.

- Check and take action on our Best Sellers Rank (BSR) and sub-category

rankings daily in order to detect any anomalies or positive/negative changes

- Put together and execute on a comprehensive launch plan for new products

- Put together and execute on a comprehensive ranking plan for existing products

- Create and execute on plans to improve the keyword ranking of our products:

which keywords do we prioritize first? What's the timeline?

- Own deals and coupons on Amazon: when should we run Lightning Deals and 7 Day Deals? For which products?

- Create quarterly plans - what products will we optimize and when?

- Ensure our products are as keyword optimized as possible: product title, backend search terms, description, bullet points and more. This continually changes as people search for the product in all sorts of new ways. We typically do this once or twice per year for every product.

- Become an expert in Amazon ranking yourself — get your hands dirty in keyword research and all the tasks in order to understand and manage the team. You should become the best at this on the team.

- Become a product expert — know and understand our 100+ products like the

back of your hand

- Keep SOPs and knowledge base updated, ensure everyone is up to date on best practices

- Schedule, run and optimize off-Amazon deals

- Work with developer to automate repetitive and time-consuming tasks

 

WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR:

- 2+ Years experience in Amazon or digital marketing (SEO/SEM) is necessary

- Loves to own things from start to finish — high follow-through, accountable

- Data-driven, analytical and quantitative - ability to collect and analyze information, problem-solve, and make decisions

- Process-oriented, detailed, organized

- Independent and proactive, can learn and figure out things quickly

- Experience in operations, manufacturing/supply chain, business analytics, inventory management/forecasting is a huge plus



WHAT IT’S LIKE WORKING WITH US:

- You will report directly to the Sales and Marketing Team Manager. 

- You will have access to sales performance and any data you need.

- You must be okay with morning or late evening calls to talk with the team in the Philippines, UK or US East Coast.

- You must be okay with long hours.

- Fast reliable internet is an absolute must



SALARY AND BENEFITS

- Pay: Competitive

- Employer reimbursed health insurance

- 21 days paid time off

- Remote work: no commute and work from the comfort of your home, coffee shop or resort

- Travel: We’ll travel to the Philippines 4x per year for our quarterly Get Togethers (to be resumed post-pandemic).



INTERESTED?

- If you’re interested in this job, please send us the following information:

- Media - write, video or audio about how your past experiences have prepared you for the responsibilities of the job

- Resume including 3 to 5 references

- Your current salary and what you’d like to make at your next role



We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Bookkeeper / Accountant
description:
Full-Time Bookkeeper / Accounting (Remote – Australian Company)

We are an Australian wholesale distribution company supplying retailers across Australia. Our business manages supplier purchasing, product pricing and wholesale orders, so maintaining accurate financial records is essential to our operations.

We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Bookkeeper / Accounting to join our team and help manage day-to-day accounting tasks.

This is a long-term remote role working with an Australian business. You must be available to work in the Australian time zone. (SYDNEY)

 Main Responsibilities

• Processing invoices and general accounting data entry

• Bank and account reconciliations

• Managing accounts payable and accounts receivable

• Handling credit notes and supplier account reconciliations

• Assisting with payroll and superannuation reporting

• Processing supplier invoices and purchase orders

• Updating product costs and pricing in internal systems

• Assisting with margin checks and cost updates

• Maintaining organised accounting records and documentation

• Supporting improvements to internal accounting processes

 

Skills & Experience Required

• Minimum 3 years bookkeeping or accounting experience

• Experience with NetSuite, Xero or similar accounting software

• Strong attention to detail

• Good Excel and Microsoft Office skills (must be able to do VLOOKUP and PIVOT tables)

• Comfortable working with financial records and reconciliations

title: ACCOUNTING EXPERT (ZOHO)
description:
We work with founders from around the world who operate businesses across multiple jurisdictions, including Dubai, the United States, and Europe.



We are looking for a highly organized and experienced Accountant with strong Zoho Books expertise to manage bookkeeping, financial records, and reporting for our clients.



Role Overview



As a Zoho Books Accountant, you will be responsible for maintaining accurate financial records, reconciling transactions, and preparing financial reports for multiple companies.



You will work closely with the operations and compliance teams to ensure all financial data is properly recorded and organized.



This role requires someone who is detail-oriented, reliable, and comfortable managing multiple clients simultaneously.



Key Responsibilities



• Manage bookkeeping for multiple client companies using Zoho Books

• Record and categorize financial transactions accurately

• Perform monthly bank and payment processor reconciliations

• Prepare monthly financial reports and summaries

• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable

• Review invoices and ensure proper expense classification

• Maintain clean and organized financial records for compliance purposes

• Assist clients with Zoho Books setup and onboarding

• Ensure financial data is accurate for tax filings and compliance

• Communicate with internal teams regarding financial updates and reporting

title: Executive Virtual Assistant
description:
Executive Virtual Assistant



Job Type: Full-Time

Work Hours: Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 4:30 PM Pacific Time, with a 30-minute break

Salary: $1100 per month



Job Overview: 

We are seeking a highly organized, proactive Executive Virtual Assistant to provide comprehensive support to a senior industry leader across both a consulting practice and a creative music career. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced, dynamic environment and enjoys balancing strategic business support with creative coordination.



The Executive Virtual Assistant will act as a trusted right hand, managing day-to-day operations, scheduling, communications, and project coordination. This position offers a unique opportunity to gain exposure to multifamily operations, PropTech, and consulting work, while also supporting initiatives within the music industry. The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, resourceful, and comfortable handling multiple priorities with discretion and professionalism.





Consulting & Business Operations Responsibilities: 



* Social Media & Content Management: 

Manage LinkedIn content calendar following established weekly posting strategy

Schedule and publish content across platforms using Dripify and other automation tools

Monitor engagement and flag opportunities for relationship building



* Podcast Scheduling & Coordination: 

Schedule and coordinate guest appearances for PropTech Pulse (multifamily PropTech) and Purpose Built (personal transformation) podcasts

Manage guest outreach, confirmations, and pre-interview logistics

Coordinate recording schedules and send calendar invitations

Prepare guest briefing materials and episode outlines

Track episode pipeline and maintain production calendar

Coordinate podcast promotion across social channels for all shows



* Speaking & Workshop Development: 

Research and apply to speaking opportunities at industry conferences (NMHC, NAA, Apartmentalize, regional events)

Track submission deadlines, requirements, and follow-up communications

Promote and book workshops, managing logistics and attendee communications

Coordinate The Diplomat's Table quarterly executive events



* CRM & Client Nurturing: 

Maintain CRM database with accurate contact information and engagement history

Execute nurturing sequences for prospects across six LinkedIn outreach lanes

Schedule discovery calls via Calendly Professional

Prepare briefing documents for client meetings



* Administrative & Financial: 

Manage calendar and scheduling using Microsoft Outlook

Prepare and send monthly client invoices

Track accounts receivable and follow up on outstanding payments

Compile monthly business reports and KPI tracking

Handle
 correspondence and prioritize inbox



* Website & Digital Platform Management: 

Coordinate website design and development projects with designers/developers

Manage website content updates, blog posts, and landing pages

Set up and maintain virtual training platform (course uploads, user management, content organization)

Manage ecommerce platform for workshops, courses, and digital products

Monitor platform performance, troubleshoot issues, and coordinate technical support

Track enrollment, sales metrics, and customer inquiries



* Music Career Responsibilities: 

Schedule and coordinate guest appearances for House Call music podcast

Manage guest outreach, confirmations, and recording logistics for House Call

Manage social media presence and content calendar for music brand

Research and submit tracks to record labels and A&R contacts

Submit songs to playlist curators (Spotify, Apple Music, etc.)

Coordinate release promotion campaigns for new tracks

Track streaming metrics and engagement across platforms

Research marketing opportunities and music industry events





Required Qualifications:

7+ years experience as an Executive Assistant, Virtual Assistant, or in a marketing/communications support role

Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, Public Relations, or related field preferred

Exceptional organizational skills with strong attention to detail

Proficiency with LinkedIn, social media scheduling tools, and CRM platforms

Experience with website content management systems (WordPress, Squarespace, or similar)

Familiarity with online course platforms (Thinkific, Teachable, Kajabi) and/or ecommerce tools

Strong written and verbal communication skills with professional polish

Demonstrated ability to manage multiple projects and priorities simultaneously

Self-starter who anticipates needs, takes initiative, and operates with minimal supervision

Experience coordinating podcasts, media appearances, or content production





Preferred Qualifications:

Experience supporting executives in professional services, consulting, or thought leadership roles

Familiarity with real estate, PropTech, or B2B industries

Background in music industry marketing, artist management, or entertainment

Experience with invoicing, basic bookkeeping, or accounts receivable

Knowledge of conference speaking circuits and event promotion





Note: An NBI or police clearance will be required upon acceptance of the job offer.

title: Client Support Specialist – B2B / SaaS (Remote – AU Clients / Philippines)
description:

Australian-Owned Company | Work Life Safety Systems (WLSS)

Work Life Safety Systems (WLSS) is an Australian-owned company supporting businesses with professional safety and compliance solutions.

We are seeking a high-performing Client Support Specialist to support Australian B2B and SaaS clients. This role requires excellent written English, strong administrative capability, and confidence working with professional documentation and CRM systems.



This is a mid-to-senior level remote role for professionals who enjoy structured work, client communication, and producing high-quality documentation.

We value clarity, reliability, and professionalism, and this role is best suited for applicants who meet these standards.



About the Role



This position is communication-heavy and documentation-focused, supporting Australian clients remotely.

You will handle client correspondence, CRM management, document preparation, reporting, and administrative coordination.



Attention to detail, professionalism, and following structured workflows are essential.

s, reports, and documentation

s and inquiries from Australian B2B customers

This role suits someone who enjoys organized work, clear communication, and maintaining high standards in documentation and client service.



What Success in This Role Looks Like



The successful candidate will be able to:

• Communicate clearly and professionally with international clients

• Produce well-structured documents and reports

• Follow processes and workflows with strong attention to detail

• Work independently while maintaining high professional standards

Required Skills & Experience

Experience supporting SaaS platforms or technical services is highly regarded.

Before Applying

s in English

If you are confident in these skills, we encourage you to apply.

How you would write and format a professional client
, or

Include the video link in your application. Applications without the required video will not be reviewed.

title: SHORT FORM VIDEO EDITOR | Day Shift
description:
We’re hiring someone who knows how to turn long-form content into sharp, high-retention short videos for platforms like TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.



This role is for someone who understands pacing, hooks, and visual rhythm in short-form content, and knows how to edit with intention rather than just cutting clips.



—-----------------------------------------------------------------------------



READ THE ENTIRE JOB LISTING CAREFULLY. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.



--- ABOUT THE TEAM ---

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!



What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM!   





Our Core Values:

1) DELIGHT THE CLIENT:  We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.

2) MASTER YOUR CRAFT:  We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.

3) FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS:  When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.



Our core values are important and the right candidate will share our values. We are building an awesome place to work, not just cutting together videos for our real estate business.



--- ABOUT YOU ---

Do you have strong creative instincts and know how to spot 
nts that make people stop scrolling? Are you proactive, adaptable, and detail-oriented? Do you have a sharp sense of pacing, an instinct for hooks, and a clear understanding of how short-form videos need to flow to hold attention? Do you take pride in clean edits and delivering videos that feel intentional and finished? Do our core values sound like a fit for who you are?



Then keep reading to see if we're a fit!



Responsibilities:

Short-Form Editing & Story Selection

- Review long-form videos, transcripts, or raw footage to identify short-form clip opportunities

- Select 
nts that are clear, engaging, and platform-appropriate

- Edit vertical videos optimized for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

- Create strong hooks, clean cuts, and natural pacing

- Deliver publish-ready videos that meet brand and platform standards



Captions, Visuals & Formatting

- Add on-screen captions (burned-in or SRT as required) with proper timing and readability

- Apply basic motion, zooms, punch-ins, and visual emphasis where appropriate

- Follow platform-specific formatting (aspect ratio, duration, safe margins)



Iteration & Workflow

- Implement feedback efficiently and meet agreed turnaround times

- Maintain clear file naming and folder organization

- Track edits, revisions, and delivery status as required



Requirements:

- A STABLE, HIGH-SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION, REQUIRED (at least 150mbps)

- Experience with Final Cut Pro X (or other editing software, such as Adobe After Effects and Premiere Pro) is required

- Strong preference for MacOS users

- Experience editing short-form vertical content for social platforms, required

- Strong understanding of short-form pacing, hooks, and retention

- Experience working from transcripts or long-form content, required

- Clean file organization and understanding of post-production workflo

- Portfolio of completed short-form video projects, required

- General understanding of brand, content marketing, YouTube, etc, required

- GREAT interpersonal and communication skills, required

- Ability to self-start, work on a tight schedule, and manage multiple project deadlines, required

- Ability to follow directions and a LOVE of completing lots of projects according to consistent specifications, required

- Growth mindset, required



--- APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS ---

STEP 1:

Fill out the application form through the link below and write "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field.


 



STEP 2:

Qualified candidates may be invited to participate in two PAID test projects, $10-20 USD for each test project estimated to be 2-3hrs of work for each (a total of $20-40 USD!).



STEP 3:

Candidates who advance through the test project rounds will be invited to an interview.



STEP 4:

Before extending a trial offer, we will conduct a CHARACTER REFERENCE CHECK for the final candidate(s). CONDUCTING A REFERENCE CHECK will be the last step in the hiring process.



STEP 5:

Upon receiving a trial offer, you will be onboarded as a Short Form Video Editor with a 90-day PAID trial period. During this period, we expect you to demonstrate your video editing expertise, meet project deadlines, be a team player, and excel at what you do. A successful trial will lead to a permanent offer to join the team.

title: Real Estate Maintenance Tech Support - VA Full Time Work From Home WITH APPFOLIO EXPERIENCE
description:
McIntire Kingstone is looking to hire a full-time maintenance support staff member who is interested in starting a career in the Real Estate industry.



About this Position



As the Maintenance Coordinator, your primary work will involve directly assisting with maintenance requests, completing maintenance jobs, and confirming they are finished.



We use Appfolio Property Management software, and you would work within the program to follow up with tenants and vendors to help ensure maintenance is getting done.



Duties and responsibilities include, but are not limited to:



-Work closely with onsite property managers (where applicable) to facilitate smooth unit turnover processes.

-Coordinate and track repair, maintenance, and renovation work with vendors, contractors, and internal maintenance staff.

-Monitor the status of maintenance requests, follow up to ensure timely completion, and maintain clear communication with tenants and vendors.

-Ensure all work orders and service requests are managed within designated timelines and budget thresholds.

-Review vendor estimates for work exceeding set maintenance limits and secure necessary approvals from the Regional Property Manager, Property Manager, Jr. Property Manager, or Owner before proceeding.

-Maintain accurate records of inspections, work orders, and vendor communications in the property management system using Appfolio.



Must-Have:

-2+ years of experience in property maintenance coordination or a related field, preferably with unit turns.

-Strong organizational and project management skills with the ability to manage multiple priorities.

-Well-versed with Appfolio property management software

-Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

-Detail-oriented with a proactive and problem-solving approach.

-Good Working PC/Laptop with backup internet service provider

-Punctual, honest, and has a great attitude.

-Critical Thinking

-Ability to effectively triage and prioritize emergency maintenance calls



SKILL SUMMARY:

-Conscientious about the timeliness of assignments and quality of work product

-Organize and prioritize tasks and work with minimal supervision

-Ability to adapt to new tools and software

-Exceptional work ethic and goal-oriented

-Proficient in Microsoft Office and Excel

-Well-versed in the Appfolio system.

-Solid understanding of sexual harassment and fair housing law

-Flexibility to handle changing priorities and projects.

 Support

title: Appointment Setter | Sales
description:
Key Responsibilities



Conduct outbound cold calls to SME business owners to introduce KPay’s payment solutions and generate interest.

Qualify leads and schedule appointments for field sales representatives to conduct in-person or virtual meetings.

Understand and communicate KPay’s value proposition clearly and persuasively to prospects across different industries.

Meet and exceed daily, weekly, and monthly targets for calls made, leads generated, and meetings booked.

Follow up on warm leads from marketing campaigns and inbound inquiries when applicable.





Key Requirements



2+ years of experience in telesales, or a hardselling role, ideally targeting SMEs.

Strong communication and persuasion skills, with a clear and confident phone presence.

Resilience and persistence, with the ability to handle objections and rejection professionally.

Goal-oriented mindset, with a strong drive to meet and exceed KPIs and team targets.

Organized and detail-oriented, able to manage lead pipelines and follow up consistently.

Basic computer literacy, with experience using CRM systems or lead-tracking tools.

Ability to work independently and as part of a team, coordinating effectively with field sales and marketing.

Being fluent in English is a must, knowing more languages would be a plus.

title: Tier1 Product Support Specialist (Philippines Only)
description:
You may apply using this link: 



About Us



Ylopo, LLC is a rapidly growing marketing and technology company providing internet marketing services and proprietary lead generation and engagement software to successful real estate agents across the country. We are seeking an outgoing, tech savvy individual to join our growing team.



 



Why work for Ylopo?



At Ylopo we offer tea
mbers:



a commitment to personal development,



guidance and support at a high level through interfacing with our Executive Team to prioritize goals as a company,



excellent leadership and mentoring for our entry-level to senior staff, and recognition of outstanding efforts,



team building events, team lunches/ happy hours, and other company wide events



a supportive, caring environment dedicated to continuous learning and growth.



Ylopo is looking for a Product Support Representative to join our Manila team to work alongside our US operations group. 



Goal: The primary goals of a product support specialist are to master the product and services of the company, to provide technical assistance by addressing inquiries and resolving complaints, to provide a higher level of customer support and to ensure customer satisfaction.



The primary responsibility of this role is to provide client support, troubleshooting help and guidance/training to clients and address questions and concerns on the use of our tools and systems. The Product Support Specialist will communicate with clients via phone,
 and chat.



 



Responsibilities:



Identify, investigate, and resolve client problems and handle technical support cases through phone, chat and
 submissions.

Respond (via phone/email/chat) to all clients in a timely manner to provide a high level of customer support.

Maintain client confidence by keeping their information confidential.

Field support calls, chat,
, and/or other communication from clients with inquiries about our systems and products.

Consult with users to determine steps and procedures taken to identify and resolve the problem.

Apply knowledge of computer software, hardware, and procedures to solve problems.

Collaborate with other teams/departments (Client Success, Billing, Implementations, Branded Sites, Marketing, Tech Teams) to research and resolve problems.

Maintain knowledge of technology innovations and trends.

Performs other related duties as assigned.

Develop great client relationships to keep clients excited about joining Ylopo

Speak confidently and professionally with clients.

Serve as subject matter expert for the Ylopo process.

Learn the ins and outs of Ylopo products.

 



Requirements:



EXCELLENT English verbal communication skills

EXCELLENT English written skills

Excellent English comprehension skills

Keen attention to detail

Strong analytical, problem-solving, and interpersonal skills

Can think on his/her feet and can provide prompt responses and resolutions

Able to take detailed notes regarding client issues and conversations

Ability to handle multiple inquiries and priorities while maintaining a pleasant demeanor with the clients

Noise free working environment

Understanding of real estate industry or previous work in real estate is a plus, but not required

Ability to work US hours

 



SKILLS:



Patience with frustrated customers and tricky support cases

Empathy for the client's situation

Adaptability to client's needs

Improvisation when roadblocks are reached

Positivity throughout the support cases

Emotional Intelligence for interpreting the client's intent/issues

Have excellent customer service and strong people skills to build relationships with our current and potential clients

Must be able to articulate concepts and ideas in a clear, concise and accurate manner

 Management

Tech savvy

Troubleshooting

Case Notes

Typing speed of 60-70 WPM

 



System Requirements:



The processor should be 2.0ghz and above, Intel core 5/7 is highly required for both main and back-up hardware

Ram should be at least 8 GB with 100 gb Free disk space

A headset with the noise-canceling feature

20 Mbps & up wired connection for the main internet service

strictly no USB Sticks allowed for backup internet connection

 



Shift Schedule: 9AM - 6PM Pacific Standard (weekends shifting schedule)



Rate: Php 40,000

title: Lead Generator For Bookkeeping
description:
About Us:

We specialize in providing top-tier bookkeeping services tailored to businesses' unique needs. With a dedicated team of professionals, we ensure accuracy, efficiency, and peace of mind for our clients. As we continue to expand, we are looking for a skilled Lead Generation Specialist to join us in filling our calendar with high-quality leads, utilizing your expertise in cold calling and cold
ing.



Job Description:

We are seeking a proactive Lead Generation Specialist who excels in cold calling and cold
ing techniques to fill our calendar with qualified leads. Your primary responsibility will be to identify and engage potential clients who can benefit from our bookkeeping services. You will play a pivotal role in driving business growth by generating a steady stream of leads and nurturing them through the sales pipeline.



Responsibilities:

- Utilize your experience in cold calling and cold
ing to prospect and qualify potential clients.

- Research and identify target industries and market segments to focus lead generation efforts effectively.

- Develop and execute strategic outreach campaigns to engage prospects and schedule appointments.

- Effectively communicate the value proposition of our bookkeeping services to potential clients.

- Maintain accurate records of all lead generation activities and outcomes using CRM software.

- Collaborate closely with the sales team to ensure a smooth handover of qualified leads.

- Continuously optimize lead generation strategies based on performance metrics and feedback.



Requirements:

- Proven track record of success in lead generation, particularly in cold calling and cold
ing, preferably in a B2B environment.

- Excellent communication and negotiation skills, with the ability to build rapport and overcome objections effectively.

- Strong organizational skills and attention to detail to manage a high volume of leads and appointments.

- Experience using CRM software and other sales and marketing tools to track and manage leads.

- Self-motivated with a results-oriented mindset and the ability to work autonomously.

- Knowledge of bookkeeping or accounting principles is a plus but not required.

- Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Marketing, or a related field is preferred.



Benefits:

- Competitive salary with performance-based incentives.

- Flexible remote work environment.

- Opportunities for career advancement and professional development.

- Joining a dynamic team of professionals passionate about delivering exceptional bookkeeping services.

- Work-life balance with a supportive company culture.

-Unlimited Earning Potential with a Base Salary+ Commissions for every close deal!





If you are a proactive and results-driven individual with experience in cold calling and cold
ing, we want to hear from you! Please submit your resume and a cover letter detailing your relevant experience and how you can contribute to our lead generation efforts.

title: Google Ads Specialist
description:
We are a growing Australian business in the home fragrance and lifestyle industry operating across retail and e-commerce channels. Our products include home fragrance and personal care items sold to customers in Australia and internationally.

We are looking for a Google Ads Specialist to manage and optimise multiple international ad accounts.

Role Overview:

This is a part-time contract role (approximately 4 hours per day), fully remote and aligned with Australian Eastern Standard Time (AEST).

You will manage five Google Ads accounts across Australia, the UK and New Zealand, focusing on performance optimisation and account growth.

Google Ads will be your primary focus. There may also be occasional oversight of Meta Ads and potentially TikTok Ads in the future.

Key Responsibilities

• Manage and optimise Google Ads campaigns across multiple accounts

• Monitor daily performance and ensure budgets are pacing correctly

• Optimise Search, Shopping and Performance Max campaigns

• Conduct keyword research and manage search term optimisation

• Implement bid strategy adjustments to improve ROAS and CPA

• Identify opportunities to scale high-performing campaigns

• Maintain clear campaign structure and account hygiene

• Provide weekly and monthly performance reports

Required Experience

• Minimum 2+ years hands-on Google Ads experience

• Experience managing e-commerce campaigns

• Experience managing multiple accounts simultaneously

• Experience with medium to large daily ad budgets

• Strong understanding of Search, Shopping and Performance Max campaigns

• Experience using Google Analytics 4 (GA4), Merchant Centre and Tag Manager

• Strong analytical and optimisation skills

Nice to Have

• Experience with Meta Ads or TikTok Ads

• Experience with Shopify or e-commerce platforms

• Experience with product feeds and reporting tools

• Experience managing international accounts



Application Instructions

To apply, please begin your application with:

"Google Growth Specialist"

Then include:

• Years of Google Ads experience

• The largest monthly ad budget you have managed

• Campaign types you have managed (Search, Shopping, Performance Max etc.)

• Your GA4 experience

• Confirmation you can work during AEST hours

• A brief example of a Google Ads optimisation you implemented that improved performance



Please include links to your resume and/or portfolio.



Shortlisted candidates will complete a short practical skill assessment.

title: Paid Media Specialist (Google & Facebook)
description:
We are seeking a Paid Media Specialist to manage, optimize, and scale paid advertising campaigns across Google Ads and Meta 
/Instagram) platforms. This role plays a key part in driving conversions, leads, and revenue through strategic and analytical performance marketing.

Key Responsibilities

•Plan, launch, and manage paid advertising campaigns on Google Ads (Search, Display, YouTube, Performance Max) and Meta Ads 
 & Instagram)

•Research target audiences, keywords, and competitors to improve campaign effectiveness

•Continuously monitor, analyze, and optimize campaigns to achieve KPIs such as CPA, ROAS, CTR, CPC, and conversion rate

•Develop and test ad creatives (copy, visuals, formats) in collaboration with content and design teams

•Manage advertising budgets efficiently to maximize ROI

•Set up and maintain tracking systems using Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, Meta Pixel, and conversion tracking

•Prepare weekly and monthly performance reports with insights and optimization recommendations

•Stay updated with the latest digital advertising trends, platform updates, and best practices

title: Full-Stack AI Engineer
description:
Senior Full-Stack AI Engineer

Work Type: Full-Time, Remote | Compensation: Competitive (Salary + Performance Bonuses)



About This Opportunity

We're building an AI-powered operating system for educational platforms—one that automates complex workflows, optimizes operations, and creates scalable infrastructure that will eventually serve multiple institutions across the education sector.

You won't be maintaining websites or doing routine tasks. You'll be architecting intelligent systems from the ground up: designing agentic AI workflows, integrating multi-system data pipelines, and building the technical backbone of a platform designed to scale.

This is a hands-on technical role for someone who understands how to build, deploy, and optimize AI agents in production environments. We're looking for a reliable individual contributor who thinks systemically, can anticipate bottlenecks, and takes ownership of the entire technical stack.



What You'll Actually Be Doing:

Agentic AI System Design & Development

- Design and build production-grade agentic AI systems that automate complex, multi-step workflows

- Architect AI agents that can reason, make decisions, and handle edge cases autonomously

- Implement sophisticated prompt engineering and agent orchestration strategies

- Integrate AI agents with existing business systems and databases

- Monitor, optimize, and improve agent performance in production

Full-Stack Infrastructure & Integration

- Build and maintain the technical backbone connecting multiple systems (databases, APIs, third-party tools, AI platforms)

- Design data pipelines that ensure clean, consistent information flow between systems

- Architect scalable solutions that will eventually work across multiple institutions

- Create dashboards and monitoring systems for visibility into what's working and what needs improvement

- Document systems thoroughly so they remain maintainable and improvable long-term

Front-End & User Experience (Secondary)

- Maintain and modernize web interfaces for the platform

- Ensure responsive design and excellent performance across devices

- Work with both custom-built and third-party embedded systems



What We're Looking For

- Required Experience & Technical Skills

- 5+ years of professional full-stack development experience (non-negotiable)

- Deep, production-level experience building and deploying agentic AI systems (not just using ChatGPT)

- Strong expertise in:

     Backend architecture and system design

     Database management and optimization

     API design and integration

     Full-stack JavaScript/TypeScript (or equivalent modern stack)

     HTML5, CSS3, and modern front-end frameworks

- Proven ability to architect solutions that scale across multiple contexts/clients

- Experience working with AI platforms (Claude API, OpenAI API, or similar at the integration level)

- Understanding of how AI agents work: reasoning, planning, tool use, and failure modes



Required Work Style & Values

- Individual contributor only — you personally own and complete all work

- Reliable, honest, and takes genuine pride in technical excellence

- Can work independently with daily collaboration and communication

- Full-time commitment (no other clients or divided attention)

- Thinks systemically about problems — can see how individual features connect to larger business outcomes

- Detail-oriented with a sense of urgency, but never at the expense of code quality

- Comfortable learning and adapting to our specific stack and workflow



Nice-to-Have

- Experience building products or platforms (not just client work)

- Background in education technology

- Experience with workflow automation platforms

- DevOps or infrastructure experience



About You

We're looking for someone who:

- Understands the bigger picture. You don't just build features; you think about how systems will scale and evolve.

- Actually knows AI. You've built with AI at the API level, debugged agent failures, and optimized prompt strategies. You're not learning this on the job.

- Values reliability. You show up, you communicate clearly, you deliver what you commit to, and you care about the quality of what you ship.

- Thinks long-term. You're interested in building something substantial, not just collecting paychecks from contract work.



What We're Building:

Phase 1: Build and optimize AI automation systems for our internal operations, creating scalable processes and infrastructure.

Phase 2: Adapt and offer this platform to other educational institutions who need the same automation and efficiency gains.

Phase 3: Evolve into a broader ecosystem that reshapes how educational platforms operate at scale.



You'll be building the technical foundation that makes all three phases possible. This isn't contract work—it's building infrastructure that matters.



How We Work Together:

- We're a fully remote team and we believe in transparency and clear accountability on both sides. Here's what that looks like in practice:

     ~ We use Hubstaff to track hours and maintain visibility into work. You'll always know exactly what we see — it keeps billing, communication, and expectations clean for everyone.

     ~ Webcam screenshots are part of our standard remote work setup. If you're confident in your work and value clear accountability, this won't be an issue.

     ~ Daily communication is expected — not micromanagement, but genuine collaboration. We want to know what you're building, what's blocking you, and what you're thinking.

     ~ You own your work. We're not hovering over your shoulder — we're building something together, and we trust the people we hire to show up and deliver.



This setup protects both of us. You get clarity on expectations, and we get confidence in our team. If you've done great work professionally and value straightforward working relationships, you'll feel right at home here.



Character & Work Ethic:

Technical skills can be taught. Character can't. Here's who we're looking for:

- Self-directed — you don't need hand-holding. You figure things out independently and take initiative without being asked.

- Communicative — you proactively update, flag problems early, and never go quiet. We should always know where things stand.

- Intellectually curious — you're genuinely excited about AI, not just using it as a buzzword. You follow the space, experiment on your own, and bring ideas to the table.

- Calm under pressure — systems break, deadlines get tight, things go wrong. You troubleshoot methodically rather than panic, and you keep moving forward.

- Collaborative but confident — you can push back respectfully when you see a better technical approach. We want a partner who thinks, not just someone who executes orders.

- High ownership mentality — you treat the business like it's your own. If something is late, that bothers you personally. - Deadlines aren't suggestions — they're commitments.

- Execution-focused — you think in outcomes, not effort. What matters is whether it shipped, whether it works, and whether it moves the business forward.



If this describes how you naturally operate, you'll thrive here. If you need constant direction or struggle with accountability, this role isn't the right fit.



Compensation & Benefits

- Competitive full-time salary based on experience and demonstrated expertise

- Performance bonuses for shipping high-quality work and hitting milestones

- Long-term partnership — we invest in the right people and grow together

- Remote work with flexibility on location

- Direct collaboration with leadership on technical strategy and decisions



How to Apply

Please provide:

1. Your background: 5+ years of full-stack experience? What's your actual background with agentic AI systems (not just using ChatGPT, but building and deploying them)?

2. Portfolio: Link to your portfolio, GitHub, or examples of:

Full-stack projects you've built (preferably production systems)

AI integration/automation projects you've worked on

Any platforms, products, or infrastructure you've architected

3. Technical approach: Tell us about a time you built or architected an agentic AI system. What was the challenge? How did you approach it? What did you learn?

4. Why this role? What appeals to you about building scalable infrastructure for an educational platform? Why are you interested in this kind of work?



What We Value

We're not looking for resume keywords. We're looking for someone whose technical judgment we trust, who thinks carefully about how systems fit together, and who genuinely cares about building something that works well.



If you've spent years building robust systems, understand AI at a deep level, and want to work with a team that values quality over speed, we'd love to hear from you.
