title: Ecom Performance Video Editor | High-Growth | Long-Term
description:
## Role Overview



The purpose of the Video Editor role at Ivy Ecommerce is to transform creative briefs into high-performing video ads that drive conversions at scale.



This is not just a technical editing role.



Our Video Editors are an integral part of the marketing engine. Your job is to understand the psychology, messaging, and strategy behind each ad concept, and bring it to life through sharp editing, pacing, storytelling, and attention to detail.



As a Video Editor, you are responsible for the execution and final polish of our video ads. The success of our marketing team depends on your ability to:



- Understand each creative brief from a performance/direct-response marketing lens

- Assemble visuals, hooks, captions, and pacing in a way that maximizes conversions

- Enhance the core marketing message through smart creative decisions



You understand that small details can be the difference between an ad that gets scaled to millions in spend and one that dies after testing.



Your role is to work closely with our Creative Strategists, actively learn what makes ads win or lose, and help us consistently produce winning ads month over month across our brand portfolio.





### Primary Responsibilities



- Edit and deliver ~10 ad briefs per week

- Collaborate closely with Creative Strategists to ensure each ad concept is executed correctly

- Implement feedback from the creative team and performance data to improve iterations

- Learn and internalize our ad strategy frameworks to understand what makes creatives “win” or “lose”

- Analyze your own creatives to identify what’s working, what isn’t, and how to improve

- Upload and organize final assets into the correct folders and formats for each platform





## Qualifications



### Direct Experience



- 1+ year experience editing eCommerce / performance marketing ads

- Experience working within a team environment and understanding roles in a creative workflow





### Character Traits We Look For



- Extremely high attention to detail – you care about the small things because you know they matter

- Creative + marketing-minded – you’re not just an editor, you’re curious about why ads perform

- Strong visual communicator and storyteller

- High curiosity and a desire to continuously improve your creative and marketing skills

- Willingness to do the “boring but important” work consistently at a high standard

- Clear communicator who collaborates well with a team

- Time-efficient, but willing to put in extra effort when quality demands it

- Hungry, motivated, and growth-oriented – you want to get better, take on more responsibility, and level up your career

- to make sure you are still reading, type “BLUE” in your response title.

- Coachable and open to feedback

- Not a clock-in, clock-out mindset — you care about results and impact







### This Role Is NOT for You If:



- You only want to execute tasks without understanding the marketing behind them

- You’re not interested in learning performance marketing or creative strategy

- You dislike feedback or fast-paced environments

- You’re disorganized or unreliable

- You prefer working solo and don’t enjoy team collaboration

- You’re not motivated to grow your skills and career over time







### Growth & Upside



At Ivy Ecommerce, we invest in people who perform and show initiative. This role has real upside for those who take ownership:



- Opportunity to grow into a Creative Strategist / Creative Lead role over time

- Increased responsibility across multiple brands in our portfolio

- Performance-based bonuses tied to ad spend (no cap)

- Long-term growth path into higher-level marketing and creative leadership roles



This is a long-term opportunity for someone who wants to build a career in performance marketing, creative & be part of building cool ecom brands, not just edit videos.







## ???? How to Apply



To be considered, please reply with:



- A short overview of yourself

- Your CV / Resume with your past work experience

- Your eCommerce video editing portfolio

- Your
 address + WhatsApp number



Then answer the questions below in detail:



1. What about this role excites you most?

2. Why do you believe you’re a strong fit for this role?







Applications that do not follow these instructions or provide detailed answers will not be reviewed.

title: Client Success Specialist (Remote, Forever) | Advance Global Medical Research
description:
CLIENT SUCCESS SPECIALIST WANTED: SHAPE THE FUTURE OF MEDICAL RESEARCH



-100% remote, forever

-Unlimited paid leave



Hello—we’re Trialfacts, a remote, entrepreneurial company at the forefront of advancing health research. We’re looking for a CLIENT SUCCESS SPECIALIST to help our clients successfully recruit participants for their clinical trials. If you’re a relationship-builder with strong organizational and analytical skills, and you thrive in a proactive, forward-thinking, and fast-paced remote environment, this role is for you.



YOUR ROLE:



CLIENT ONBOARDING & SUPPORT: Guide new clients through our onboarding process, ensuring they feel confident using our systems and understand how we help them reach their goals.

ENROLLMENT SUCCESS: Take initiative to proactively monitor client projects, develop strategies to ensure enrollment targets are met, and swiftly address any roadblocks along the way.

CLIENT RETENTION AND REFERRALS: Build strong relationships with clients by delivering anticipatory and exceptional service that encourages repeat business and enthusiastic referrals.

COMMUNICATION: Maintain clear, timely, and proactive communication that not only keeps clients informed but also anticipates their needs  and ensures projects stay on track.

QUALITY AND COMPLIANCE: Ensure quality standards are met and client and participant data are handled securely, in line with privacy regulations.



WHAT WE OFFER:



AUTONOMY & FLEXIBILITY: Set your own hours depending on what works best for our clients, enjoy unlimited paid holidays, and work from anywhere with a good internet connection.

INNOVATION & IMPACT: Work with research teams driving significant advancements in medical research from organizations like AstraZeneca, Harvard, Stanford, and many more.

GROWTH AND LEARNING: Opportunities for professional development, with access to courses and training programs.

REWARDING CAREER: Contribute meaningfully to the world of health research and share in the success of Trialfacts.



THIS POSITION IS IDEAL FOR YOU IF YOU:



ARE CLIENT FOCUSED: You thrive on understanding client needs and go the extra mile to anticipate and address them early.

EXCEL AT BUILDING RELATIONSHIPS: You naturally develop trust and rapport with clients, encouraging repeat business and referrals.

ARE A PROACTIVE PROBLEM SOLVER: You tackle challenges head-on, always looking for solutions that keep client projects moving forward and prevent issues before they arise.

ARE A STRATEGIC THINKER: You can review data and information, conduct root cause analyses, and resolve problems with mitigative and corrective strategies.

COMMUNICATE CLEARLY AND EFFECTIVELY: You’re skilled in both written and verbal communication, adapting your style to suit different audiences.

ARE ORGANISED AND DETAIL-ORIENTED: You juggle multiple priorities with ease, ensuring nothing slips through the cracks.

UNDERSTAND THE IMPORTANT OF DATA PRIVACY: You’re conscientious about handling sensitive information and complying with privacy standards.



INTERESTED IN JOINING US?

If this position aligns with your career aspirations and skills, we would love to hear from you. Apply here:

title: Client Success Manager (Leadership Role) — 100% Remote, Global Clients
description:
CLIENT SUCCESS MANAGER (LEADERSHIP ROLE): 100% REMOTE, FLEXIBLE HOURS, GLOBAL TEAM



WHO WE ARE:



We’re Trialfacts. We connect patients to clinical trials, and our clients rely on us to deliver results, transparency, and confidence throughout their studies. Our leadership team plays a critical role in shaping how we serve clients, collaborate internally, and grow sustainably.



YOUR JOB:



As Client Success Manager, you are a senior, client-facing leader and a core member of the Trialfacts Leadership Team. You own client outcomes end-to-end across active clients in the US and Australia, leading the team responsible for delivery, expectation-setting, escalation management, and internal coordination.



This is not a reactive support role. You set direction, guide teams, and work proactively with clients to drive strong outcomes, consistency, and trust.



You’ll work closely with Sales, Operations, Tech, and Leadership to ensure delivery quality, retention, and long-term client success.



SUPPORT THAT HELPS YOU THRIVE:



Competitive compensation – Stable and above-market monthly pay

Unlimited PTO you’ll actually use – Take paid leave whenever you choose.

Real flexibility – Work from anywhere and thrive in an async-first culture.

Paid learning and growth – We cover courses, books, and hands-on learning so you can keep building real, in-demand tech skills.



YOU'RE A STRONG FIT IF YOU BRING:



Proactive Client Success Leadership – You’ve owned client outcomes end-to-end, led client-facing teams, and partnered proactively with clients across complex accounts in a cross-functional, remote environment.



Trusted Advisor, Not Order-Taker – You’ve used judgment and expertise to guide clients toward effective approaches, rather than simply executing requests.



Strategic Client Mindset – You think beyond day-to-day delivery, prioritize based on impact, and confidently deprioritize low-value or high-visibility work when needed.



People Leadership Capability – You’ve developed talent through coaching and delegation, set clear expectations, and hold teams accountable for results.



Impact-Based and Client-Centric Approach – You’ve prioritized decisions based on client impact and measurable outcomes across delivery, prioritization, escalation, and resourcing decisions, clearly explaining trade-offs and escalating early to protect 

results.



Cross-functional alignment – You’ve aligned multiple internal teams around shared priorities, roles, and outcomes to drive coordinated execution.



Data-Driven Performance Management –You’ve delivered consistent KPI outcomes (such as client satisfaction, delivery pace, or retention) through disciplined execution and clear processes.



Clear, Executive-level Communication – You communicate priorities, decisions, and changes clearly with both clients and internal stakeholders, reducing errors and rework.



Quality, Reliability, and Trust– You’ve maintained high delivery standards, accuracy, and data integrity even during periods of change or pressure.



Scalable Remote Leadership – You’ve managed team capacity and concerns effectively in a remote, cross-cultural environment, sustaining performance without quality degradation.



Proactive Issue and Risk Management –You’ve anticipated risks, surfaces issues early, addresses them decisively with clear ownership, and seeks the right support when needed to protect client outcomes.



READY TO STEP INTO THIS ROLE?

If this role feels like the right fit, we’d love to hear from you. Applications accepted here:

title: Amazon Virtual Assistant – Wholesale / Brand Name Reselling
description:
We run a wholesale/brand name reselling operation on Amazon and need an all-around VA who knows the resale game .You should already understand how to work with existing ASINs, source from authorized distributors, and keep our operation running smoothly.

What You'll Be Doing:

Product Sourcing & Research — Scan wholesale price lists, compare against Amazon prices, check ROI/profit margins, verify sales rank, and flag winning products. Use tools like Keepa or similar to analyze deals.

Listing & Buy Box Management — Match products to existing ASINs, submit offers, manage pricing and repricing strategy, and monitor Buy Box performance. Handle any listing issues like suppressed or stranded inventory.

Inventory & Reordering — Track stock levels, place reorders with vendors/distributors before we run out, coordinate FBA inbound shipments (create shipment plans, generate labels), and follow up on open POs.

Vendor & Supplier Communication — Call and
 US-based distributors and brands to open new accounts, request price lists, check availability, negotiate pricing, and resolve order issues. Must be comfortable picking up the phone.

Customer Service — Respond to buyer messages promptly, handle A-to-Z claims, process returns/refunds, manage seller feedback and product reviews. Keep account health metrics green.

Account Health & Compliance — Monitor IP complaints, handle policy violations, submit appeals, open Seller Support cases, request brand ungating/category approvals, and resolve ASIN-level issues.

Reporting — Pull sales and inventory reports, track margins, flag slow movers, and keep our spreadsheets and trackers updated.



Who You Are:



At least 1–2 years of Amazon Seller Central experience specifically in wholesale or brand name reselling

You know the difference between ROI and margin, and you can scan a price list quickly

Comfortable making phone calls to US-based vendors and distributors

Familiar with FBA shipment creation, case logs, and inventory management

Experience with Keepa or similar sourcing tools

Strong written and spoken English

Detail-oriented, organized, and proactive — you catch problems early

Able to work independently with minimal hand-holding



Apply here

Nice to Have

title: Executive Assistant / Project Manager
description:
We’re hiring a highly organized, systems-minded Team Admin / Executive Assistant / Project Manager to support leadership and keep the team operating smoothly.



This role is for someone who thinks in systems, spots gaps before they become problems, stays ahead of deadlines, and keeps the entire team aligned without needing constant supervision. You are here to support leadership, manage projects, and keep systems running smoothly so the rest of the team can focus on execution.



—-----------------------------------------------------------------------------



READ THE ENTIRE JOB LISTING CAREFULLY. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.



--- ABOUT THE TEAM ---

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!



What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM!   





Our Core Values:

1) DELIGHT THE CLIENT:  We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.

2) MASTER YOUR CRAFT:  We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.

3) FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS:  When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.



Our core values are important, and the right candidate will share our values. We are building an exceptional place to work with strong systems, high standards, and real impact, not just managing tasks for our real estate business.



--- ABOUT YOU ---

Do you think in priorities, timelines, and dependencies? Do you enjoy turning scattered ideas into structured plans with clear owners and deadlines? Are you the type who follows up before being asked and catches details others miss? Do you take pride in building clean systems, documenting processes properly, and keeping teams aligned without constant supervision?



Then keep reading to see if we're a fit!



RESPONSIBILITIES:

Admin & Team Support

- Manage calendars, meetings, follow-ups, and reminders

- Handle inbox organization and message triage

- Prepare documents, trackers, and internal updates

- Keep files, folders, and naming systems clean and consistent



Project Management

- Track ongoing projects, deadlines, and dependencies

- Break down tasks and assign owners

- Follow up on deliverables and flag risks early

- Keep project boards and trackers up to date (e.g. Notion, Monday, ClickUp, Sheets)



Systems & Process

- Build and improve simple systems that reduce back-and-forth

- Document SOPs and workflows as things evolve

- Spot inefficiencies and automation opportunities, and suggest, design, and implement improvements

- Maintain dashboards, trackers, and recurring reports



Communication & Coordination

- Act as the bridge between leadership and the team

- Clarify priorities and next steps after meetings

- Ensure instructions are understood and executed correctly

- Keep everyone aligned without micromanaging



REQUIREMENTS:

Experience & Capability

- Must have extensive experience as an executive assistant, chief of staff, or operations associate

- Project management experience and comfortable managing and driving multiple large projects

- Must have previous experience managing people. You may not have any direct reports, but the experience is important

- Must have experience automating workflows and designing workflow processes with automation in mind. You may not be individually responsible for building them, but you should already have the experience to handle basic tasks and understand how the process works

- Comfortable with outcome and goal-based delegation and does not need to be told individual tasks

- Experience with Google Suite and GoHighLevel CRM is a plus, but not required

- Should be fluent in AI, but not reliant on it to think for you



Work Style & Standards

- Extremely detail-oriented

- Excellent organizational skills

- Excellent time management skills

- Strong written communication

- Strong written and spoken English communication skills; near-native level preferred

- Comfortable juggling multiple priorities

- Must love creating, refining, and working with standard operating processes (SOPs)

- Proactive. You don’t wait to be told something is broken, you anticipate it before it breaks

- Must move with a sense of speed and urgency in everything



Ownership & Mindset

- Extremely growth-oriented and hungry to learn

- You are the type of person who follows through every single time, no matter what, and always gets the job done. No excuses, no matter what pops up

- You are the type of person who is delighted when the client or the person you're preparing something for is delighted

- You want meaningful work around people who are incredibly smart, hard-working, and dedicated, with a phenomenal culture. We work hard, but we have fun doing it together



Availability & Technical Requirements

- A STABLE, HIGH-SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION IS REQUIRED (at least 150mbps)

- Must be willing to work long hours and be available to respond to messages within a 12-hour daily window (not necessarily working 12 hours a day, but reliably reachable and able to respond quickly if something urgent comes up)



Preferred:

- Experience working as a process engineer, manufacturing engineer, or industrial engineer is preferred, but not required

- Experience designing team workflows, augmenting existing workflows with automation, and/or automating existing workflows is a strong bonus, but not required



--- APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS ---

STEP 1:

Fill out the application form through the link below and write "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field.





STEP 2:

Qualified candidates may be invited to participate in two PAID test projects, $10-20 USD for each test project, estimated to be 2-3 hours of work for each (a total of $20-40 USD!).



STEP 3:

Candidates who advance through the test project rounds will be invited to an interview.



STEP 4:

Before extending a trial offer, we will conduct a CHARACTER REFERENCE CHECK for the final candidate(s). CONDUCTING A REFERENCE CHECK will be the last step in the hiring process.



STEP 5:

Upon receiving a trial offer, you will be onboarded as a Team Admin / Assistant / Project Manager with a 90-day PAID trial period. During this period, we expect you to demonstrate your video editing expertise, meet project deadlines, be a team player, and excel at what you do. A successful trial will lead to a permanent offer to join the team.

title: US Senior Accountant (Double/Keeper)
description:
Job Title: Junior Accountant

Location: 100% Work from Home

Job Type: Full-time

Schedule: Night Shift



If interested apply through this link: 
-(double-expert)



About Us:

Our mission is to deliver specialized bookkeeping for real estate investors, property managers, and senior living businesses. Using proven systems and a diagnostic-first approach, we bring clarity, accuracy, and confidence to messy books so our clients can focus on growth and strategic decisions.



We live by our values:

Excellence

We prioritize accuracy, proactive communication, and thorough preparation in everything we do.

Discipline

We operate with consistency, accountability, and respect for boundaries (no weekend work unless approved).

Alignment

We follow clear SOPs and shared goals to ensure consistency across clients and our team.

Ambition

We support our clients’ growth while building freedom and profitability within our own team.

Impact

We help businesses thrive by giving them clarity and confidence in their numbers.



What we do:

We go beyond balancing numbers. We empower our clients with reliable, actionable financial insight so they can confidently expand their portfolios, open new facilities, and scale operations in a sustainable and strategic way. Our goal is to turn financial data into clarity, giving business owners the visibility they need to make smart, forward-thinking decisions.



Job Summary:

Accounting professional specializing in full-cycle accounting for real estate portfolios, including property acquisitions and multi-entity operations. Experienced in accrual-basis accounting, financial reporting, reconciliations, intercompany transactions, and tax tracking. Skilled in managing day-to-day bookkeeping, accounts payable/receivable, payroll support, and sales tax compliance. Proficient in QuickBooks Online and related systems, with a strong focus on accurate reporting, organized chart of accounts management, client onboarding, and cross-functional collaboration to ensure timely and compliant financial operations.



What You’ll Do:



Manage full-cycle accounting for multiple real estate properties, including newly purchased assets.

Review and reconcile closing statements related to property acquisitions and transactions.

Maintain and oversee accrual-basis accounting, including monthly and year-end accruals.

Accrue and track tax payments and other property-related obligations.

Handle intercompany transactions and transfers across entities and properties.

Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports, reconciliations, and variance analysis.

Collaborate closely with property managers to gather financial data and ensure timely reporting.

Manage day-to-day bookkeeping for real estate investors, property managers, and senior living facilities.

Reconcile bank and credit card accounts regularly and accurately.

Handle accounts payable/receivable, payroll support, and sales tax filings as assigned.

Build and maintain a clean and organized chart of accounts.

Produce accurate monthly financial reports and ensure on-time delivery.

Support client onboarding, including connecting and setting up accounts in QuickBooks Online (QBO), Keeper, and related systems.



Collaborate with the account manager and team through Slack, Asana, and Notion.

Ensure compliance with deadlines and bookkeeping best practices.

Participate in financial cleanups and diagnostics when needed.



What We’re Looking For:

Has over 5 years of accounting work history.

At least 3 years of U.S.-based professional bookkeeping experience.

Experience working with real estate, property management, or service-based businesses (preferred).

Proficiency in QuickBooks Online and Google Workspace.

Background in using Double (formerly Keeper) is required.

Experience with Asana, and Slack is nice to have.

Strong knowledge of GAAP and best bookkeeping practices.

Preferred: QBO ProAdvisor certification.

Excellent attention to detail and organizational skills.

Strong communication and client-facing ability.

Traits we value: proactive, solutions-oriented, team player, systems thinker.



Teck Stack:

QuickBooks Online (QBO) – Primary accounting and reporting platform

Asana – Task and workflow management

Slack – Internal and client communication

Notion – SOPs, documentation, and knowledge base

Double (formerly Keeper) – Month-end close and transaction review, receipt management and report package and client communication tool.

Google Drive – File storage and collaboration

Gusto – Payroll and payroll-related reporting

Hostaway & Hospitable – Short-term rental/property management platforms

Stripe – Payment processing and reconciliation

Airbnb, VRBO, 
 – OTA integrations and revenue tracking

AppFolio, Escapia, RentVine – Property management systems



Why You’ll Love Working Here:

Supportive Team: Join a team that values collaboration and celebrates achievements.

Career Growth: Opportunities for professional development and advancement.

Loyalty: Tea
mbers who worked with the founder in a prior company have followed.  Two have over 10 years with the founder.  Generous opportunities for personal and professional development without the corporate garbage that steals your soul. 

Health & Wellness Benefits: We care about your well-being and provide resources to keep you at your best.

Flexible Work Environment: Enjoy a balanced work-life with options for remote work.



Perks:

80-120 Hours of PTO

7- Paid Holidays

13th Month Payroll

Paid Philippine HMO plan

Paid Social Security System

Paid Philippine Health 

Maternity/ Paternity Benefits

Advancement after Proof of Mastery

Performance Goals with advancement compensation



We can’t wait to meet you and discover the value you’ll bring to our team! If this sounds like a role you’re excited about, apply now and help us continue building a workplace we all love

s, reaction clips, and occasional B-roll

Content Style



Our editing style is similar to:



• Podcast panel discussions

 inserts for humor

Remote position

title: Facebook Expert for Support with Facebook Assets
description:
We’re looking for someone experienced with the Meta platform 
) to help our team resolve technical issues related to profiles, Business Managers, pages, and ad accounts.



In this role, you’ll be the go-to person when problems arise inside the Meta ecosystem. Our clients often run into issues with account access, asset ownership, verifications, and other platform quirks, and we need someone who can step in, diagnose the issue, and find a solution.



You’ll work closely with our internal team and occasionally with clients to help troubleshoot problems, explain platform changes, and keep things running smoothly. Part of the role will also involve documenting common issues and solutions so we can continue improving our internal processes.



We’re looking for someone who already understands how Meta’s systems work and enjoys solving platform problems. Clear communication and a practical, problem-solving mindset are important, since you’ll often be explaining technical issues in simple terms.



This role offers flexible, remote-friendly work and the chance to work with a variety of Meta accounts and real platform challenges as part of a supportive team.



Experience using antidetect browsers, specficially Adspower, is beneficial to this job.

 & Instagram) to help our team resolve technical issues related to profiles, Business Managers, pages, and ad accounts.



This role is focused on night-time coverage, helping support our team and clients during off-hours when issues often arise. You’ll be the go-to person when problems occur inside the Meta ecosystem, including account access issues, asset ownership conflicts, verifications, restrictions, and other platform quirks.



You’ll work closely with our internal team and occasionally with clients to diagnose problems, find solutions, and explain platform behaviour in a clear and simple way. Part of the role will also involve keeping track of common issues and solutions so we can continue improving our internal processes.



We’re looking for someone who already understands how Meta’s systems work and enjoys troubleshooting platform problems. Strong communication skills and a practical, solution-focused mindset are important, since you’ll often be helping others understand what’s going on and how to fix it.



This is a flexible, remote-friendly role designed for someone comfortable working night hours, with the opportunity to work on a variety of Meta accounts and real platform challenges while supporting a collaborative team.

title: Video Editor for an E-commerce Brand
description:
ABOUT A MAN AND HIS CAVE



A Man & His Cave is one of Australia’s leading man cave and lifestyle brands, supplying premium products nationwide across pool tables, arcade machines, pinball machines, kegerators, furniture, and bar accessories.



This role is exciting because your work will directly impact revenue. You will not just edit videos. You will craft high-performing direct response ads that drive measurable results. If you enjoy blending creativity with marketing psychology and seeing your edits convert into sales, this role is for you.





ABOUT THE ROLE



We are looking for a skilled Video Editor with strong experience in direct response advertising. You will be responsible for producing engaging, scroll-stopping ad creatives for paid media campaigns across platforms such as
, Instagram,and YouTube.



You must understand ad hooks, retention strategies, pacing for performance, and how to edit for conversions, not just aesthetics.



This role will start at approximately 15 hours per week, with the expectation of scaling up to full-time hours within the next six months as the company continues to grow and creative production increases. Applicants should be open to expanding their availability as the role evolves.





KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

- Edit high-converting direct response video ads for paid social campaigns

- Create multiple ad variations for A/B testing

- Add captions, motion graphics, and dynamic text overlays

- Cut and optimize footage for strong hooks within the first 3 seconds

- Repurpose long-form content into short-form performance ads

- Sync video pacing with script messaging and brand voice

- Incorporate feedback quickly and iterate based on performance data

- Organize and manage raw footage, assets, and project files

- Collaborate with media buyers and copywriters to align creative with campaign strategy





DAILY AND WEEKLY TASKS



Daily:

- Edit 1 to 3 short-form direct response ads

- Review scripts and apply structured hook, problem, solution, offer framework

- Export and format creatives for different platforms

- Communicate progress updates



Weekly:

- Produce multiple ad variations for testing

- Optimize top-performing creatives

- Attend brief strategy discussions

- Organize project folders and maintain clean file systems





REQUIRED TOOLS AND PLATFORMS



You must be proficient in most of the following:

- Adobe Premiere Pro

- After Effects

- CapCut or similar short-form editing tools

- Canva for quick graphic overlays

- Google Drive

- Slack

- Asana

- Meta Ads Manager familiarity is a plus





WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



Required Experience and Skills

- Demonstrated experience in editing direct response video advertisements for eCommerce brands, with a strong portfolio showcasing performance-driven creatives

- Solid understanding of conversion-focused editing principles, including hook development, audience retention techniques, pacing optimization, and clear call-to-action integration

- Proven ability to structure ads using established direct response frameworks such as hook, problem, solution, proof, and offer

- Experience producing UGC-style creatives tailored for paid social platforms including
, Instagram, and YouTube

- Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects, with the ability to incorporate motion graphics, dynamic text overlays, and performance-oriented visual elements

- Strong understanding of platform-specific best practices, including aspect ratios, formatting requirements, and audience behavior trends

- Ability to interpret creative briefs, scripts, and performance feedback to iterate and optimize content efficiently

- Strong storytelling skills with attention to detail in audio, visuals, subtitles, and overall viewer experience

- Excellent written and verbal English communication skills to ensure clear collaboration with cross-functional teams

Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously while maintaining accuracy, organization, and adherence to deadlines



Must Have Traits

- Reliable and consistently meets deadlines

- Detail-oriented and quality-focused

- Strong communicator

- Open to feedback and fast iterations

- Proactive problem solver

- Organized and structured workflow

- Takes ownership of results



Technical Requirements

- Stable internet connection

- Backup internet connection preferred

- Must be available during required AEST overlap hours

- Camera and microphone for team meetings



If you are passionate about performance marketing and want your work to directly impact business growth, we would love to hear from you.



To apply, please complete the application form here: 





Note: If you are unable to click the application link due to the OnlineJobs.ph interface, please copy the link and paste it directly into your browser.

title: Social Media assistant
description:
We are looking for a creative, organized, and detail-oriented Social Media Assistant to support our growing online presence. This role focuses on content creation, scheduling, and ensuring all social media platforms stay active and consistent. The ideal candidate understands social media trends, can coordinate content production, and keeps content organized so the most important posts are published on time.



The Social Media Assistant will be responsible for managing and supporting **multiple social media accounts for several YouTubers/Content creators, as well as their associated brand accounts.** This includes coordinating content across platforms to maintain consistency and ensure all accounts remain active and aligned with each creator’s brand and online presence.



The assistant will also regularly review these accounts to become familiar with each creator’s style, audience, and brand identity. One of the main creators, **Ameerah Navalua**, is known for family-friendly DIY and slime content and has built a large audience through her YouTube channels. 







YOUTUBE



* [
](
)

* [
](
)

* [
](
)

* [
](
)



          INSTAGRAM



* [
](
)

* [
](
)

* [
](
)

* [
](
)





**Key Responsibilities**



**Content Creation**



* Write captions and social media copy for posts and videos

* Assist with creating and editing images, short-form videos, and graphics

* Brainstorm creative content ideas that align with each creator’s brand

* Adapt content for different formats such as YouTube Shorts and social media posts



**Content Scheduling & Posting**



* Schedule and publish posts according to the content calendar

* Ensure all creator and brand accounts are consistently being posted on

* Monitor the posting schedule and ensure content goes live at the appropriate times

* Maintain and update the social media content calendar



**Content Coordination & Team Communication**



* Communicate and coordinate with the video editing and graphic design teams to ensure all content is being properly edited and delivered on time

* Ensure videos are edited, scheduled, and ready for posting according to the content plan

* Coordinate with the design team to ensure thumbnails, graphics, and visuals are created when needed

* Ensure thumbnails are completed before videos are scheduled for posting

* Help ensure photos are taken or provided when needed for posts and social media updates

* Make sure all assets required for posting (videos, thumbnails, captions, graphics) are ready before scheduled posting dates



**Content Coordination & Prioritization**



* Coordinate which content needs to be filmed, edited, and prepared for posting

* Ensure the correct posts are filmed and edited according to the content plan

* Prioritize specific videos or posts when there is a backlog of content waiting to be published

* Make sure time-sensitive or high-priority videos are posted before lower-priority content

* Organize the content pipeline from filming to editing to posting



**Trend & Content Research**



* Research trending topics, formats, and strategies relevant to YouTube and creator content

* Identify opportunities for content based on current trends

* Monitor competitor channels and identify ideas that could improve engagement and reach



**Brand Familiarization**



* Regularly review the YouTube and Instagram accounts of the creators being managed

* Become familiar with each creator’s style, audience, voice, and brand identity

* Ensure content being posted aligns with the creator’s personal brand and messaging



---



**Required Skills**



* Strong understanding of YouTube, YouTube Shorts, and social media platforms

* Basic video editing and graphic design knowledge

* Strong organization and time management skills

* Ability to prioritize tasks and manage a content backlog efficiently

* Strong communication and collaboration skills



---



**Preferred Tools Experience**



* Canva or similar design tools

* Basic video editing software (CapCut, Premiere Pro, etc.)

* Social media scheduling tools



---



**Ideal Candidate**



* Highly organized and detail-oriented

* Creative and proactive with content ideas

* Comfortable working in a fast-paced creator environment

* Able to manage multiple creators, brand accounts, and posting schedules simultaneously



If you are passionate about YouTube, content creation, and helping creators grow their channels and social media  while keeping content organized and published consistently, we would love to hear from you. please attached your resume and portfolio or anything you have worked on when you apply.

title: Senior Graphic Designer / Art Director (Brand Development – Food & Beverage)
description:
We are 7 Leaves Cafe, a growing beverage brand focused on high-quality drinks and strong brand identity. We are currently looking for a Senior Graphic Designer / Art Director to support our team with brand development and design projects.



This role will initially be project-based, with the potential for longer-term collaboration if the partnership is a good fit.



We are looking for someone with strong branding experience, ideally with work related to retail, food, beverage, or coffee brands.



Responsibilities

• Develop and execute brand design concepts

• Create visual assets for marketing campaigns and digital platforms

• Contribute to brand identity development and visual guidelines

• Design materials for retail, packaging, and in-store branding

• Collaborate with our internal team to maintain brand consistency

• Provide creative input and design direction when needed



Requirements

• Minimum 5 years experience in graphic design or art direction

• Strong portfolio showcasing branding and identity work

• Experience working with retail, food, beverage, or coffee brands preferred

• Strong skills in Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop, InDesign)

• Strong understanding of typography, layout, and brand systems

• Ability to communicate clearly in English



Preferred Qualifications

• Experience working with consumer brands

• Experience designing packaging or retail environments

• Ability to think strategically about brand storytelling and design systems



To Apply

Please include the following in your application:

Link to your portfolio (required)

A short introduction about your branding experience

Examples of projects related to food, beverage, retail, or coffee brands

Your expected project rate or design rate



Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed.

title: Remote Home Care Recruiter – Full Recruitment System Owner
description:
We are a licensed home care agency serving seniors in Minnesota. We hire caregivers who allow older adults to remain independent in their homes.



We are looking for a full-time remote recruiter with minimum 2 years experience, who will own the entire caregiver recruitment system from start to finish.



This is not a resume-reviewing role.

This is a systems role.



You will:

Forecast hiring needs by geographic area

Manage job postings and applicant flow

Answer incoming applicant phone calls

Screen and qualify candidates

Track pipeline metrics

Ensure we never run short on caregivers in key service areas

You will work directly with leadership, scheduling and HR.



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

1. Recruitment System Ownership

Maintain and improve our caregiver recruiting pipeline

Track KPIs: applicants per week, interviews scheduled, hires, cost per hire

Keep weekly recruiting dashboard updated

Identify bottlenecks and fix them



2. Applicant Handling

Answer inbound applicant phone calls (during defined hours)

Conduct structured phone screenings

Schedule interviews

Follow up with incomplete applicants



3. Forecasting & Workforce Planning

Review weekly scheduling data

Identify geographic gaps (city-level forecasting)

Recommend when and where to increase job ads

Anticipate shortages 30–60 days in advance



4. Job Advertising

Post and manage job ads (Indeed,
, local boards)

Test and improve ad copy

Track performance by source



5. Reporting

Weekly hiring report

Pipeline health report

Geographic coverage report



REQUIRED SKILLS

Mastery in English (written and spoken)

Comfortable handling  extensive phone calls daily

Experience recruiting hourly workers (healthcare preferred)

Strong spreadsheet skills (Google Sheets or Excel)

Organized and process-oriented

Comfortable working with metrics and data

Please respond with the word Gemini on the subject line when responding



WHAT WE VALUE

Ownership mentality

Clear communication

No drama, no excuses

Process improvement mindset

Data-driven decisions

title: Customer Support Quality & Coaching Lead
description:
Remote | Full-Time | Australian Healthcare Telehealth Business



About the Role



We are seeking a structured and performance-focused Customer Support Quality & Coaching Lead to oversee call quality, coaching, and performance standards within our customer support team. This is a hands-on leadership role focused on improving call quality, maintaining service standards, and coaching the team to perform at their best.



You will work closely with leadership to ensure customer interactions are professional, consistent, and aligned with company standards.



This role reports directly to the CEO.



Key Responsibilities



Call Quality & Performance

Identify patterns, training gaps and performance issues

Maintain simple weekly QA and performance reports

Coaching & Development

Provide structured coaching feedback to tea
mbers

Run regular 1:1 coaching sessions

Support agents to improve communication, call structure and confidence



Service Standards

Ensure scripts, workflows and SOPs are followed

Support resolution of escalations and customer complaints

Maintain high communication standards across the support team



Experience Required

3+ years in Customer Support leadership, QA, or call centre supervision

Experience reviewing calls and coaching teams

Healthcare experience is a bonus but not essential.



Who You Are

Structured and analytical

Calm and confident giving feedback

Detail-oriented and process-driven

Comfortable working with performance metrics



To Apply -Please include:

• CV

• Internet speed test

• Confirmation you can work Australian business hours



Applications without a video will not be reviewed.

title: content video editor
description:
We are looking for a creative, trend-savvy YouTube Video Editor to join our team. In this role, you’ll transform raw footage into engaging, high-impact videos that resonate with audiences and reflect the latest online trends. From snappy transitions to eye-catching motion graphics, your edits will shape our channel’s identity and drive viewer engagement. If you’re passionate about storytelling, social media culture, and the newest editing styles, we want to hear from you!



Please look at these accounts to get an idea what style of editing we are looking for:



















Key Responsibilities

Video Editing & Post-Production

Edit and assemble recorded footage into compelling, on-brand content for YouTube and other social media channels.

Incorporate trendy editing techniques, visual effects, and motion graphics to keep videos fresh and engaging.

Balance pacing, narrative flow, and comedic timing in line with current YouTube best practices.

Creative Direction

Stay ahead of editing trends, including transitions, text animations, color grading, and sound design.

Collaborate with the content team to develop creative storyboards or shot lists.

Brainstorm content ideas and suggest improvements to existing and upcoming videos.

Brand Consistency & Quality

Ensure visual consistency across all content (e.g., logos, fonts, color palettes, intro/outro).

Maintain high production standards, including aspect ratios, resolution, and audio clarity.

Perform final checks for continuity, color accuracy, and transition smoothness before publishing.

Collaboration & Project Management

Work closely with producers, videographers, and other stakeholders to meet deadlines and content goals.

Adapt to feedback and revisions promptly while maintaining overall project vision.

Use project management tools (e.g., Trello, Asana, or 
) and communicate via Slack or similar platforms.

Optimization & Analysis

Leverage metadata, YouTube analytics, and audience feedback to refine editing approaches.

Experiment with new editing formats or effects to improve viewer engagement.

Contribute to post-mortem discussions to evaluate what worked well and identify areas for improvement.



On times there are no edits, research trends for future video ideas and have weekly or monthly meetings for these ideas.



Required Qualifications

Education & Experience:

Bachelor’s degree in Film Production, Media, Communications, or a related field (or equivalent experience).

1+ years of experience editing videos for YouTube or other social media platforms.

Technical Skills:

Proficiency in video editing software such as Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve.

Basic knowledge of motion graphics (e.g., Adobe After Effects) is a plus.

Familiarity with color grading, sound mixing, and file management best practices.

Creative Skills:

Thorough understanding of current YouTube trends, viral editing styles, and internet culture.

Strong sense of pacing, storytelling, and visual design.

Ability to seamlessly blend video, audio, and graphical elements into a coherent narrative.

Soft Skills:

Excellent communication and teamwork skills; able to work independently and collaborate remotely.

Detail-oriented with strong organizational and time-management abilities.

Adaptable to fast-changing creative directions and feedback.



Preferred Qualifications

Experience creating thumbnail graphics, short-form social media clips, or TikTok/Reels-style edits.

Familiarity with basic animation and motion typography.

Knowledge of video SEO and YouTube algorithm best practices.

Experience using Slack or Trello (or similar platforms) for remote collaboration.





How to Apply:

Interested candidates should submit their resume AND portfolio link showcasing relevant video editing work. Please include references or links to any YouTube channels or specific videos you’ve edited to demonstrate your editing style.



Join us and help create content that captivates and inspires our digital audience—apply now!

title: Technical Assistant Intern
description:
Technical Assistant Intern : Competitive Internship Program (Part-Time)



This is not a typical job posting. We are not looking for the most experienced candidate. We are looking for the most coachable, resourceful, and driven one. A select group of candidates will be chosen to enter a paid internship program. Only the best will earn what comes next.



Hint: The first piece of the URL is " www."



Here is how it works. A carefully selected group of interns will go through a structured, hands-on training program spanning several weeks. Each intern will be taught a versatile set of technical and operational skills directly applicable to building and scaling a modern digital organization. 



Training is delivered through live workshops held twice a week, supported by independent exercises completed on your own time. All interns will be compensated during the program.



Hint: The second piece of the URL is "google."



At the conclusion of the internship, top-performing candidates will be considered for an elevated opportunity within the organization. This is the chance to take everything learned during the program and apply it to real, high-impact work that will directly shape the growth of a personal brand and media business. 



What that looks like will be determined by your performance — the best candidate earns the best outcome.



Hint: The third piece of the URL is "com/view/jtg-jobs/"



We are looking for candidates who are curious, coachable, and hungry to grow. You do not need to arrive with every skill — you need to arrive with the right mindset. The ideal candidate is someone who takes initiative, follows through without being chased, communicates clearly, and is not afraid to figure things out. Prior virtual assistant, freelance, or remote work experience is a plus, but what matters most is your attitude toward learning and execution.



Hint: The final piece of the URL is "MKCTA"



Application Process: To apply, you will need to prove something more valuable than your resume — your ability to follow instructions, navigate a new tool, and show us who you really are. We have hidden pieces of a URL throughout this posting. Collect each one, assemble the full URL, and visit the application activity page we have built for you. There you will find your first challenge. Complete it, and you are in the running.



Final Instructions: Piece together the four URL hints found throughout this post, visit the page, and complete the activity. We are selecting only a few. Show us you are one of them.



Good luck — the first test starts now.

title: Video Sound Designer / composer
description:
YouTube Sound Designer

Help us make our videos sound like the biggest creators on YouTube



We’re looking for a creative Sound Designer who knows how to make videos feel exciting, emotional, and fun using trending sound effects and cinematic or ambient music like you see on channels such as Stay Wild and Jordan Matter.



You’ll help bring our content to life through sound, always staying on trend and making every video feel modern, fresh, and impactful.



What You’ll Do

• Add sound effects that match viral editing styles and popular YouTube trends

• Use ambient or cinematic music to build emotion, tension, and excitement

• Stay current with sound trends across YouTube, TikTok, and Reels

• Collaborate with editors to make sure sound matches visuals perfectly

• Clean and balance voice audio when needed

• Maintain a polished, fun, and consistent sound style across our videos

• Meet weekly deadlines for short and long-form content



Channels You'll Work On

• Just Ameerah

• MoreAmeerah

• Paul Paghent

• Boss Baby Ares



Our content includes pranks, family vlogs, challenge videos, comedy skits, and storytelling. It's fast-paced, energetic, emotional, and always full of personality.



What We’re Looking For

• Portfolio or examples of your sound design work

• Experience using audio tools like Adobe Audition, Logic Pro, or Pro Tools

• Access to high-quality sound effects and music libraries (we also use Epidemic Sound)

• Strong sense of what's trending and what makes content go viral

• Ability to take creative direction and deliver projects on time

• Bonus if you have experience editing for YouTube or TikTok

title: Product & Packaging Design
description:
Responsibilities

Product & Packaging Design

Design packaging for slimes, clay products, DIY kits, slime food market products, bath bombs, whipped soaps, candles, merch, and more

Create dielines, box templates, labels, stickers, bottles, jars, and container visuals

Design physical product concepts (shape, size, materials, colors, etc.)

Create cohesive collections and themed packaging sets

Produce production-ready artwork for printing and manufacturing

Branding & Visual Identity

title: WordPress/Divi Builder: Figma-to-Live Specialist
description:
Agency: Sinuate Media



Focus: Precision, Mobile Optimization, & Project Ownership



We are looking for a WordPress Builder who doesn't just "build pages" but executes designs. If you struggle to match fonts, padding, and hex codes from a Figma file, this is not the role for you.



We need a dependable partner who reads instructions twice, asks questions once, and delivers work that doesn't require a "second pass" to fix basic mistakes.



The Role

- Figma Translation: Take a Figma design and build it 1:1 in Divi.

- Mobile First: Every page must be flawlessly optimized for mobile—not as an afterthought, but as part of the build.

- Problem Solving: When a plugin breaks or a layout shifts, you don't just say "it's broken." You investigate, find a fix (CSS/Light PHP), and communicate the plan.

- Communication: You are proactive. You tell us when you start, where you are, and when a task is 100% "Client-Ready."



Technical Requirements

- Divi Mastery: 3+ years. You must understand the Theme Builder and Global Elements.

- Detail Obsession: You notice when a button is 2px off-center.

- The "Thinker" Mindset: You look at a task, think through the logic, and then execute.

- Bonus: Experience with Framer (mention this if you have it).



How to Apply (Follow Carefully)

We will ignore any application that does not follow these 4 steps:

1. The Code Phrase: Start your message with: "I have read the Sinuate standards."

2. The Proof of Precision: Send a link to a live site you built AND a screenshot of the Figma design it was based on. We want to see how accurately you translate designs.

3. The Logic Test: Tell us about a time a Divi layout broke on mobile and exactly how you fixed it (be specific about the CSS or setting used).

4. The 15-Point Commitment: Apply using exactly 15 AP points so we know you are serious about long-term agency work.

title: Right-Hand Executive Assistant (Problem Solver & Project Catalyst)
description:
The Role:

I am looking for a "Right-Hand" VA to help me move projects—both business and personal—off my plate and into reality. This isn’t a data-entry role. This is for someone who enjoys the "hunt"—figuring out how to list a car, researching a new market, or troubleshooting a technical snag when I don’t have the time to.



You are a fit if:

-- You are a Researcher: You can take a vague request ("Find the best CRM for a 3-person team") and come back with a comparison and a recommendation.

-- You are a Catalyst: You don't just "wait for tasks." You see where I’m stuck and offer to help move it along.

-- You have "Technical Chops": You aren't afraid to log into a new software, read the documentation, and figure out how it works.

-- You have a "Business Brain": You can help me facilitate new sales tests or ventures by doing the legwork (finding leads, setting up basic outreach, etc.).



Requirements:

Overlap: 2–3 hours of daily overlap with US [Your Timezone] for sync-ups.

Communication: Exceptional written English. You must be able to summarize complex info quickly.

Brainpower: You must be a "thinker." If I give you an objective, you design the path to get there.



How to Apply (The "Proof of Brain" Filter):

Generic applications will be deleted immediately. To apply:

1. The Intro: Tell me about the most complex "non-work" problem you solved for someone else recently.

2. The Test Case: If I asked you to "Find the best way to sell a used car in my local area," what are the first 3 things you would do?

3. The Commitment: Apply using exactly 12 AP points.

4. The Code Phrase: Put "Catalyst Found" in your subject line.

title: HR Generalist
description:
Position Overview



We are seeking an experienced HR Generalist with a strong healthcare background to support the full spectrum of Human Resources functions within a fast-growing healthcare organization.



The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience supporting healthcare teams such as providers, pharmacy staff, clinical support teams, and healthcare operations, while ensuring compliance with healthcare regulations, employment laws, and company policies.



This role will play a critical part in recruitment, employee relations, HR operations, performance management, and compliance while helping scale the organization’s workforce in a structured and compliant manner.



Key Responsibilities

1. Recruitment & Talent Acquisition

Manage the end-to-end recruitment process for healthcare roles including:

Pharmacists

Pharmacy Technicians

Nurses / Nurse Practitioners

Clinical staff

Healthcare administrative roles

Coordinate interviews with hiring managers and leadership teams.

Screen resumes and evaluate candidates with healthcare or clinical experience.

Support onboarding of new hires including documentation, compliance checks, and training coordination.



2. HR Operations & Administration

Maintain and update employee records, HRIS systems, and personnel files.

Assist in preparing offer letters, employment contracts, and onboarding documentation.

Ensure proper documentation for employee lifecycle management (hiring, promotion, termination, offboarding).

Track employee attendance, leaves, and HR compliance documentation.



3. Employee Relations

Act as a point of contact for employee concerns, HR inquiries, and workplace matters.

Support leadership in addressing employee performance issues, disciplinary actions, and conflict resolution.

Promote a positive workplace culture and employee engagement initiatives.



4. Compliance & Healthcare Regulations

Ensure compliance with healthcare industry regulations and labor laws.

Maintain knowledge of relevant compliance standards including:

HIPAA awareness

Healthcare employment regulations

Credential verification and licensing (if applicable)

Assist in HR audits and regulatory compliance checks.



5. Performance Management

Assist with performance review processes and KPI tracking.

Support managers in setting employee performance goals and improvement plans.

Help implement HR programs related to training, development, and career progression.



6. Training & Development

Coordinate employee onboarding and training programs.

Assist in developing training initiatives for healthcare teams.

Support learning and development initiatives aligned with organizational growth.



Qualifications

Education

Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Healthcare Administration, Business Administration, or related field.



Experience

3+ years of HR experience, preferably within a healthcare organization.

Experience supporting recruitment for healthcare or clinical roles.

Familiarity with healthcare operations, medical terminology, or clinical environments is highly preferred.



Skills

Strong knowledge of HR best practices and employment laws.

Experience with HRIS systems (Zoho People, BambooHR, Workday, etc.).

Strong organizational and documentation skills.

Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

Ability to handle confidential information with integrity and professionalism.



Preferred Qualifications

Experience working with pharmacy, medical device, telehealth, or healthcare service organizations.

Knowledge of credential verification and licensing requirements for healthcare professionals.

HR certification (SHRM-CP, PHR) is a plus.



What We Offer

Competitive salary

Career growth opportunities

Collaborative and mission-driven work environment

title: Senior AWS DevOps Engineer – AWS Cost Optimization & Kubernetes
description:
Job Description:

About the Role

We're a blockchain/DeFi company running production infrastructure that's bleeding money unnecessarily. Our AWS bill is sitting at $4,500/month – and we know it shouldn't be anywhere near that. We need someone who can come in, audit the whole setup, and actually fix it. Not just give us a report that sits in a folder.



We've already been through a few candidates who talked a big game but couldn't execute. We're done with that. If you're the type who needs handholding or can't work independently, this isn't for you.





What You'll Actually Do

- Audit our entire AWS infrastructure and identify exactly where we're wasting money (we expect significant savings)

- Optimize our Kubernetes clusters – right-size nodes, fix resource requests/limits, implement autoscaling that actually works

- Implement cost controls: Reserved Instances, Savings Plans, spot instances where appropriate, and cleanup of orphaned resources

- Set up monitoring and alerts so costs don't creep back up without us knowing

- Document everything you do so the team can maintain it





Hard Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

- 3+ years hands-on Kubernetes experience in production environments – EKS specifically preferred

- Deep AWS knowledge: EC2, EKS, RDS, S3, CloudWatch, Cost Explorer, Trusted Advisor

- Proven track record of actually reducing AWS costs (be ready to share numbers/percentages)

- Strong scripting skills (Python, Bash) for automation

- Infrastructure as Code: Terraform or CloudFormation (Terraform preferred)

- Self-starter who can take ownership and execute without constant oversight





!!!!CRITICAL: This Role Requires Surgical Precision

This is production infrastructure running live systems. Think of this like surgery – one wrong move can take everything down.

- NO cowboy moves. You don't delete, modify, or remove anything without a clear plan first.

- Every change must be planned out, documented, and confirmed with the CEO before execution.

- Extreme attention to detail. You double-check and triple-check before touching anything.

- If you're not 100% sure what something does, you ask first. You don't assume.

- Methodical execution only. We value careful and correct over fast and reckless.





Strong Plus

- Experience with blockchain/Web3 infrastructure

- Karpenter, Cluster Autoscaler, or KEDA experience

-  AWS certifications (Solutions Architect, DevOps Engineer)

- Experience with FinOps tools (Kubecost, CloudHealth, 
)





What We Need In Your Application

Don't send a generic application. We will ignore it. Include:

- Specific examples of AWS cost optimization you've done – what was the setup, what did you change, what % did you save?

- Your Kubernetes experience – cluster sizes you've managed, scaling strategies you've implemented

- Your availability and timezone (we need someone who can overlap with US business hours for some calls)





Compensation & Structure

- $20-25/hour based on experience and proven results

- 20 hours/week to start – potential for more hours for the right person

- Fully remote

- Initial project: Comprehensive audit + implementation plan with clear cost reduction targets





If you're someone who can actually deliver results and not just talk about them – we want to hear from you. Show us what you've done.

title: Amazon PPC Manager
description:
Urgent Hiring: Amazon PPC Manager

Reports To: CEO / Amazon Optimization Manager

Work Hours: Philippines Daytime Work Hours



ONLY APPLICANTS WHO WILL APPLY THROUGH THE LINK WILL BE ENTERTAINED.



Company Vision

We want to work with you to grow our company while helping you to become a superstar in your field. We value problem solvers, go-getters, and people with opinions who want to make an impact. You will be on the leading edge of Amazon and online strategies, continually improving your knowledge in the pursuit of helping us grow our business.



At the same time, you will be working with a company that values community & family—both internally and customer-facing. Our mission is to delight kids & parents with creative craft kits and related products. We are 100% focused on that mission and want you to be there on the ride with us!



That’s where you come in as our next Amazon PPC Manager.



Role Purpose

The Amazon PPC Manager owns the performance of all paid advertising on Amazon across our catalog. This person leads the strategy, execution, and optimization of all Sponsored Product, Sponsored Brand, and Sponsored Display campaigns to drive discoverability, revenue growth, and profitable scaling.



You will leverage Scale Insights daily—using advanced features like automation flows, keyword scoring, search term mining, and campaign-level rule logic—to drive high-impact decisions. Your ability to move beyond manual optimization and harness automation for scale is critical to success in this role.



What Success Looks Like

You consistently drive performance improvements using both manual and automated techniques, with Scale Insights as your core control panel. You own automation flows that intelligently adjust bids, pause underperforming targets, surface search term goldmines, and scale winners. You don’t just use Scale Insights—you master it.



You maintain a proactive and adaptive PPC strategy aligned with the catalog lifecycle, launch timing, and seasonality. Through frequent reporting, experimentation, and coordination with SEO, creative, and ops, you ensure campaigns support profitable, long-term growth.



Primary Objectives

Maximize profitable growth through advanced automation using Scale Insights

Own and optimize campaign architecture to drive ROI across all product stages

Partner cross-functionally for ad-aligned launches, creatives, and keyword strategy

Test, measure, and iterate to continuously improve CTR, CVR, and ROAS



Regular Work Activities

Monitor and refine SP/SB/SD campaigns daily through Scale Insights dashboards

Execute bid adjustments, search term mining, negative pruning

Build and optimize automation rules and flows in Scale Insights

Audit underperforming ad groups and apply automated corrective logic

Set up rule-based triggers for seasonal budget shifts and event-based bidding

Conduct A/B testing for headlines, images, placements

Weekly reporting with commentary using Scale Insights and custom dashboards

Work with SEO to align ad keyword targeting with organic ranking efforts

Collaborate with creative to ensure ad assets match campaign goals

Track budget utilization and reallocate funds based on real-time data

Maintain documentation and SOPs for all Scale Insights workflows

Guide PPC Assistants on implementing and QA’ing automation rules

Troubleshoot disapproved or underperforming ads

Flag inventory and pricing concerns affecting campaign viability

Maintain performance calendars for launches, promos, seasonality



Key Skills

Advanced knowledge of Scale Insights (automation, keyword scoring, flows)

Deep understanding of Amazon Ads (SP, SB, SD)

Strategic and analytical mindset with strong Excel/Google Sheets skills

Mastery in keyword match types, campaign structure, and budget management

Proven record of improving CTR, CVR, and ROAS

Excellent reporting and data storytelling skills

Detail-oriented with strong project tracking ability

Comfortable owning results, fixing issues, and moving fast

Strong communication across SEO, creative, and leadership teams

Passionate about learning and applying new ad techniques



People Contacts and Interactions

SEO Manager: Weekly coordination for keyword and ranking overlap

Creative Team: Weekly/as needed for ad assets, testing needs

Operations: Weekly or ad-hoc for stock, pricing, launch strategy

CEO / Leadership: Weekly/monthly reporting, performance reviews



Role Requirements

3+ years managing Amazon PPC campaigns

Experience using Scale Insights (must demonstrate real automation flow use cases, not just dashboards)

Proven success managing TACoS, ACOS, ROAS in high-SKU environments

Experience launching campaigns for new products and scaling mature ones

High proficiency in Excel or Google Sheets

Familiarity with keyword research, ranking tools, and performance reporting

Experience with automation strategy, not just manual optimization

Self-starter with high personal accountability and ownership

Bonus: Experience in creative ad testing and headline writing

title: Senior Full-Stack Developer (DeFi and NFT Projects)
description:
About Energi

Energi (NRG) is a scalable and secure blockchain ecosystem, designed to power the next generation of Web3 applications, DeFi protocols, and NFT marketplaces. Built on a robust Proof of Stake (PoS) infrastructure, Energi combines Ethereum compatibility, on-chain governance, a self-funding treasury, and a Layer 2 masternode network to drive innovation in decentralized technology.

Our remote-first team spans the Americas, Europe, Africa, Asia, and Oceania, working together to push the boundaries of blockchain scalability and security. With a growing network of global contributors, we are committed to building a blockchain that is not only secure but also developer-friendly and highly scalable.

Energi is engineered to support millions of users, making it an ideal platform for high-performance dApps, NFT marketplaces, and decentralized finance solutions. Our ecosystem is designed for fast, cost-effective transactions with a focus on long-term sustainability.

By fostering collaboration, innovation, and a forward-thinking culture, Energi is redefining the Web3 landscape. Explore our vision and mission at 
.





WHAT’S IN IT FOR YOU:

-Work flexible hours from anywhere as part of a globally distributed team driven by innovation and shared values.

-Directly shape the future of blockchain technology in NFT development.

-Enhance your skills and creativity with cutting-edge blockchain, smart contract, and Web3 technologies.

-Be part of an advanced blockchain ecosystem and contribute to building next-gen NFT platforms.

-Competitive pay structure in a 50/50 split of ETH and NRG tokens.



Front-End Role

JOB OVERVIEW:

We seek a Blockchain Full-Stack Engineer specializing in NFT platforms to drive the front-end development of our decentralized applications. You’ll create immersive Web3 experiences while integrating blockchain-based features like Metamask and smart contracts.



JOB RESPONSIBILITIES:

-Work closely with UX designers to create seamless NFT marketplaces and dApps.

-Develop interactive front-end features integrating Web3.js and smart contracts.

-Optimize UI performance and ensure mobile responsiveness.

-Maintain existing applications and introduce new blockchain features.



ESSENTIAL REQUIREMENTS:

-3+ years of experience in front-end development.

-Proficient in React, Gatsby, and Web3 frameworks.

-Experience integrating blockchain wallets like Metamask.

-Strong analytical skills and attention to detail.

-Fluent English communicator with a passion for blockchain.



NICE TO HAVE:

-Experience with Web3, Infura, and The Graph.

-Familiarity with NFT metadata standards and ERC-721/ERC-1155.

-SEO optimization skills.



Back-End Role

JOB OVERVIEW:

We’re looking for a Blockchain Full-Stack Engineer to build the backend for NFT applications. You’ll be responsible for designing, maintaining, and optimizing APIs that connect blockchain smart contracts with scalable Web3 applications.



JOB RESPONSIBILITIES:

-Develop secure APIs that interact with NFT smart contracts.

-Optimize backend infrastructure for high-traffic NFT transactions.

-Experience with blockchain data structures and decentralized storage.

-Passionate about blockchain innovation and fluent in English.



NICE TO HAVE:

-Knowledge of smart contract security best practices.

-Prior experience with NFT minting platforms.

-Remote work experience.



This role is not open to 3rd party organizations or agencies. Any candidates sent will be considered free of any charges



Energi is committed to creating a diverse environment and is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, pregnancy, disability, age, veteran status, or other characteristics.

title: Accounting Assistant
description:
Accounting Assistant

Reports to: Accounts and Operation



About Us

We are a multinational skin and hair care company headquartered in Sydney, Australia, supplying products to more than 20 countries—and expanding rapidly. We are a growing skincare company specialising in functional, science-driven skincare products promoted through dermatologists and skin clinics.



About the Role

We are looking for a detail-oriented and proactive Accounting Assistant to join our remote team. You will work closely with our Finance and Operations team, supporting day-to-day bookkeeping, data entry, sales reporting, and customer service tasks. This is an excellent opportunity for someone who enjoys working across multiple systems and wants to grow their skills in accounting and e-commerce operations.



Duties & Responsibilities



Bookkeeping & Accounts Payable

• Process supplier bills and invoices in Reckon

• Create and maintain due date payment schedules

• Set up and process payments via CommBiz and credit cards

• Reconcile multiple bank and payment accounts including CBA (AUD/USD), PayPal (AUD/USD), Amazon (AUD/USD), Afterpay, MyDeal, Shopify, World First, and others

• Assist with BAS preparation for multiple entities

• Reconcile Profit & Loss and Balance Sheet statements



Payroll

• Process payroll for Australian and Philippines-based staff

• Manage superannuation payments and STP lodgments

• Prepare and distribute payslips

• Process international payments via Wise



Ostendo & Order Management

• Set up new customers and enter Shopify, Amazon, and distributor orders into Ostendo

• Verify invoices for correct GST treatment (GST, GST-free, or export)

• Enter and process accounts payable for supplier bills

• Generate reports and data extracts from Ostendo as required



Sales & Distribution Reporting

• Compile and maintain distributor sales reports

• Prepare stock and sales reports for management review

• Support the sales team with data analysis and ad hoc reporting



Customer Service & Administration

• Handle customer enquiries via Amazon and direct channels

• Coordinate courier bookings for documents and product samples to international destinations

• Carry out various administrative and ad hoc tasks as assigned



Required Skills & Abilities

• Strong bookkeeping and data entry skills with high attention to detail

• Proficiency in accounting software (Reckon, MYOB, or similar)

• Experience reconciling multiple bank accounts and payment platforms

• Solid understanding of GST, payroll processes, and BAS requirements

• Comfortable working with spreadsheets and generating reports

• Clear written communication skills in English for customer-facing tasks

• Ability to manage multiple tasks and meet deadlines independently



Preferred Qualifications

• Experience with Ostendo ERP system and Xero

• Background in e-commerce account management (Amazon, Shopify, or similar platforms)

• Familiarity with Australian payroll legislation and STP reporting

• Experience working with international payments (Wise, PayPal, World First)

• Prior experience in a similar remote role supporting an Australian business



Candidate Criteria

• Full-time (40 hours/week), remote.

• Must be able to work AEST office hours.

• Minimum 3 years of relevant experience similar accounts or bookkeeping role in Australian business.

• Highly organised, self-driven, and effective in a remote-working environment.

• Ability to work effectively across multiple time zones, collaborating with global stakeholders, partners, and teams.



How to Apply



To apply, please send the following, PLEASE FOLLOW:



• Your updated RESUME/CV LINK

• A brief cover letter explaining your experience with bookkeeping, customer service and any accounting software you have used

• Your availability to join the company



We look forward to hearing from you!
