title: WE'RE HIRING: RECORDS REVIEWER (PART-TIME)
description:
We are seeking a part?time Medical Records Reviewer to assist Qualified Medical Evaluators (QMEs) by preparing organized, accurate, and concise summaries of patient medical records. This role is critical in ensuring physicians can efficiently understand patient histories, diagnoses, and treatments without reviewing each original page.



Location: Remote

Schedule: Part?Time, flexible hours (must meet assigned deadlines)

Compensation: Per?page rate (to be discussed during application)



Responsibilities

• Review medical records and extract key information such as dates of service, diagnoses, treatments, and work status.

• Build and maintain an index of reports while reviewing.

• Reorder reports chronologically to create a clear medical timeline.

• Prepare concise summaries of medical history, disability status, and work restrictions.

• Ensure accuracy, consistency, and compliance with formatting guidelines.

• Submit completed summaries via Google Docs for QA review.



Qualifications

• Strong attention to detail and organizational skills.

• Ability to follow structured templates and SOPs consistently.

• Prior experience in medical records review, billing, or administrative support preferred but not required.

• Proficiency with Google Docs and a reliable internet connection.

• Self?motivated and able to meet deadlines independently.



Why This Role Matters

Accurate and well?organized summaries reduce physician review time, minimize errors, and support better medical?legal decision?making. Your work will directly contribute to the efficiency and quality of QME evaluations.



To Apply:

Please submit your updated resume/CV (Google Drive link set to “Anyone with the link can view”) along with a brief note on your background and interest in medical record review.

title: Assistant Account Manager
description:
The Assistant Account Manager supports the Employee Benefits team in servicing employer clients and maintaining group benefit programs, including medical, dental, vision, life, and disability insurance plans. This role assists Account Managers with the renewal process, market research, client communications, and administrative coordination to ensure clients receive timely and accurate service.



The position is designed to help the agency effectively manage a high volume of small and medium-sized employer groups. The ideal candidate is organized, detail-oriented, and able to follow established procedures while also demonstrating initiative and strong problem-solving skills.



Key Responsibilities

The Assistant Account Manager supports Account Managers in servicing employer clients by coordinating aspects of the annual renewal process, gathering information from insurance carriers, and organizing plan documentation. This role assists with preparing and distributing Requests for Proposals (RFPs) to insurance carriers and collecting proposals from the marketplace.



The position also involves developing benefit comparison spreadsheets using Microsoft Excel and assisting with the analysis of plan options and costs. The Assistant Account Manager helps prepare employee benefit communication materials such as open enrollment guides, benefit summaries, and other educational resources for employees.



The role requires regular use of technology platforms, including benefit administration systems such as Employee Navigator and CRM systems used to manage client workflows, tasks, and documentation.



Qualifications

Candidates should have a bachelor’s degree in business, finance, human resources, or a related field, or equivalent professional experience. One to three years of administrative, insurance, or client service experience is preferred. Strong proficiency in Microsoft Excel, Word, and Outlook is required.



Successful candidates will have strong organizational and communication skills, excellent attention to detail, and the ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment. Experience in an employee benefits brokerage or familiarity with group health insurance and benefit administration platforms is a plus.

Easy to train, open to feedback, and a team player

Highly detail-oriented and organized

Ability to follow system architecture and maintain clean builds

Bonus Skills (Big Plus)

Experience setting up AI agents inside GoHighLevel

Experience with complex workflow logic and conditional automation

Experience working with multi-account CRM environments

Work Requirements

Must be available Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Central Time

Must work from a quiet environment

Must have stable high-speed internet and a backup internet

Able to communicate clearly with the team during working hours

What We’re Looking For

We’re looking for someone who can add real value to the CRM team. Someone who doesn’t just follow steps but understands how systems work and can contribute in building reliable automation at scale. 



To be considered for this role, please record a 3–5 minute Loom video answering the questions below: 

1. A client says their lead received the same SMS twice. What steps would you take to investigate and fix the issue?

2. What steps would you take to ensure that a GoHighLevel snapshot deploys cleanly into a new account without causing workflow conflicts or automation issues?



Next Steps:  After we review your responses, we will invite you to a Zoo
eting for an interview.

title: Virtual Acquisitions Representative Real Estate
description:
We’re looking for a highly resourceful, full-time Acquisitions Rep to join our growing real estate investment business. This role is focused on a unique opportunity in the partial deed space, helping families solve title issues and unlock value in properties others can't.



What You’ll Be Doing:

This isn’t your average acquisitions job. Your day will be a mix of:



50% Research:



Reading documents, obituaries, court records, tax sites, and skip-tracing results



Identifying the right next of kin, family members, or decision makers



Collaborating with our in-house research team to verify information



50% Outreach & Sales:



Calling and texting dozens of leads daily



Leaving professional voi
s (you’ll do this a lot)



Following up with family members and decision-makers



Explaining how we can help, answering questions, and building trust



Updating our CRM and coordinating with the team



What You Need:



Excellent spoken and written English (C1/C2 level only)



High comfort level calling strangers and asking questions



Common sense and a sharp instinct for who the right person is to speak to



Strong internet connection, quiet work setup, and good headset



Ability to research names, documents, and property data online



Comfortable using tools like CRMs, Google, and
 daily



Available full-time, Monday–Friday, with flexibility for follow-ups



Bonus If You Have:



Experience in probate, title, real estate, or acquisitions



Past success in sales or outbound calling



Familiarity with U.S. counties, title chains, or family tree research



What You Get:



Base salary (commensurate with experience) + commission on deals closed



Full training and support from our experienced team



Work with a well-established U.S. real estate group (11+ years in business)



Full-time remote position – open to any country, as long as your English is excellent



Room to grow into a leadership or closer role over time



To Apply:

Send us a short message explaining:



Your experience with research or calling strangers



Why you’d be great at finding the right family member to speak with



Where you're located and your availability



Looking forward to connecting with motivated, sharp, and thoughtful team members who want to grow in this unique real estate niche.

title: Creative Marketing Assistant (Ads, Content & Customer Support)
description:
About the Role



We are a bathroom renovation company based in Scotland and we are hiring a full-time marketing assistant to help us grow. This is not a narrow specialist role. We need someone who takes ownership across advertising, content creation, and customer communication and who is always thinking about how to get us more leads.

You do not need years of experience, but you must be a fast learner, self-motivated, and genuinely interested in helping a business grow. If you do good work, this is a long-term role with bonuses tied to results.



--What You Will Be Doing

Generating and following up leads is the core of this job. That means:



Running and improving our Meta and Google Ads to bring in more enquiries

Creating ad creatives - videos, images, and hooks and constantly testing what works

Posting content on social media that showcases our bathroom projects and builds trust

Contacting new leads quickly and professionally through our CRM

Replying to customer messages and helping book appointments

Editing short videos using CapCut or similar tools

Assisting with website updates and general business support



--What We Are Looking For



Someone who takes initiative and does not need to be chased

Comfortable creating content and communicating with customers in English

Tech-savvy and quick to learn new tools

Organised, reliable, and detail-oriented

Experience with Canva, CapCut, Meta Ads, Google Ads, or CRM systems is a bonus but not required



--Work Schedule

Monday to Saturday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM GMT (UK time)



--Salary

Competitive based on experience, paid monthly. Performance bonuses available based on business results.



--How to Apply

Send a message and include all of the following - applications missing any of these will not be considered:



Your expected monthly salary

Your English proficiency level

Examples of content, ads, or marketing work you have done

Dream holiday destination

Confirmation you can work Monday to Saturday, 9–5 GMT

title: CONTENT RESEARCH EXPERT (CRE): $800 a month
description:
BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 7.5 hours/day

- Schedule: Monday to Friday, flexible time

- Salary: $800 a month

- Paid every two weeks via Wise. (direct to your bank account, almost no fees, no waiting for payday!)

- Full work-from-home flexibility

- A young, supportive team that values your output without micromanagement

- Clear growth path with opportunities to expand your role

- Join our international team working with established content creators and brands

- Work with the latest AI tools and social media platforms



TASKS



TASK #1: Research and Curate Viral Content



- Research 30-50 viral short-form videos on Instagram Reels and TikTok

- Strategically select content ideas that will help specific clients go viral

- Organize all content ideas in the "Client Master Sheet"

- Copy/paste links to each content piece

- Write out the hook of each content piece

- Categorize content (Hero Story, Educational, Entertaining, Promotional)

- Add precise video instructions on how each piece can be replicated



TASK #2: Provide Strategic Content Direction



- Analyze client information (niche, target audience, personality, content style)

- Identify and recommend 3 inspirational accounts for clients to follow in their niche

- Create detailed instructions for content replication tailored to the client's abilities

- Think strategically about what will help each client succeed



TASK #3: Administrative Responsibilities



- Maintain a content library categorized by niche for efficient future use

- Complete daily End-of-Day Reports (EOD)

- Attend multiple meetings with your manager each week

- Continuously improve content recommendations based on what works



REQUIREMENTS



- Excellent English skills (C1 or above - non-negotiable!)

- Previous experience in content creation is a MUST

- Experience in content research and trend analysis

- Strong understanding of what makes content go viral

- Knowledge of Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts features

- Strategic thinking and attention to detail

- Ability to provide clear, actionable instructions

- Reliable internet connection and professional home office setup

- 100% say-do ratio and commitment to deadlines



HOW TO APPLY



ROUND 1: Complete our application form and record a personal introduction:



Fill out the form: 
/to/QRoz4WLV



Note: Put "CRE" + [Your Name & Family Name] in the "Name" field in the form.



Record a 3-minute Loom video introducing yourself (instructions in form)



Important: Please provide genuine, personal responses (no AI-written answers). We want to get to know YOU!



ROUND 2: Qualified candidates will be invited for an interview.



MORE ABOUT US



We've been in the industry since 2019 and have worked with over 3000 clients. We currently receive around 80-100 new clients per month. We provide an "80% done-for-you content & monetization system" that helps creators go viral and turn views into income using short-form content, AI, and proven strategies.



MORE ABOUT US



- About Young Publisher: 



P.S. Young Publisher is the recruitment company. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Client Coach (Giving Feedback): $1,100 USD START RATE
description:
Start rate: $935 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,100 a month)



Paid every two weeks via Wise.



ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company working with content creators and online brands.



BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 8 hours daily, Monday-Friday; 40 hours a week

- Flexible schedule: Choose your own hours, as long as you show up for the daily meeting (MANDATORY)

- Stable income: Long-term role with regular, on-time payments

- Supportive team: Collaborative environment without micromanagement

- Growth path: Opportunities to increase responsibilities and earnings

- 100% remote: Work-from-home setup



TASKS



Client Support (maintaining 40-50 total clients):



- Run kickoff calls with new clients using our proven script

- Review client content and give actionable feedback

- Answer client messages within 24 hours

- Host weekly group calls and 1-on-1 coaching sessions

- Help clients overcome content blocks and limiting beliefs



Progress Tracking:



- Update daily/weekly reports

- Track client progress and next steps

- Join daily team check-ins

- Ensure clients follow strategies consistently



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)



- C1+ English (written and spoken) with no accent

- Strong communication skills

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable internet and a quiet workspace

- Accountability mindset and deadline commitment



IMPORTANT



When recording a Loom video as part of your application:



- Camera must show your FACE & SCREEN

- Treat it as a LIVE interview with the Hiring Manager

- Have a professional background

- Have clear audio

- Wear business-casual attire



BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED)



- Content creation and social media experience

- Knowledge of Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts

- Regular usage of AI tools (ChatGPT, CapCut)



WHY JOIN US?



- Start rate: $935 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,100 a month)

Note: More experienced CSMs earn between $1,800 and $2,500 after 6-12 months.

- Performance bonuses: Up to $900+ additional monthly based on:

- Client retention rates

- Task completion metrics

- Quality of feedback

- Team collaboration

- Payments: Twice per month via Wise directly to your bank

- Tools access: We'll cover all the needed tools

- Work-life balance: No graveyard shifts

- Professional growth: Regular feedback and skill development



HOW TO APPLY



1: Message us on OnlineJobs.ph with "CSM" as the message title



2: Include ONLY the following in your message:



#1: Your CV.

#2: Your years of experience with short-form content.

#3: Your years of experience with client management.

#4: One sentence on why you're a good fit for this role.

#5: Your portfolio.



Note: Messages that do not follow this format will NOT be reviewed.



P.S. Young Publisher is the recruitment company. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Part-Time Long-Term Social Media Assistant (Travel Blog)
description:
Hi! I’m a travel blogger looking for a reliable, long-term Filipino team member to help me grow my brand on Instagram, YouTube, Pinterest, and my blog.



I value loyalty, clear communication, and long-term working relationships. I’m not looking for someone short-term, I’m looking for someone who wants stable work and to grow together over time.



Hours & Salary

Starting Phase:

- 10 hrs/week (can be 2hrs/day, 5x/week, I'm flexible with how you want to spread your hours) 

- $120/month



After Training & Once Systems Are Smooth:

- 15 hrs/week (can be 3hrs/day, 5x/week, I'm flexible with how you want to spread your hours) 

- $200/month



If we're a fantastic fit: 

- 20 hrs/week (can be 4hrs/day, 5x/week, I'm flexible)

- $320/month 



Salary increases as responsibilities grow and performance improves. I reward consistency and reliability.



Main Responsibilities

 Video Editing (CapCut Pro – provided)

- Edit Instagram Reels using my voiceovers and footage

- Edit YouTube videos (mostly short-form)

- Add captions + music + fast cuts at different moments of the video

- Make content engaging and clean (I don't need fancy transitions or special effects)



 Instagram Support

- Create simple static posts (no heavy design, templates provided)

- Write captions

- Help improve engagement

- Understand what works for travel/blogger accounts



 Pinterest Management

- Upload and optimize video pins

- Create simple static pins

- Write SEO-friendly titles & descriptions (I don't mind you using ChatGPT, but please proof read everything!) 

- Help drive traffic to the blog



(Experience with Pinterest marketing for bloggers is a big plus.)



 Blog Support (Occasional)

- Add/update affiliate links

- Update older blog posts

- Improve key sections



 Growth Support (Bonus)

- Experience growing Instagram, Pinterest, or YouTube

- Experience with sponsorship outreach is a plus



I’m Looking For Someone Who:

- Is reliable and meets deadlines

- Communicates clearly

- Takes initiative (doesn’t wait to be told every small step)

- Has experience with CapCut

- Understands social media trends

- Wants stable, long-term income

- Is honest and professional



If you have worked with bloggers before — that is a strong advantage.

Also if you have any knowledge of Las Vegas and you're interested in learning more about the city by working on my blog with me, that's also a bonus because I talk about the destination a lot! 



 SHORT SKILLS TEST (IMPORTANT)

To make sure applicants carefully read this post, please include the word:

“SUNSET”

at the top of your application.



Then please share 1–2 sample video edits (Google Drive or Loom link), and examples of client accounts you've helped grow. 



Applications without the keyword will not be reviewed.



4 Personality Filter Question (Very Important)



Imagine I give you a task and the instructions are not 100% clear. What would you do?

A) Wait for clearer instructions before starting

 B) Do your best guess and submit it

 C) Ask clarifying questions first, then proceed

 D) Something else 

Also briefly describe your working style in 3 words.



30-Day Trial Plan

To make sure this is a good fit for both of us, we’ll follow this structure:



Week 1: Training & Systems

Learn my brand voice

Learn my editing style

Edit 3–5 short-form videos

Upload 5–10 Pinterest pins

Light blog update task



Goal: Understand workflow and communication.



Week 2: Independent Execution

Edit 5–8 videos

Create 10–15 Pinterest pins

Draft captions independently

Suggest 2 content improvement ideas



Goal: Show initiative and attention to detail.



Week 3: Optimization

Improve editing speed

Suggest 1 Pinterest growth idea

Assist with updating 3 blog posts

Begin tracking simple metrics (views, saves, clicks)



Goal: Start thinking strategically.



Week 4: Review & Expansion Plan

Performance review

Discuss increasing hours to 5/day

Clarify long-term role growth





I treat my team with respect and clear expectations. If you are hardworking and loyal, I will take care of you long-term.

I’m excited to find the right person to grow this brand together!

title: Klaviyo Email & SMS Virtual Assistant (Part-Time | Remote)
description:
We are looking for a Klaviyo
 & SMS Virtual Assistant to support our ongoing
 and SMS marketing efforts. This role is ideal for someone who already has hands-on experience with Klaviyo, is detail-oriented, reliable, and has strong work ethics.

 & SMS Execution (Klaviyo)

s and SMS (links, formatting, timing, spelling)

at least 3 years Hands-on experience using Klaviyo

Compensation

s/flows you’ve worked on

title: Paralegal/Legal Virtual Assistant
description:
We are a Trusts & Estates Law Firm in Brooklyn, New York (EST). We are looking for Legal Virtual Assistant to support our amazing all-woman team.



Responsibilities will include:

-Preparation of legal documents using Microsoft Word legal document templates and via Lawcus CRM

-Proofreading of legal documents for spelling, formatting and accuracy

-Managing scanned files and uploading to correct location in Microsoft OneDrive

-Managing client
s, drafting responses and responding to simple
s such as scheduling or confirming receipt

-Managing client pipeline in CRM, creating follow-up tasks and adding updates throughout pipeline

-Clean-up of client database, entering Client information and archiving old matters

-May include Personal Assistant responsibilities, such as making personal appointments, managing personal calendar, responding to
s, payment of personal bills and filing health insurance claims

 

Qualifications:

-Available online from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM EST, with a 30-minute unpaid lunch break

-Must have a legal background and/or prior experience as a Legal Virtual Assistant (experience in Trusts and Estates Law is highly preferred)

-Demonstrate excellent written and verbal communication skills

-Must exhibit strong attention to detail

-Show a commitment to long-term, full-time employment

-Have experience using CRM systems

-Be proficient with Microsoft Office, Outlook 365, OneDrive, and the like

-Demonstrate strong organizational skills, positive attitude, and solid work ethic, with proactive approach to getting things done

-Open to training and coachable

-Must have your own laptop or desktop computer with a reliable internet connection (Windows/PC Preferred)

-Must be open to a 1-week paid trial/training leading to a full-time role

-Must have a personal Wise account ready.



How to Apply:

To apply, please send your resume and a brief cover letter to 
 and cc: 
 the subject line of your
, please include your first and last name and the zip code of our office. As part of your cover letter, include 2-3 sentences about one aspect of our company that stood out to you during your research. Please also attach to your application the Petition for Ancillary Probate PDF form for the state of New York. 



Optional but recommended: we also request 1-2 references that can speak to your abilities and experience, specifically regarding the Requirements listed above.

title: E-commerce Operations Manager
description:
We’re looking for a highly organized and proactive Operations Manager to help keep our growing e-commerce business running efficiently. You’ll work closely with the COO and CEOs to ensure projects, teams, and daily operations run smoothly, allowing leadership to focus on growth and strategy.



What You’ll Do



-Support the COO and CEOs in day-to-day operations

-Oversee scheduling, task tracking, and project timelines

-Coordinate between teams (Customer Service, Creative, Product) to maintain smooth workflows

-Handle basic reporting and prepare concise summaries for management

-Identify process gaps and suggest practical improvements

-Ensure SOPs and checklists are followed consistently

-Take ownership of recurring operational and administrative tasks



What We’re Looking For



-1–3 years of experience in operations, project management, or a related role (preferably in e-commerce or remote teams)

-Strong organizational and communication skills

-Proficient with Google Workspace, Notion, and ClickUp

-Able to manage multiple priorities with strong attention to detail

-Proactive, reliable, and takes full ownership of responsibilities

-Experience handling Shopify or online stores, and basic finance tracking (e.g., expense tracking, invoicing, or reporting) (Not Required)



Compensation Package



- $1500-$2000 Monthly Retainer

- Full-time or long-term contract

- Flexible Working Schedule



If you’re someone who loves keeping operations organized, improving systems, and ensuring everything runs like clockwork... we’d love to meet you. To apply, fill-out this application form: 



Note: only those who submitted the application form will be included in our screening process

title: Photoshop Compositor / Retoucher / Designer
description:
Location: Remote (Full-Time)



Flybar is looking for a talented Photoshop Compositor/Retoucher to join our creative team full-time. The role involves creating high-quality product images, composites, and marketing visuals that align with our brand standards.



Responsibilities:



Retouch and enhance product photos for packaging, e-commerce, and marketing.

title: Executive Assistant (Client & Sales Operations Support)
description:
ABOUT US



Engage Studio is a fast-growing custom jewelry company based in Toronto, Canada. We specialize in designing meaningful engagement rings and custom jewelry that mark some of the most important 
nts in our clients’ lives.



Unlike traditional jewelry stores, our process is a guided journey. We collaborate closely with each client to design a ring that reflects their story.



Our team works with clients both in-person in our Toronto showroom and virtually with clients worldwide.



We are building a world-class support team in the Philippines and are looking for highly capable Executive Assistants who want a long-term career with a growing international company.

 



WHO THIS ROLE IS FOR



This role is perfect for someone who:

• Loves being organized and in control of details

• Enjoys helping others perform at their best

• Takes pride in anticipating problems before they happen

• Is comfortable communicating with clients from North America

• Wants to grow long-term with a company



You will work closely with a Founder or Sales Consultant, helping them stay organized, prepared, and responsive to clients.

Your work directly helps couples design the ring they will wear for the rest of their lives.



This is not just an admin job — it is a role where you help coordinate client experiences and ensure everything runs smoothly.

 



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



• Your consultant/founder can focus on clients because you have everything organized and under control.

• Client meetings are fully prepared in advance.

• Client questions are answered quickly and professionally.

• Orders stay on schedule because you are tracking all milestones.

• Clients feel cared for because communication is clear and timely.

 



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES



1. Executive Support



You will manage and organize your consultant’s communications and schedule.



Responsibilities include:



• Organizing
 inboxes and identifying priority messages

• Responding to routine
s on behalf of your consultant

• Monitoring internal communication channels (Slack, WhatsApp,
)

• Managing calendars and scheduling meetings

• Ensuring all materials needed for meetings are prepared in advance



Examples of preparation may include:



• Ensure design milestones are done correctly and on time (CAD design renders, sketches or concept images, prototype models)

• Client notes and preferences are accurately written up on their profile report

• Shipment status monitoring and following up on delays



Your goal is to ensure every meeting runs smoothly and your consultant is always prepared.

 

2. Client Communication



Our clients are going through a life-changing event — engagement and marriage — and expect thoughtful communication.



You will help maintain strong relationships with clients.



Responsibilities include:



• Responding to client inquiries promptly (target: within 3 business hours)

• Providing order status updates during the design and production process

• Following up with prospective clients who requested quotes

• Supporting post-purchase communication and relationship building

• Helping resolve client concerns by coordinating internally



Strong emotional intelligence and communication skills are critical.

 

3. Order Coordination



Custom jewelry orders involve multiple steps and teams.



You will help track the progress of orders to ensure they stay on schedule.



Responsibilities include:



• Tracking orders and milestones using internal systems

• Participating in coordination meetings with our Production team

• Monitoring key stages such as sketches, CAD renders, resin models, and final production

• Escalating issues early if an order risks falling behind schedule

• Taking detailed notes during client meetings and sending instructions to the Production team



Your role ensures that nothing falls through the cracks.

 

4. Sales Support



You will assist the consultant in maintaining strong relationships with prospective clients.



Responsibilities include:



• Preparing and sending quotes to prospective clients

• Following up with clients who are considering a purchase

• Organizing client information and communications

• Supporting the consultant with administrative tasks that help close sales

 



REQUIREMENTS



• Minimum 2+ years experience as an Executive Assistant or Personal Assistant

• Excellent written and spoken English communication skills

• Comfortable communicating via Zoom,
, phone, and messaging platforms

• High attention to detail when handling specifications and documentation

• Strong organizational and time management skills

• High emotional intelligence when communicating with clients

 

Working Hours



You must be able to work within our business hours:



Eastern Standard Time 



Monday – Friday

9:30 AM – 8:00 PM EST



Saturday

8:30 AM – 5:00 PM EST

**Typical schedule is 40 hours per week within these operating hours.

 



COMPENSATION AND BENEFITS



• Salary: 50,000 to 70,000php per month (based on experience/competence)

• 13th month pay (pro-rated based on start date)

• SSS and PhilHealth contributions

• Internet reimbursement

• Performance bonuses

• Company profit-share participation





HOW TO APPLY



• Include the line 'Embrace the Adventure' in the subject line. Applications without this will not be considered.

• Record and share a 2 to 3 minute video of yourself answering the following questions and share it (Google Drive, Loom, Youtube unlisted)



1)A client
s saying they are worried because they haven’t heard an update on their ring for two weeks. How would you respond to them?



2)Tell us about a time you caught a mistake before it became a problem for your manager or team.



3)Why do you think you would succeed in a role that requires extreme attention to detail?

 



WHY JOIN OUR TEAM



We are building a long-term international team, and we invest heavily in training and growth.



Our tea
mbers value:



• A supportive team culture

• Clear systems and training

• Long-term career opportunities

• Professional development



As our company grows, we promote from within whenever possible.

title: Senior Graphic Designer
description:
The Role

We’re looking for a Senior Graphic Designer with a strong European design sensibility—refined typography, strong grid systems, and modern minimalism. You’ll work across three core design pillars while owning projects end-to-end, from concept to final production, ensuring consistency and excellence across all brand touchpoints.



Design Pillars

- Product Design – Designing user-friendly, visually consistent product experiences

- Print / Magazine / Advertising – Editorial layouts, advertising materials, and high-quality print-ready assets

- Commercial Materials – Banners, social media posts, newsletters, roll-ups, and sales materials



What You’ll Do

- Lead design work across product, print, and commercial materials

- Take full ownership of design projects from concept to execution

- Translate performance and marketing insights into creative improvements

- Maintain, document, and evolve brand systems with consistency

- Ensure all assets meet high production and quality standards

- Collaborate closely with copy, media buying, and growth teams

- Mentor junior designers and provide clear, constructive feedback



What We’re Looking For

- 5+ years of professional graphic design experience

- Strong portfolio showcasing European-style design (typography, grids, minimal aesthetics)

- Mastery of Adobe Creative Suite and Figma

- Experience working on both digital and print outputs

- Excellent eye for layout, typography, spacing, and visual hierarchy



Nice-to-Haves

- Motion design skills (After Effects, basic animation)

- Experience adapting European design styles for SEA audiences

- Knowledge of responsive and web layout design

title: Graphic Designer
description:
Graphic Designer | Job Description



Location: Remote (Philippines)



This is a 100% remote role, offered on a contractor basis. You will work from home, with in-person tea
etups twice a year for collaboration and celebrations. You should be reasonably accessible to Manila for these meetups. You will join a growing and embedded Philippines-based team that plays an important role in the continued expansion of the business.



About Kitto



Kitto is a specialist marketing agency working exclusively within the recruitment industry. We partner with recruitment businesses around the world to help them stand out through strategic, creative marketing. Our services include branding, design, video production, animation, and copywriting.



We operate as a fully remote global team, collaborating across time zones to deliver high-quality creative solutions.



The Role

- We are looking for an experienced Graphic Designer to join our growing creative team.

- You will play a key role in delivering high-quality visual assets across a wide range of client projects, supporting recruitment brands at different stages of growth.



This role suits someone who:

- Is confident working across multiple formats

- Can manage several design tasks at once

- Communicates clearly with account managers and other creatives

- Has strong creative judgement and takes pride in producing thoughtful, considered work

- We are not looking for generic, templated design output. We want someone with a strong eye, clear creative opinions, awareness of trends, and evidence of this in their portfolio.



Key Responsibilities



Design & Creative Delivery

- Create high-quality visual assets across print and digital channels, including social media, presentations, brochures, and branded documents

- Design logos and visual identities in line with client briefs and brand guidelines

- Produce assets for both organic and campaign-based marketing activity

- Ensure all creative work meets brand, quality, and accessibility standards



Collaboration & Communication

- Work closely with account managers and the creative team to understand briefs, objectives, and timelines

- Clearly communicate design concepts and rationale to internal stakeholders

- Participate in feedback and iteration cycles, refining designs based on client and internal input



Brand & Quality Control

- Maintain consistency across all client brand touchpoints

- Apply strong design thinking to solve visual communication challenges

- Manage multiple projects simultaneously, prioritising workloads effectively and flagging capacity issues when required



Core Design Capabilities (Required)



Applicants must be confident creating:

- Social media assets for multiple platforms (including LinkedIn)

- Brochures and professionally designed documents

- A wide range of print and digital assets (e.g. event banners, business cards,
 signatures)

- Microsoft PowerPoint presentations for design use

- Logos and visual identity elements



Additional Experience (Desirable)



Experience in the following areas would be an advantage, but is not required:

- Animation and/or 3D animation

- Photo editing (e.g. headshots, office photography)

- Video editing (e.g. podcasts, social media clips)

- Generative AI tools for image and asset creation

- Newsletters and landing pages

- Brand design and development



If you are developing skills in any of the above, we welcome examples of self-led learning or practical application.



Tools & Platforms



Required

- Adobe Creative Suite (particularly Illustrator, Photoshop, and InDesign)

- Canva

- Microsoft 365 (particularly Word and PowerPoint)



Desirable

- Adobe Premiere Pro

- Adobe After Effects



Skills & Attributes



Required

- Strong understanding of typography, colour theory, layout, and composition

- Strong written and spoken English, demonstrated through qualifications or professional experience

- Clear and confident communication skills

- Excellent time management and organisational ability

- Ability to work in a fast-paced agency environment with multiple concurrent briefs

- Confidence explaining and justifying design decisions to non-design stakeholders



Desirable

- A strong point of view on design and creative direction

- Awareness of current design trends and the ability to apply them appropriately

- Curiosity about new tools and technologies, including generative AI

- Evidence of continued professional development



Experience & Qualifications

- 3–5 years of professional design experience and/or a relevant university degree

- A strong portfolio demonstrating a range of design work is essential. Your portfolio should demonstrate more than basic layout work. We are looking for evidence of concept development, visual judgement, and considered design thinking.



Personality & Fit



We are looking for someone who is:

- Collaborative and team-oriented

- Confident but not ego-driven

- Trustworthy and dependable

- Proactive in communicating workload and challenges

- Motivated to grow with the business as we continue to expand



This is an opportunity to become part of a growing Philippines-based function that is increasingly central to the success of the wider agency.



What We Offer

- Fully remote working

- Structured contractor engagement with paid public holidays, annual leave, and sick leave entitlement

- A collaborative and supportive team environment

- Exposure to a wide variety of global recruitment brands

- Opportunities to develop skills across branding, campaigns, and emerging tools

- Twice-yearly in-person tea
etups

- Mentoring and professional support



Kitto is committed to maintaining fair and transparent holiday and sickness policies that support work/life balance and wellbeing across our global team.

title: Amazon PPC Specialist
description:
About the Role

We are looking for an experienced Amazon PPC Specialist to manage and scale advertising efforts for launch and growth-stage products in the Amazon marketplace.



This role requires strong ownership, analytical thinking, and hands-on PPC experience. You will oversee products end-to-end from pre-launch research to PPC optimization, while supporting daily operations and contributing to team growth.



Note: Completion of a sample task is required. Only applicants who complete the task will be shortlisted.



Responsibilities

• Manage new product launches from market, keyword, and competitor research to PPC execution.

• Build, optimize, and scale Amazon PPC campaigns (SP, SB, SD).

• Optimize budgets and bids to improve ACOS, TACOS, and overall profitability.

• Support organic keyword ranking growth through strategic PPC and sales velocity.

• Improve conversion rate (CVR) by identifying opportunities across ads, keywords, and listings.

• Identify gaps and optimization opportunities within existing marketing and PPC strategies.

• Monitor Amazon US marketplace performance, including keyword movement and competitor activity.

• Prepare performance reports and insights for internal stakeholders.

• Support internal PPC processes, documentation, and operational improvements.



Requirements

• Proven experience managing Amazon PPC campaigns

• Strong ownership mindset and accountability

• Logical, data-driven thinking

• High proficiency in Excel and Google Sheets (formulas, analysis, reporting)

• Good understanding of marketing funnels and buyer intent

• Comfortable analyzing performance data and trends

• Highly organized, self-motivated, and detail-oriented

• Excellent communication and collaboration skills

• Tools experience:

• Amazon Seller Central & Advertising Console

• Helium 10

• Data Dive

• Pacvue or similar PPC management tools

• Google Sheets / Excel

• No moonlighting during work hours



HOW TO APPLY:

To apply, simply message us.

title: Full-Stack Developer (SaaS Web Application)
description:
Full-Stack Developer (Next.js, Supabase, AWS) 



We are looking for a highly skilled front-end and back-end developer experienced with Next.js, Supabase, and AWS to accelerate the development of our SaaS application. We have developer-ready Figma files and have already made solid progress on the build.



About the Role



We have a partially completed SaaS application with:

Several functional screens already built in Next.js

Initial backend structure in Node.js

Early database + auth setup in Supabase

Full high-fidelity Figma designs ready for execution



We now need a developer who can step in immediately, understand the current codebase, and continue the build efficiently and reliably.



To ensure fast progress and tight communication loops, you must:

Be available during Australian business hours (9am–5pm AEST/AEDT)

Respond promptly and consistently during those hours

Attend scheduled meetings

Provide daily progress updates and clear milestone visibility



Key Responsibilities

Continue building the frontend using Next.js, exactly following the Figma design system

Build and expand backend logic using Node.js (Express/NestJS)

Manage and integrate Supabase/AWS auth, database, and storage

Complete API integrations and connect multiple systems together

Work within the existing architecture without unnecessary rewrites

Build reusable UI components (not one-off pages)

Implement proper error handling, logging, and edge-case coverage

Set up efficient file upload workflows (video, images, assets)

Ensure responsive, polished UI/UX aligned with premium SaaS standards

Write clean documentation for code, APIs, and environment setup

Participate in architecture discussions and recommend improvements

Take ownership of timelines, deliverables, and proactive decision-making



Required Skills & Experience

Strong proficiency in Next.js, React, TypeScript

Back-end experience with Node.js + Express or NestJS

Experience with Supabase (preferred) or AWS (S3, Lambda, RDS, Cognito)



Deep understanding of API workflows, including:

OAuth2

REST API integration

Webhooks

Multi-step workflows

Ability to integrate multiple external APIs smoothly

Ability to work with existing codebases and follow established patterns



Strong understanding of:

Authentication & permissions

Scalable database structures

File upload pipelines (multipart, S3 buckets, streaming, optimisation)

State management & clean component systems

Experience turning high-fidelity Figma systems into pixel-perfect builds



Excellent communication skills

Reliable, organised, punctual

Able to work collaboratively and ask questions early

Experience delivering SaaS products end-to-end

Strong problem-solving and architectural thinking

Ability to document work clearly for future tea
mbers

title: We’re Hiring: SEO Strategist (Philippines-Based)
description:
I’m Dustin, founder of Marketing Done Right, a Cleveland-based digital marketing agency. We’re on the lookout for a motivated SEO Strategist to join our Philippines-based crew and take ownership of client projects.



About Us

Marketing Done Right is a close-knit digital marketing agency that delivers top-tier Local SEO and National SEO solutions. We pride ourselves on collaboration, innovation, and helping our tea
mbers grow professionally while delivering measurable results for our clients.





Why Join Us?

Supportive Team Culture – Work with a collaborative, international team where your contributions truly matter.

Career Growth – Long-term role with opportunities to grow and advance.

Performance-Based Salary Increase – Strong results and consistent performance can lead to salary growth.

Diverse Projects – Lead SEO strategies across a variety of client accounts and industries.

Job Stability – We’re in it for the long run and are looking for someone who is, too.





Role (Overview of the Position)



This position will be responsible for leading the strategy and planning of assigned client SEO projects. The strategist will execute these strategies through MDR’s pod and support systems, working with SEO Specialists, SEO Supports, VAs, and the content team. This role involves taking clear ownership of assigned projects, ensuring strategies are aligned with client goals, guided by data, and carried through effectively from planning to delivery.



Responsibilities (Tasks Associated with the Role)



- Manage multiple client projects simultaneously while ensuring quality, focus, and on-time delivery.

- Lead the strategy and planning for assigned client SEO projects.

- Create monthly reports to show progress, highlight wins, and identify opportunities for improvement.

- Collaborate with the content team by suggesting topics and outlining content deliverables for each month.

- Work with SEO Specialists, SEO Supports, and VAs within the pod system to execute strategies effectively.

- Oversee timelines, deliverables, and workflows to ensure projects are managed smoothly from start to finish.

- Conduct audits, keyword research, and performance reviews to inform data-driven decisions.

- Provide guidance, direction, and feedback to pod members to maintain alignment and quality.

- Develop and maintain SEO documents (such as strategies, audits, and reports) for both internal use and client reporting.

- Take ownership of project outcomes, ensuring strategies stay on track and aligned with client goals.



Results (Expected Accomplishments)



- Assigned SEO projects are delivered with clear direction, steady progress, and alignment to client business objectives.

- Multiple client accounts are handled efficiently, with competing priorities balanced without delays or quality issues.

- Monthly reports consistently highlight wins, performance insights, and opportunities, equipping leadership with valuable talking points for client updates.

- Content deliverables are strategically planned, ensuring each piece contributes to improved visibility and rankings.

- Pod collaboration is seamless, with Specialists, Supports, and VAs executing tasks on time and to standard.

- Timelines, workflows, and deliverables are proactively managed, preventing bottlenecks and ensuring smooth project flow.

- Audits and keyword research regularly uncover growth opportunities, guiding smarter decision-making.

- Performance reviews lead to tangible strategy adjustments that improve traffic, rankings, or conversions.

- Leadership receives accurate, well-structured documentation that strengthens client communication and trust.

- Strategists demonstrate effective delegation and feedback, resulting in stronger team performance and accountability within pods.

- Campaigns remain adaptable to changing client needs or market conditions without losing 
ntum.

- Projects demonstrate consistent alignment with MDR’s quality standards and brand reputation.

- Workload across multiple clients is prioritized effectively, ensuring no project falls behind schedule.

- Collaboration with the content team results in deliverables that not only support SEO but also enhance overall marketing strategy.

- Client satisfaction is reinforced by clear communication, visible progress, and the strategist’s ownership of outcomes.

- Strategists show the ability to anticipate potential challenges and address them before they become roadblocks.

- Reports and strategies are presented in a way that simplifies complex data into actionable insights.

- Campaign outcomes contribute to MDR’s larger goal of delivering measurable growth and value for clients.





Requirements (Expected Proficiencies)



- Proven experience in SEO strategy, including keyword research, audits, and data-driven decision-making.

- Strong understanding of SEO best practices, local SEO, analytics, and reporting tools (e.g., Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, etc.).

- Ability to manage and prioritize multiple client accounts at the same time without losing focus on quality or deadlines.

- Skilled in creating SEO documents for both client reporting and internal use (such as strategies, reports, and project plans) that clearly outline progress, insights, and next steps.

- Experience working closely with cross-functional teams (such as content, design, development, PPC, and virtual assistants) to ensure deliverables align with SEO strategies and client goals.

- Strong communication and collaboration skills, both written and verbal.

- Ability to think critically, stay calm under pressure, and find solutions in urgent or challenging situations.

- Comfortable giving direction, feedback, and guidance to tea
mbers to keep projects on track.

- Detail-oriented, organized, and able to keep timelines and deliverables moving smoothly.

- Familiarity with the latest SEO trends, algorithm updates, and digital marketing practices.





How to Apply

Interested applicants must fill out this Google Form to be considered:

title: Shopify Web Developer - CRO Specialist - Ecommerce Advertising Agency - Full Time 4a
description:
APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED: 





CRO Shopify Web Developer – Job Overview

I am looking for an experienced shopify web developer to help me upgrade client’s checkout processes and execute CRO tests for various ecommerce brands.

In this role you will update Shopify theme templates, develop landing pages using various page builders and html/CSS frameworks, research/install various checkout/bundle applications, and implement A/B tests using testing tools like intelligems.

You will also report on test performance, and provide suggestions for next steps.

This is a full-time opportunity. Training will be provided and you will work directly with me.



About Zack Miller

My name is Zack Miller, and I’ve been a DTC Ecommerce Growth Marketer since 2019. I’ve done everything fro
dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

I’ve contributed to the growth of over 200 ecommerce brands in my agency experience. Now, as an independent growth marketing partner, I work closely with a small number of brands on their new customer acquisition strategy.



Note: All Remote Employees Must Be Available To Work During The Following Business Hours:

Monday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Tuesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Wednesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Thursday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Friday: 9am – 5:30pm EST



Roles & Responsibilities

- Develop landing pages using Figma and various WYSYWIG editors including but not limited to Replo and Pagefly.

- Edit product, collection and other page templates using Shopify Liquid template engine, and various HTML/CSS frameworks.

- Install various checkout/tracking applications (aftersell, Zipify OCU, Upstack, etc)

- Install various applications for product bundling when needed, and create product bundles. 

- Install tracking pixels on client’s websites

- Implement A/B tests in intelligems for product price tests, shipping price tests, theme tests, landing page tests, and more. 

- Research new ideas for direct response content marketing strategies.

- Work in my project management system, ClickUp.

- Apply a process-first mentality and provide feedback to help further develop our operating systems.



Required Experience & Education

- Strong verbal and written English language skills (American Dialect)

- Strong knowledge of HTML/CSS/Javascript/Shopify Liquid required. 

- Knowledge of Python and Ruby preferred but not required.

- 1+ years of web development (Shopify) experience required

- 1+ years of backend python (flask/django) development experience preferred but not required

- 1+ years of marketing agency experience preferred but not required

- Must be highly organized and possess strong attention to detail

- All applicants are encouraged to apply, regardless of experience or education

title: Level 2 Service Desk Specialist
description:
Job Title: Level 2 Service Desk Specialist



Company: MYDWARE

Location: Remote (Work From Home) - Philippines, we are located in Canada

Work Hours: 8 AM – 5 PM EST (Night Shift in PH Time), Monday – Friday, rotating weekend work

or

Work Hours: 1 PM – 10 PM EST (Very early morning in PH Time), Monday – Friday, rotating weekend work

About Us:

MYDWARE is a cybersecurity-focused Managed IT Services Provider (MSP) specializing in IT solutions for the construction, professional services, and manufacturing industry. We are looking for an experienced Level 2 Service Desk Specialist with previous MSP experience to join our growing team. This is a full-time, remote role for a dependable and skilled IT professional who thrives in a remote work environment.



***Applicants with prior experience working for a Canadian, American, or Australian MSP will be given priority.

Job Responsibilities:

• Provide Level 2 IT support, handling escalated technical issues from the Service Desk.

• Troubleshoot and resolve issues in Azure AD (new user provisioning, enterprise app setup and integrations)

• Troubleshoot and resolve Microsoft 365 issues, including Exchange, OneDrive, Teams, and SharePoint.

• Troubleshoot and resolve firewall issues including Sophos, pfsense, Watchguard etc...

• Troubleshoot and resolve network switch configurations VLAN's, switch port configurations

• Troubleshoot and resolve WiFI configurations VLAN's, WiFi Profiles, Wireless Controllers such as Omada, Unify, Cisco and others

• Perform advanced networking troubleshooting, including DNS, VLANs, Firewalls, Switches, and VPNs.

• Diagnose and resolve server, workstation, and Active Directory issues.

• Work with PSA platforms such as HaloPSA, ConnectWise, or Autotask.

• Utilize RMM tools for system monitoring, patch management, and automation.

• Maintain and update IT documentation platforms such as Hudu or IT Glue.

• Assist with firewall, switch, and network deployments.

• Support Microsoft 365 administration and migrations.

• Work directly with vendors and clients to resolve issues.

• Assist in client onboardings and IT audits.

• Follow best practices for security and compliance.

• Ensure backup integrity and disaster recovery readiness.

• Document client environments and configurations properly.



MUST HAVE Requirements:

• Minimum of 2 years of experience working for an MSP (Managed Services Provider).

• Strong technical skills in Microsoft 365 administration, including Exchange, SharePoint, OneDrive, and Teams.

• Advanced understanding of networking concepts, including DNS, VLANs, Firewalls, Switches, and VPNs.

• Hands-on experience with PSA, RMM, and IT Documentation tools.

• Excellent troubleshooting and problem-solving skills.

• Fluent in written and spoken English, with strong communication skills.

• Ability to work independently, learn quickly, and adapt to new technologies.

• Reliable and self-motivated, with excellent time management skills.

• A private and quiet home office setup with no distractions, pets, or background noise.

• A stable and high-speed internet connection suitable for remote work.



Preferred Qualifications (Priority for Interviews Given to Candidates With These):

• AZ-103 (Microsoft Azure Administrator) Certification.

• CompTIA A+, Network+, or Security+ Certifications.

• Prior experience working for a Canadian, American, or Australian MSP.



Work Details:

• Full-time, Remote Work From Home.

• Monday to Friday, 8 AM – 5 PM EST (Night Shift in PH Time).

• Monday to Friday, 1 PM – 10 PM EST (Very early morning in PH Time)

• Rotating weekend work is required.



Why Work With MYDWARE?

• Work with a cybersecurity-focused MSP using the latest technologies.

• Work with a AI and Automations focused MSP using the latest technologies.

• Join a team that values innovation, learning, and professional growth.

• Get hands-on experience with cutting-edge MSP tools.

• Opportunities for further training and certification sponsorship.



How to Apply:

If you are an experienced MSP technician looking for a challenging and rewarding remote role, we want to hear from you!

title: Customer Support Specialist
description:
The Customer Support Specialist is responsible for providing high-quality assistance and support to customers by responding to inquiries, resolving issues, and ensuring customer satisfaction. This role serves as a primary point of contact between the company and its customers, delivering professional, timely, and accurate support across multiple communication channels including phone,
, chat, and ticketing systems. Customer Support Specialists play a critical role in maintaining customer loyalty, improving customer experience, and supporting overall business operations.



Key Responsibilities

Customer Interaction and Support

• Respond to customer inquiries via phone,
, live chat, and support ticket systems in a timely and professional manner

• Provide accurate information regarding products, services, billing, orders, and company policies

• Troubleshoot customer issues and provide effective solutions

• Assist customers with placing orders, processing returns, exchanges, and refunds

• Handle customer complaints with professionalism, empathy, and efficiency



Case Management and Documentation

• Document customer interactions, issues, and resolutions in CRM or ticketing systems

• Track open issues and ensure timely resolution and follow-up

• Maintain accurate customer records and update account information as needed

• Escalate complex or unresolved issues to supervisors or appropriate departments



Customer Experience and Retention

• Build and maintain positive relationships with customers

• Ensure high levels of customer satisfaction and service quality

• Follow up with customers to confirm issue resolution

• Identify recurring customer issues and recommend process improvements



Collaboration and Internal Support

• Work closely with sales, operations, billing, and technical teams to resolve customer concerns

• Provide customer feedback to management and product teams

• Participate in training, tea
etings, and process improvement initiatives



Performance and Compliance

• Meet or exceed key performance indicators (KPIs) such as response time, resolution time, customer satisfaction (CSAT), and service quality metrics

• Follow company policies, procedures, and customer service standards

• Maintain confidentiality and security of customer information

 

Qualifications

Required Qualifications

• 5-7 years of customer service or customer support experience preferred

• Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English

• Strong problem-solving and conflict-resolution skills

• Ability to multitask, prioritize, and manage time effectively

• Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

• Excellent computer proficiency and ability to learn new software systems



Preferred Qualifications

• Associate’s or Bachelor’s degree in Business, Communications, or related field

• Experience with CRM or ticketing systems such as Salesforce, Zendesk, or HubSpot

• Experience supporting customers in a call center, SaaS, e-commerce, or service environment

• Experience in remote or hybrid work environments

 

Key Skills and Competencies

• Customer service orientation and professionalism

• Excellent communication and active listening skills

• Problem-solving and analytical thinking

• Emotional intelligence and conflict management

• Adaptability and flexibility

• Attention to detail and accuracy

• Technical proficiency with CRM and support tools

• Team collaboration and interpersonal skills

 

Tools and Systems Commonly Used

• CRM systems (Salesforce, Zendesk, HubSpot, Freshdesk)

• Help desk and ticketing systems

•
 platforms and chat support tools

• Microsoft Office Suite and Google Workspace

• Knowledge base and documentation tools

 

Employment Type

• Full-time remote position



How to apply:

- Read everything carefully, the requirements below are a must. Failure to provide these things will automatically terminate your application.

- Submit your resume

- Prepare a 3-5mins loom introduction video

- Share your availability and timezone

**Once approved for the initial screening, you will accomplish a role specific evaluation task.

title: Looking for a Video Editor for my Space YouTube Channel
description:
Hey!

I am looking for a professional to create and edit one YouTube video about space and universe content.

The length of the video should be between 12-15 minutes long and pay $20/25 per video.

I will provide the script and voiceover. You will not have to do any research regarding the video topic. You will have to find clips, photos, NASA footage, background music and other assets to create the video.

I am looking for someone who:



Has experience creating social media video content, especially YouTube videos

Has experience using video editing software such as Adobe Premiere Pro or CapCut

Fluent in English

Able to work within the deadline of 48 hours

Can source clips themselves, i do have some clips but most should be self sourced and copyright free.

Is available part time, 6-12 hours per week, in case the fit between you and our team is good.



The style should adhere to our brand guidelines. However, you can be very creative to make the video entertaining and engaging. We aim for a cinematic, documentary feel, think dark backgrounds, clean subtitles, atmospheric music. The introduction of the video (first 1/2 minutes) should contain many details, to keep the viewer engaged.

If you have read the middle of this job description, please type your favorite planet at the beginning or end of your proposal.



Video examples in our niche:






 - not in space niche but the vibe i want to go for



If you have ever made a YouTube documentary or educational video in the space or science niche, please attach samples of your work. 

I look forward to hopefully working with you!

Questions:

Please only share Google Drive or YouTube links

title: Proposal Writer – EHS Compliance Services
description:
***Please submit your application through the following link: 
=



About CDMS 



CDMS (Chemical Data Management Systems) is a California-based Environmental Health & Safety consulting firm with over 35 years of experience helping industrial facilities comply with federal, state, and local regulations. With offices in Dublin and Long Beach, we serve hundreds of manufacturing, distribution, and other industrial clients throughout California, providing comprehensive EHS compliance services including Air Quality permitting, Hazardous Materials management, Storm Water compliance, Wastewater management, and OSHA safety support. 



The Role 



We're seeking a Proposal Writer with 2-5 years of environmental or safety compliance experience to join our remote team. This role combines technical knowledge with strong writing skills to create compelling proposals for California businesses. You'll handle routine client conversations and proposal development independently, while collaborating with senior consultants on complex projects and long-term contracts. 



This is a technical role that requires understanding environmental compliance and California regulations. You'll have direct client interactions for routine proposals—answering questions, clarifying scope, and presenting services. For larger opportunities and complex regulatory projects, you'll work alongside our senior sales team to develop comprehensive proposals. Success requires technical competence, excellent communication skills, and the ability to build client relationships through clear, professional interactions. 



Work Schedule & Compensation 



Full-time: 8 hours/day, 40 hours/week 



Work shift: Pacific Standard Time (PST) 



Benefits: 10 days PTO + 5 sick days annually 



What You'll Do 



Conduct client conversations for routine proposals including discovery calls, scope clarification, and follow-up discussions 



Write clear, technically accurate proposals for CDMS services including air quality permitting, hazardous materials management, stormwater compliance, and safety consulting 



Handle routine client inquiries and proposal requests independently from initial contact through submission 



Collaborate with senior sales consultants on complex proposals, long-term contracts, and strategic client opportunities 



Research California environmental regulations (EPA, DTSC, CUPAs, Water Boards, Air Districts) to support accurate proposal content 



Draft professional client communications including
s, follow-up letters, and service agreements 



Present CDMS services and capabilities to prospective clients during routine sales conversations 



Coordinate with technical staff to gather project details, timelines, and pricing information for proposals 



Maintain proposal templates and standard language library for efficient proposal development 



Track proposal submissions, follow up on pending opportunities, and manage client communication timeline 



Update and maintain client database and proposal tracking systems 



Learn California compliance requirements and CDMS service offerings to improve proposal quality and client conversations over time 



What You Bring 



2-5 years of experience in environmental consulting, safety compliance, or EHS operations 



Bachelor's degree in Environmental Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Environmental Science, Safety Management, or related technical field (required) 



Technical background in environmental or safety compliance (experience with permits, audits, or regulatory documentation) 



Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English (professional business level required) 



Strong ability to understand and explain technical regulatory concepts to clients 



Experience writing technical proposals, reports, or regulatory documentation 



Comfortable conducting client conversations and answering technical questions 



Exceptional attention to detail and ability to produce accurate, professional documents 



Ability to work independently on routine proposals while knowing when to involve senior team 



Knowledge of environmental regulations (California regulations a plus) 



Proficiency with Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint) 



Experience working with US-based clients highly valued 



Self-motivated with strong organizational and time management skills 



Able to manage multiple proposal deadlines and client conversations simultaneously 



Why Work With Us 



Opportunity to develop expertise in California environmental compliance while building your technical writing career 



Work directly with experienced EHS consultants and learn from senior tea
mbers 



Hybrid remote work arrangement with flexible scheduling within PST business hours 



Collegial, supportive team environment that values clear communication and continuous learning 



Make meaningful contributions that help California companies protect their employees and the environment 



Professional development opportunities to grow your technical knowledge and writing skills 



CDMS is committed to building a diverse and inclusive workplace. We are an Equal Opportunity Employer. 



How to Apply 



***Please submit your application through the following link: 
=

?

?

title: Sales Representative
description:
Join a fast-growing US online home goods retailer and enjoy the learning and opportunities that you have while working with us.



We strive to provide 5-star service & shopping assistance to all of our clients, and all of our team is accountable to fulfill this.



We are looking for a Sales Representative who can assist prospective buyers and close online ecommerce sales.



We're only looking for full-time, long-term, ongoing cooperation.



Work schedules available:

8 AM to 4 PM US EST

4 PM to 12 AM US EST



Your work week will be 5 days per week, with 2 days off per week. Days off will be selected with your manager. We will try to accommodate your preferences for which days you like, based on availability.



This role starts ASAP.



Job Duties and Responsibilities:

Receive incoming phone calls and live chats from potential customers (prospects) who indicated that they need shopping assistance. This does not include calls and chats from existing customers that need help with their orders (that’s a job for a different department)

Makes follow-up calls, writes follow-up
s, and text messages to potential buyers. We try to follow up 5x with each person that contacted us (unless they indicate that they are no longer interested). We don’t do cold calling. Only reaching out to prospects who interacted with our online store and left their contact information.

After each interaction with a prospect/customer, writes notes & comments in our CRM (Asana)

Communicate efficiently and build rapport with potential customers

Assists prospects in their shopping journey and helps make the purchase decision

Ensures that all prospects’ questions and objections are addressed

Leads every interaction to a close sale, which means an order is placed on our online store

Prepares custom quotes, price matches competitors if necessary, and offers custom discounts. This requires calculating margins & ensuring profitability.

Answering questions about the products we offer, including technical questions. Learns the specifications, features and benefits of our bestsellers. Over time, becomes an expert in the industry.

If not able to answer product-specific questions, conducts research in the materials provided by the supplier, or reaches out to the supplier to get the information

Confirms stock availability and lead times when offering products to prospects

Documents standard procedures and best practices in a written form, so that other tea
mbers can learn from them



Requirements:

At least 2 years of experience in sales on the phone

Experience must include both inbound and outbound sales

Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

Experience in Customer Service on the phone is a nice to have

Experience in the e-commerce (online shopping) industry is nice to have

Home improvement, construction, and gas plumbing industry experience is a plus

Outgoing, friendly, and lively

Can-do mindset, with a sense of ownership, pride in your performance, and its impact on the company’s success

Long-term commitment - treat this as your career



What we can offer:

Sales commission: 8% of gross profit from all orders closed. Gross profit means the sale amount minus the product and shipping costs. Paid monthly. No upper limit. Monthly commission payouts range between $1,200 (the guaranteed minimum) and as high as $3,000 (for the top performer). The average monthly payout is $1,465 (average from the last 2 years).

$1,200/month minimum guaranteed pay

15 days paid days off per year (also convertible to min. guaranteed commission)

Paid training on all aspects of the role

Opportunities for professional development

Friendly atmosphere

Online Interview process

Fully remote position

title: Real Estate Marketing & CRM Virtual Assistant
description:
Job Description



We are looking for a reliable Virtual Assistant to support marketing, content distribution, and CRM management.



The role involves helping manage online content, supporting lead tracking in the CRM, and assisting with
 marketing campaigns. The goal is to maintain consistent marketing activity while ensuring leads are properly organized and followed up.



This position starts part-time and may grow depending on performance and business needs.



Responsibilities



Repurpose long-form video content into short clips for social media

Schedule and publish content across platforms such as YouTube, Instagram,
, TikTok, and Pinterest

Assist with managing leads and updating information in Lofty CRM (formerly Chime)

Monitor incoming leads and keep records organized

Help design and schedule
 campaigns using Flowdesk

Create simple graphics and marketing materials using Canva

Organize marketing content and maintain consistency across channels

Assist with general administrative and marketing tasks when needed



Requirements



Experience working as a Virtual Assistant or Marketing Assistant

Familiarity with social media platforms and content posting tools

Basic video clipping or repurposing experience for short-form content

Experience with CRM systems (Lofty, Chime, or similar) is a plus

Experience with Canva or similar design tools

Familiarity with AI tools such as ChatGPT is a plus

Strong attention to detail and organization

Good written English communication skills



Schedule



Part-time to start (approximately 4 hours per day).



Compensation



Starting rate: $5 per hour, with potential increases based on performance.



How to Apply

Follow these instructions carefully—applications that do not follow instructions will be ignored.



Change the
 subject line to:

1. -“I’m the Best REVA– [Your Name]”

2. -Write no more than 5 sentences describing your relevant experience and previous roles.

title: Fullstack Developer (Remote)
description:
About the Company:



Since 2009, the ISBX PH team has developed numerous websites and applications for clients large and small that include automotive, consumer packaged goods, action sports, and lifestyle markets. We stand by our work and can provide a long list of references from our trusted partners.



Our team is highly collaborative and passionate who strive to deliver great service and quality applications to our clients.



As part of our expansion, we continue to look for Full stack Developers who are accountable for their work & actions and take pride in advancing their career by continuous learning and accepting new challenges.



Primary Responsibilities:

1. As a Full Stack Developer, you should be comfortable with building, managing and maintaining both front-end and back-end requirements of clients

2. Must be capable of writing reusable, testable, and efficient code

3. Staying abreast of the latest technologies being used by the company in web & mobile applications

4. Participate in all aspects of agile software development including design, implementation, and deployment

5. Ensuring responsiveness of applications and perform testing as needed

6. Be active in daily sprint and provide feedback that will help the team in the development process



Qualifications:

1. Full stack development using Reactjs, React Native and Nodejs with Typescript

2. Working knowledge in version control, repository management, issue/ticket management & unit testing

3. Familiarity in Jira & Agile environment

4. Minimum of 6 months related experience using the required tech stack

5. Passionate, Team Player and have a strong desire for continuous learning

6. Analytical and problem solving skills

7. Good communication and collaboration abilities

8. Compensation will be based on transferable skills



What we can offer:

We prioritize the welfare of our employees by providing work life balance, healthy work culture, engaging activities and opportunity for career advancement by having the latest technologies and practicing internal promotions.



To maintain the harmonious relationship among everyone, we consistently conduct fun and friendly activities that people can relate to. Part of having a healthy lifestyle is playing sports like pickleball and badminton which the company offers. For some cheat days, a monthly happy hour is set to satisfy the cravings, moderately quench the thirst for some liquor or hit the high notes in a group jamming – all for the purpose of relaxation, enjoyment and collection of memories outside work.



We don’t burden employees with work alone, hence we provide leaves to give them some relaxation and quality time with family and friends.



To further take care of them, we have HMO for every employee + 1 dependent. The annual Flu vaccine, dental benefit & life insurance and eye care benfit are present as well for the employees.
