title: Highly Driven Virtual Assistant with Strong Attention to Detail
description:
HIGH QUALITY - Recruitment Virtual Assistant

She Sells With Brooke | Remote | Full-Time



We are looking for a tech-savvy, proactive, and highly driven Virtual Assistant to support our Head of Recruitment and his team in a full-time remote role. 



This position is open to applicants who are fast learners, take ownership of their work, and are hungry to contribute to a fast-growing global company. If you're someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment, can think critically about systems, and doesn't wait to be told what to do next — we want to hear from you.



PLEASE READ THE FOLLOWING BRIEF CAREFULLY AND ONLY APPLY IF YOU THINK YOU TRULY HAVE WHAT IT TAKES.

ALL APPLICATIONS MUST BE SUBMITTED VIA
 BELOW. 

Do not submit via the website or they will not be processed!



Our company is an online business in the female sales coaching and training space based in Australia and USA. We are scaling rapidly and building world-class recruitment systems to match. We value precision, initiative, and accountability — and we're looking for someone who brings all three to the table every single day.



YOUR ROLE WILL INVOLVE:



- Supporting our Recruitment VA and Recruitment Manager with day-to-day data entry, tracking, and pipeline management across our recruitment operations.

- Managing and maintaining recruitment spreadsheets, databases, and candidate records with a high level of accuracy.

- Researching and evaluating tech tools and software to help us improve and automate our current manual processes — we're actively looking for smarter ways to do things and want your input.

- Handling general administrative tasks across the recruitment function, including document preparation, scheduling support, and internal communications.

- Assisting with visual assets for recruitment as needed — job ads, candidate-facing materials, and other creative outputs.

- Proactively identifying gaps in our current systems and suggesting improvements without being asked.

- Working closely with the team to help build and document processes as we scale.



MUST-HAVE QUALITIES



!!! Please do not apply unless you are strong in all of the below:



** TECH-SAVVY WITH A SYSTEMS MINDSET.

You know your way around the latest apps and software. You can hold your own in a conversation about automation, workflow tools, and process improvement. We're currently evaluating tools like 
 and others — we want someone who can help us think through what's best, not just execute what they're told.



** HIGHLY PROFICIENT IN GSUITE.

Google Sheets, Docs, Drive, Gmail — you use these daily and don't need to be shown how. You can build clean, functional spreadsheets and manage data without hand-holding.



** PROACTIVE AND SELF-DIRECTED.

You don't wait to be told what to do next. You spot what needs fixing and fix it. You take ownership of your work and care deeply about doing it properly. Micro-management is not something we have time for — and not something you should need.



** FAST LEARNER WITH GRIT.

You pick things up quickly, push through challenges, and deliver. You're not looking for a comfortable job — you're looking for a role where you can grow, contribute, and prove yourself.



** STRONG COMMUNICATION SKILLS.

Clear, professional, and concise — in writing and verbally. You'll be working closely with our Recruitment Manager and VA, and strong English skills are non-negotiable.



** ORGANISED AND HIGHLY RESPONSIBLE.

You can juggle multiple tasks, meet deadlines, and handle sensitive company information with discretion. Nothing falls through the cracks on your watch.



** RELIABLE SETUP.

You must have your own secure computer/laptop, a reliable internet connection, and a distraction-free workstation. Confidentiality and data security are critical in this role.



** FULL DEDICATION — NO SIDE GIGS.

This role requires your full focus and commitment. Those who prove themselves as loyal, hardworking tea
mbers will be rewarded accordingly. Please do not apply if you have, or intend to have, other employment or side projects alongside this role.



SKILLS REQUIRED / PREFERRED:



- Google Sheets, Google Suite, Gmail, Google Docs — Required

- Data entry, tracking, and database management — Required

- Familiarity with project management tools (e.g. 
) — Preferred

- Familiarity with Slack — Preferred

- Basic visual editing or graphic design skills (Canva, Adobe, etc.) — A strong bonus

- Experience working in an online business or coaching environment — Preferred

- Experience in recruitment or HR admin — Preferred, not essential



WORKING HOURS:



Monday to Friday, 8am to 5pm Australian Sydney time (with a one-hour lunch break), totalling 40 hours per week. This may be subject to change.



Please note: Depending on Daylight Savings, this may be 2-3 hours ahead of Philippine time. Please confirm your availability before applying.



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS:



Please send your complete application to 
 with the subject line:

Recruitment Virtual Assistant — She Sells With Brooke



Include ALL of the following:



Your Resume and Cover Letter

A 2-3 minute customised-for-us video of yourself explaining why you're the right person for this role — tell us about a time you identified a problem and fixed it without being asked

If shortlisted, be prepared to complete a trial task to assess your tech skills, attention to detail, and initiative.



We are a close-knit, fast-growing company looking for someone who will take pride in their work, go above and beyond, and become a critical part of our recruitment team. If that sounds like you — we can't wait to meet you.
salary: $4 USD per hour/ approx ~$700 per month

title: https://cartozianhvac.com/
description:
Virtual Dispatch Manager (Philippines-Based VA)

Logistics & Scheduling Coordinator – Home Services

Company: Infinite Home Solutions / Infinite Roofing Solutions

Location: Remote – Philippines

Schedule: Must be available during U.S. Pacific Time business hours

Position Overview

Infinite Home Solutions is seeking a highly organized Virtual Dispatch Manager to coordinate scheduling, routing, and communication for our sales representatives and technicians across Central and Northern California.

This role is responsible for ensuring that all appointments, inspections, and job schedules are organized efficiently based on geographic routing and drive-time optimization.

You will act as the central communication hub between customers, salespeople, and field technicians to ensure schedules are organized, routes make sense geographically, and all jobs are completed efficiently.

This role requires excellent English communication skills, strong technical ability, and experience using CRM and dispatch software.

Responsibilities

Manage daily and weekly scheduling for sales representatives and technicians

Organize appointments based on geographic routes and travel efficiency

Communicate schedule updates to customers, salespeople, and technicians

Adjust schedules when jobs run long, customers cancel, or new appointments are added

Confirm appointments with customers

Track job progress and ensure updates are entered into the CRM

Coordinate with the sales team when new appointments are booked

Ensure technicians and salespeople have clear schedules and job information

Required Qualifications

Excellent spoken and written English

Strong communication skills with customers and tea
mbers

Previous experience in dispatching, scheduling, or logistics coordination

Experience working with field service teams or appointment-based businesses

High technical proficiency with:

CRM systems

Dispatch or scheduling software

Google Workspace

Online communication tools

Strong organizational and problem-solving skills

Ability to manage multiple schedules at the same time

About Our Company

Infinite Home Solutions is a growing home services company serving Central and Northern California. Our services include roofing, roof rejuvenation, and general contracting services.

We operate across a large geographic territory and rely on strong scheduling and coordination to keep our field teams operating efficiently.

Application Instructions (Important)

To be considered for this role, please follow the instructions below.

1. Record a Short Loom Video

Please record a 2–3 minute Loom video introducing yourself and answering the following:

Tell us about your experience with dispatching or scheduling.

What CRM or dispatch software have you used before?

How would you organize schedules for technicians working in different cities?

Why do you believe you would be a good fit for this role?

Include the Loom link in your application.

2. Attention to Detail

At the top of your application, include the phrase:

Dispatch Excellence

Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.

title: Senior Bookkeeper & Ecommerce Operations Specialist
description:
Senior Bookkeeper & Ecommerce Operations Specialist

Ambient Lounge® | Full-Time | Remote – Philippines | ?55,000/month + KPI Bonuses

Hours: Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Philippine Time



——————————————————————————————

Picture your Monday morning.

——————————————————————————————



Coffee in hand. The morning still quiet. You open your laptop — and instead of that low-level dread you have felt at other jobs, there is something different. There is a lighthearted message in the team chat from your graphic designer colleague cracking a joke about their weekend. There is a warm welcoming voice note from your team lead in Melbourne checking in. There is a product reel you have seen on Instagram that you actually love ..made by a company you are genuinely proud to work for.



You start your day at ambient lounge® — not because you have to, but because you actually want to see what happens next and to strive to create something amazing together



That is the feeling inside Ambient Lounge. And we are looking for someone in accounts who is ready for that culture.



We are not a faceless corporation. We are a 21-year-old Melbourne-born design brand with soul — and a Filipino team that has been part of our family for over 12 years. Graphic designers, architects, web developers, operations creatives. Real people who laugh together, challenge each other, and build something beautiful every week. Is that you?



Our furniture — our bean bags, lounges & gorgeous pet beds — live in beautiful homes, boutique hotels, and design-forward spaces across Australia, the UK, and Europe. People don't just buy our products. They fall in love with them. They tag us. They send us photos of their dogs sprawled across our pet beds at 7am. That is the kind of brand energy you will be waking up to every day.



We use AI. We move fast. We're progressive. We celebrate wins loudly and fix problems honestly. Some of our Philippines team have flown to Melbourne to be with us in person. 



Right now we are entering a serious growth phase — B2B, retail, new global markets. To get there, our financial and ecommerce foundations need to be bulletproof. That is exactly where you come in. This is our talent gap that we want you to fill. 





——————————————————————————————

THE ROLE — IN PLAIN LANGUAGE

——————————————————————————————



We need a brilliant, sharp, and highly motivated bookkeeper who also understands Shopify ecommerce systems & marketplaces. You will be the financial backbone across two Ambient Lounge entities — Australia and the EU — (see 
 for reference) keeping the numbers clean, the systems tight, and the data right.



This is not a background role. Your work directly enables our growth. When the product codes and systems are right, we can sell on Amazon. When the Xero data is clean, we make smarter decisions. When the reconciliations are done properly, we can move faster. You will feel that impact every single week.



——————————————————————————————

YOUR TWO BUSINESSES

——————————————————————————————



This is a dual-portfolio position. You will be the sole bookkeeper responsible for two separate business entities:



• Ambient Lounge Australia — our flagship ecommerce and retail operation

• Ambient Lounge UK/Europe — our international ecommerce and licensing entity



Both businesses run on Xero and Shopify, and both require clean, accurate, well-structured financial records. You will work closely with Grant Morris (Founder & Design Director, Melbourne), the Australian management team, and your fellow Philippine colleagues across design, development, and operations.



Beyond pure bookkeeping, this role is about building and maintaining the structural backbone of our ecommerce operations — product codes, marketplace integrations, data integrity, and system efficiency.



——————————————————————————————

WHAT YOU WILL DO

——————————————————————————————



BOOKKEEPING & FINANCIAL MANAGEMENT

• Full-cycle bookkeeping across two entities — AP, AR, bank reconciliations, general ledger

• Xero management including chart of accounts, reporting, BAS/GST/VAT reconciliation

• Invoicing, purchase orders, supplier payments, and expense categorisation

• Monthly financial reporting and cash flow tracking for both AU and UK businesses

• Payroll support and multi-currency transaction management

• Liaising with external accountants and auditors at period-end



ECOMMERCE SYSTEMS & INTEGRATION

• Shopify-to-Xero integration management — ensuring seamless, accurate data flow

• Marketplace reconciliation for Amazon, Kogan, TikTok Shop, and other channels

• Product setup and data integrity across all marketplaces — SKUs, barcodes (GTINs/EANs), pricing

• Creating and maintaining product codes and variant structures for B2B and retail readiness

• Collaborating with the web and design teams on Shopify backend accuracy



DATA, ANALYTICS & AI TOOLS

• Using AI-powered tools to improve accuracy and efficiency across financial workflows

• Maintaining clean, structured data across all financial and product systems

• Identifying and flagging financial discrepancies or process inefficiencies — proactively

• Supporting strategic decisions with clear financial data and reporting

* Working with our marketing teams on key analytics & management teams on profitability and efficiencies



——————————————————————————————

WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR

——————————————————————————————



Hopefully you! Motivated... driven ... passionate ... talented... responsive .. and  importantlye somwone who wants to be genuinely recognised and rewarded for it



Here is the truth: we have tried the "just ok" route and it is not for us. We want someone who genuinely loves the craft of bookkeeping & data — who finds satisfaction in a perfectly reconciled account, who notices what others miss, and who takes real pride in their output.



You will be talking to our team every day — Aussies, Brits, and your Filipino colleagues. You need to be a real person, not just a spreadsheet. Warm, communicative, and someone who actually enjoys being part of something bigger.



If your idea of a great week is cleaning up a messy reconciliation, building a smarter product code structure, tidying up accounts  payable, analysing sales and ending Friday knowing the numbers are perfect — and then jumping on a team call and having a laugh with some genuinely great people — this role is for you.



The ideal candidate is:



? Highly experienced in Xero — you know it deeply, not just superficially

? Confident working across two separate business entities simultaneously

? Experienced with Shopify and ecommerce financial reconciliation

? Familiar with marketplace platforms — Amazon Seller Central, Kogan, TikTok Shop

? Detail-obsessed — you notice errors others miss and you fix them without being asked

? Analytically minded — you see patterns in data and ask the right questions

? Genuinely curious about AI tools and excited to use them to work smarter

? A great communicator — comfortable with Aussie and UK teams across time zones

? Warm, collaborative, and a natural fit for a close-knit international team

? Proactive and self-directed — not someone who waits to be told what to do



——————————————————————————————

QUALIFICATIONS & EXPERIENCE

——————————————————————————————



• Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or Business Administration

• Minimum 3–5 years of bookkeeping experience, ideally in an ecommerce environment

• Xero Certified Advisor (strongly preferred)

• Hands-on experience with Shopify and Shopify financial integrations

• Experience with multi-currency and cross-border transactions

• Marketplace experience (Amazon, TikTok shops, or similar) is a major advantage

• Familiarity with AI finance tools or demonstrated enthusiasm for learning them



——————————————————————————————

WHAT WE OFFER

——————————————————————————————



• ?55,000 per month base salary

• Performance-based KPI bonuses for the right person

• Work-from-home — Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM Philippine time

• Long-term, stable employment with a company that genuinely invests in its people

• The chance to work with a passionate, creative international team

• A front-row seat to a growing global lifestyle brand with serious ambitions

• Potential travel opportunities — some of our longest-serving tea
mbers have visited Australia

• A culture built on respect, care, and real recognition of great work



——————————————————————————————

HOW TO APPLY

——————————————————————————————



Though it might take some time - We read every application personally — no automated filters, no HR robots.



Please send us:

• Your CV/resume including relevant bookkeeping and ecommerce experience

• The accounting software and ecommerce platforms you have worked with

• Any AI or automation tools you currently use (or are keen to learn)

• A short personal message — in your own words — telling us why you are the right person for this team



Applications without a personal message will not be reviewed. We are not looking for a template response. We are looking for you.



If this feels like the job you have been waiting for — we would genuinely love to hear from you.



Ambient Lounge® — Live in Soft Luxury

Melbourne, Australia | London, UK |

title: Video Editor – Educational Content & Marketing Videos
description:
About the Role

We're a Hawaii-based startup looking for a Part-Time Video Editor who can contribute to our growing team. We offer remote work, consistent USD payment, and a structured work environment.



What We Offer

Setup: Fully remote | Work-from-home

Schedule: Tuesday to Saturday | 6:00 AM to 10:00 AM (Philippines Time)

Hours: 20 hours/week | 4 hours/day

Compensation: $7 to $9 per hour, depending on qualifications

Payment Schedule: Bi-weekly on the 15th and last day of each month



Requirements

- Video editing proficiency — You must be skilled in professional video editing software (e.g., Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve).

- Strong portfolio — Your portfolio must showcase polished, professional work that demonstrates strong pacing, clean cuts, smooth transitions, and attention to detail.

- Understanding of visual storytelling — Your work should show you know how to structure a video for clarity, engagement, and impact—not just technical skill, but editorial judgment.

- Bachelor of Arts Degree or related course — Preferred but not required.

- 2+ years of professional video editing experience

- Reliable PC/Laptop with stable internet — Please include your system specifications and internet speed in your application.



Why Work With Us?

Opportunity to grow — We're open to transitioning the right candidate to full-time if it turns out to be a strong mutual fit.



Important Notes

Once you are selected, you will proceed with a paid editing trial to ensure the right fit. You will be compensated for your time and work during this trial period.



If you believe you're a strong fit and you're ready to contribute to a growing team, we'd love to hear from you. We're excited to find the right person to build with us.

title: Ecommerce Product Copywriter (AI-Assisted) – Furniture & Design
description:
We are a growing ecommerce brand in the home and design space looking for a Product Copywriter to help create clear, thoughtful, and compelling product pages.



This role focuses on writing high-quality ecommerce product descriptions for furniture, home goods, and design objects.



Our copy style is clean, design-focused, and informative, similar to publications like NYMag or Wirecutter. We focus on explaining materials, craftsmanship, and design history while keeping the writing concise and engaging.



You will work directly with our product team to transform supplier specifications, product details, and research into polished product pages.



AI Writing Requirement



This role requires strong skill using AI writing tools such as ChatGPT or Claude.



Using AI is not considered cheating — it is an expected part of the workflow. Strong candidates know how to:



• Use AI to generate drafts quickly

• Structure prompts to produce high-quality output

• Edit and refine AI output into polished writing

• Maintain consistent tone and formatting

• Use AI to help research materials, design history, and product details



We are looking for someone who understands that AI is a tool for productivity, not a replacement for judgment or editing.



Candidates who are comfortable collaborating with AI tools will succeed in this role.



Responsibilities



• Write ecommerce product descriptions for furniture and home goods

• Translate supplier specs and technical information into customer-friendly copy

• Research design inspiration and background behind products

• Use AI tools effectively to draft and refine product copy

• Help maintain a consistent brand voice across the website



Our Copy Style



We prioritize writing that is:



• Clear and informative

• Design-aware and thoughtful

• Structured and easy to read

• Confident but not overly promotional



We avoid marketing clichés like:



• “luxurious”

• “elevated”

• “built to last”



Instead we focus on explaining:



• materials

• craftsmanship

• design heritage

• functional details



Requirements



• Excellent written English

• Experience writing product descriptions or ecommerce copy

• Strong ability to use AI writing tools like ChatGPT or Claude

• Strong attention to detail

• Ability to follow structured writing formats

• Ability to research products and design inspiration



Experience with furniture, interiors, or design writing is a strong plus.



Pay



Hourly rate depends on experience.



This can start as a project-based role with the potential to grow into a long-term position as we expand our product catalog.



How To Apply



Please follow the instructions below carefully. Applications that do not follow the steps may not be reviewed.



1. Introduction



At the top of your message, write 2–3 sentences explaining why you would be a good fit for this role.



2. Writing Samples



Include 2–3 examples of product descriptions you have written, preferably for ecommerce, furniture, home goods, or design-related products.



3. AI Experience



Briefly describe your experience using AI tools such as ChatGPT or Claude for writing or research.



4. Hourly Rate



Include your hourly rate expectation.



Selected candidates will receive a short product copy test using AI tools before interviews are scheduled.

title: Digital Marketing Account Manager (Healthcare Practices)
description:
Looking for a full-time digital marketing role with stable hours, ongoing client work, and a long-term position? 



We’re an established Australian digital marketing agency (operating since 2014) offering a stable career path, competitive pay, and a genuinely collaborative team across Australia and the Philippines. 



You’ll manage accounts for regulated healthcare providers, including local clinics and professional practices. 



This role is ideal for an experienced Digital Marketing Account Manager who is looking for: Employment stability with a long-term agency (not a startup)



*Fixed Philippines-friendly hours (Monday to Friday, 7:00am–3:00pm Manila time - currently 6am - 2pm due to Australia’s Daylight Saving time)

*Attractive, marketing-based pay 70,000PHP - 120,000PHP per month

*10 paid leave days per year

*Additional paid time off over Christmas and New Year (for example, this year from 24 December to 6 January).

*Birthday and work anniversary gifts

*A friendly, structured team with daily support and collaboration



*** TO APPLY, COMPLETE THIS FORM



Day-to-Day Responsibilities

*Client & Campaign Management

*Manage digital marketing projects for Australian clients

*Oversee
 Ads, Google Ads, SEO, and related marketing initiatives

*Act as the key liaison between clients and internal specialists, including by phone and sms

*Campaign Monitoring

*Monitor advertising campaigns weekly (Google and
) with paid media specialists

*Work closely with advertising specialists to identify issues and opportunities

*Ensure campaigns remain optimised and aligned with client goals

*Reporting & Performance Review

*Review reports prepared by the SEO and Advertising teams

*Ensure reports are logical, accurate, and easy to understand

*Communicate performance insights clearly to clients via written updates and/or video meetings

*Campaign Improvement & Strategic Input

*Contribute ideas to improve campaign performance

*Review competitors and market positioning

*Recommend website or landing page improvements

*Suggest creative changes to ad copy, visuals, offers, and messaging



*** TO APPLY, COMPLETE THIS FORM



Required Experience

*Previous experience as a Digital Marketing Account Manager (required)

*Basic hands-on experience with
 Ads and Google Ads preferred

*Understanding of SEO fundamentals

*Experience in healthcare marketing (e.g. dental, allied health, or other professional practices) is highly preferred.

*Experience working with Australian clients is a strong advantage

*Excellent English communication skills, both written and spoken



Personal Attributes We’re Looking For

*Strong attention to detail with the ability to spot issues quickly

*Confident communicator (including by phone/video calls) who can clearly explain results

*Highly organised, reliable, and skilled in time management

*Analytical mindset with the ability to interpret data, not just report on it

*Proactive and solutions-focused

*Comfortable working in a fast-paced agency environment

*Team player who values collaboration and regular check-ins

*Calm, professional, and client-focused



You will manage established clients and work alongside dedicated Google Ads,
 Ads, SEO, and web specialists. The focus of this role is account management, performance oversight, and strategic input — not doing everything yourself, but you can do it if required.



*** TO APPLY, COMPLETE THIS FORM

title: Phone Customer Service Representative
description:
About the Company:

Satin Exotic LLC is a high-volume eCommerce and SaaS company based in the US. We are looking for a confident, professional customer service representative to handle our inbound and outbound customer calls.



Responsibilities:

- Handle customer service calls using Grasshopper (VoIP)

- Answer questions related to orders, accounts, subscriptions, and services

- De-escalate and resolve customer issues on the first call when possible

- Log all call details and follow up on unresolved cases

- Work alongside the
 support team for a seamless customer experience



Requirements:

- Fluent spoken English with a clear, professional phone presence

- Previous phone-based customer support experience with a US company

- Experience using VoIP platforms (Grasshopper or similar)

- Able to handle high call volume

- Quiet, noise-free work environment with stable internet

- Available during US business hours

title: LinkedIn Lead Generation Specialist
description:
We are looking for a results-driven LinkedIn Lead Generation Specialist based in the Philippines to help us grow our pipeline through outbound LinkedIn outreach.



RESPONSIBILITIES:

- Send personalized LinkedIn connection requests to targeted prospects daily

- Follow up with accepted connections via messaging and InMail

- Craft and send compelling InMail messages to reach prospects outside your network

- Qualify leads based on provided Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) criteria

- Track outreach activity and results in a shared spreadsheet or CRM

- Provide daily/weekly updates on outreach performance and pipeline



REQUIREMENTS:

- Must have an active, well-established personal LinkedIn account with 500+ connections

- Proven experience in LinkedIn lead generation, outbound sales, or similar role

- Excellent written English communication skills

- Familiarity with LinkedIn Sales Navigator is a plus

- Ability to write personalized, non-spammy outreach messages

- Detail-oriented with strong organizational skills

- Reliable internet connection and own device

- Available to work during US business hours (flexible)



NICE TO HAVE:

- Experience with CRM tools (GHL, HubSpot, Airtable, Notion, etc.)

- Prior experience in B2B lead generation or appointment setting

- Knowledge of any specific industry niche (will be discussed during interview)



Please include your LinkedIn profile URL when applying so we can review your account.

title: TikTok Shop Virtual Assistant (Brand Collaborations)
description:
I am looking for a Virtual Assistant to help manage my TikTok Shop collaborations with brands.



I am an active TikTok Shop affiliate generating over $70k in monthly GMV, and I receive many collaboration invites from brands. I need someone to help review these opportunities, communicate with brands, and organize potential retainers / collaborations.



This is a long-term opportunity for the right person.



RESPONSIBILITIES

• Review daily TikTok Shop collaboration invites

• Respond to brands through TikTok Shop messages with a focus on looking for retainers

• Request product samples when appropriate

• Track brand conversations and deals in a spreadsheet

• Identify high-potential products

• Help organize products for upcoming videos



REQUIREMENTS

• Experience with TikTok Shop Affiliate platform (preferred)

• Experience with influencer outreach or e-commerce

• Good written English

• Organized and reliable



WORKLOAD

Approximately 1–2 hours per day



COMPENSATION

Monthly salary $150 – $300 depending on experience



TO APPLY

Please answer the following:



1. Have you worked with TikTok Shop affiliate before?

2. Have you worked with influencers or creators?

3. What experience do you have with brand collaborations?



Please include the word “TikTok” in the first line of your application so I know you read the full job post.

title: Experienced Direct Response Copywriter ($2,000 – $4,000 Per Month)
description:
Work Hours: Full-time, Monday to Friday, normal Philippine working hours



Young Publisher | 



We’re an international digital publishing company hiring from the Philippines for over 5 years.

We have 50+ tea
mbers worldwide and 200+ verified reviews with a 4.9 average rating.

We build long-term partnerships, not short-term gigs.

We don't disappear, we pay on time



We’re looking for an experienced direct response copywriter who can:

- Take full ownership of performance-driven campaigns

- Write
s that get opened, read, and clicked

- Create Ads that stop people from scrolling.

- Craft persuasive copy that drives readers to act.



This is a full-time remote role with clear growth opportunities. You’ll start with
s and ads, and as you prove yourself, move into sales pages and VSLs.



What you’ll do



- Write broadcast
s and automated sequences

- Create Meta ad copy and video scripts

- Help produce ebooks and lead magnets using AI tools

- Progress into sales pages and VSL scripts for launches



Why is this role different?



- You’ll receive direct feedback from an 8-figure copywriter. This is a serious opportunity to sharpen your skills fast.

- You’ll also get access to premium courses and AI communities. We invest in our team because we want long-term growth.

- We encourage AI tools — but only with strong critical thinking. This is not a beginner role.



Essentials



- Full-time, Monday to Friday, Philippine standard working hours

- Long-term position with growth into sales pages and VSLs

- $2,000–$4,000 USD per month, depending on experience

- Fully remote

- Reliable, on-time payments every two weeks via Wise



Requirements



- At least 2 years of direct response copywriting experience (not blog or content writing)

- Proven results: open rates, CTR, conversions, ROAS

- Experience writing for coaches, course creators, or info product businesses

- Native-level English for US, UK, or Australian audiences

- Strong understanding of hooks, emotional triggers, objection handling, and CTAs

- Experience with Meta ad copy and video scripts

- Ability to adapt to different brand voices

- Comfortable using AI tools with critical thinking

- Strong communication skills and independence

- Reliable, responsive, proactive, and coachable



Hiring process



#1: Paid test task

#2: Interview

#3: Paid test month at 50% salary



We’re looking for professionals who know their craft and want long-term growth.



How to apply



Apply via our Typeform here: 



Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.



Young Publisher



P.S. Young Publisher is the recruitment company. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: YouTube Specialist
description:
We are looking for a YouTube Specialist who understands how to turn video content into a high-performing YouTube channel. This role focuses on editing, optimizing, and strategically managing YouTube content so videos rank in search, drive consistent views, and grow subscriber audiences.



The ideal candidate understands YouTube SEO, audience retention, and content packaging (titles, thumbnails, descriptions) and knows how to optimize both individual videos and entire channels for discoverability and growth.



Key Responsibilities

YouTube Video Editing



Edit long-form and short-form YouTube content to maximize viewer retention.

Cut, pace, and structure videos to maintain engagement and reduce drop-off.

Add graphics, captions, sound effects, and transitions that enhance storytelling.

Repurpose long-form content into YouTube Shorts where appropriate.



YouTube SEO & Optimization



Optimize video titles, descriptions, and tags using YouTube SEO best practices.

Conduct keyword research to identify ranking opportunities.

Structure video metadata to improve search ranking and discoverability.

Implement YouTube best practices for thumbnails, descriptions, and CTAs.



Channel Optimization



Audit existing YouTube channels to identify opportunities for growth.

Optimize channel layout, playlists, and content organization.

Improve channel branding, descriptions, and keyword targeting.

Implement strategies that improve watch time, click-through rate, and subscriber growth.



Content Performance Analysis



Monitor analytics including:

Click-through rate (CTR)

Audience retention

Watch time

Subscriber conversion

Identify patterns and recommend improvements.

Develop optimization strategies based on performance data.



Content Strategy Support



Help plan content that aligns with YouTube search demand and trending topics.

Recommend video formats and structures that perform well on the platform.

Collaborate on thumbnail and title strategies that increase click-through rate.



Qualifications



Proven experience editing YouTube videos and growing YouTube channels

Strong understanding of YouTube SEO and ranking factors

Experience with video editing software such as:

Adobe Premiere Pro

Final Cut Pro

DaVinci Resolve

or similar tools



Familiarity with tools like:

TubeBuddy

VidIQ

YouTube Studio Analytics

Understanding of audience retention, watch time, and algorithm signals

Ability to identify opportunities to improve video packaging and discoverability



Preferred Skills

Experience managing YouTube channels from launch to growth

Thumbnail design experience

Knowledge of YouTube Shorts optimization

Experience with creator brands, podcasts, or educational content

Ability to recommend content formats that drive consistent channel growth



What Success Looks Like



Videos rank for targeted keywords in YouTube search

Improved click-through rates and audience retention

Consistent subscriber growth

A well-organized channel optimized for discoverability



How to Apply



Please include:

Examples of YouTube channels you have worked on

Links to videos you edited

A short explanation of how you helped a video or channel grow

title: Client Coach (Giving Feedback): $1,100 USD START RATE
description:
Start rate: $935 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,100 a month)



Paid every two weeks via Wise.



ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company working with content creators and online brands.



BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 8 hours daily, Monday-Friday; 40 hours a week

- Flexible schedule: Choose your own hours, as long as you show up for the daily meeting (MANDATORY)

- Stable income: Long-term role with regular, on-time payments

- Supportive team: Collaborative environment without micromanagement

- Growth path: Opportunities to increase responsibilities and earnings

- 100% remote: Work-from-home setup



TASKS



Client Support (maintaining 40-50 total clients):



- Run kickoff calls with new clients using our proven script

- Review client content and give actionable feedback

- Answer client messages within 24 hours

- Host weekly group calls and 1-on-1 coaching sessions

- Help clients overcome content blocks and limiting beliefs



Progress Tracking:



- Update daily/weekly reports

- Track client progress and next steps

- Join daily team check-ins

- Ensure clients follow strategies consistently



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)



- C1+ English (written and spoken) with no accent

- Strong communication skills

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable internet and a quiet workspace

- Accountability mindset and deadline commitment



IMPORTANT



When recording a Loom video as part of your application:



- Camera must show your FACE & SCREEN

- Treat it as a LIVE interview with the Hiring Manager

- Have a professional background

- Have clear audio

- Wear business-casual attire



BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED)



- Content creation and social media experience

- Knowledge of Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts

- Regular usage of AI tools (ChatGPT, CapCut)



WHY JOIN US?



- Start rate: $935 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,100 a month)

Note: More experienced CSMs earn between $1,800 and $2,500 after 6-12 months.

- Performance bonuses: Up to $900+ additional monthly based on:

- Client retention rates

- Task completion metrics

- Quality of feedback

- Team collaboration

- Payments: Twice per month via Wise directly to your bank

- Tools access: We'll cover all the needed tools

- Work-life balance: No graveyard shifts

- Professional growth: Regular feedback and skill development



HOW TO APPLY



1: Message us on OnlineJobs.ph with "CSM" as the message title



2: Include ONLY the following in your message:



#1: Your CV.

#2: Your years of experience with short-form content.

#3: Your years of experience with client management.

#4: One sentence on why you're a good fit for this role.

#5: Your portfolio.



Note: Messages that do not follow this format will NOT be reviewed.



P.S. Young Publisher is the recruitment company. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Shopify Store Operator - Supplement Brand (DTC Expansion)
description:
About Us

We run a growing supplement brand currently selling on Amazon. After a successful launch on the marketplace, we're ready to expand into direct-to-consumer through Shopify. We're looking for an experienced Shopify operator to own this channel from the ground up.



The Role

This is an ownership-level position. You'll be responsible for building, managing, and scaling a high-converting single-product Shopify store for our supplement brand. You'll handle everything from the initial buildout through ongoing operations, advertising, and customer experience.



This is not a one-off project. The long-term vision is for this to become a full DTC operation with a team built under you as we scale.



What You'll Own

Store Build & Design

Design and launch a clean, high-converting single-product Shopify store

Optimize the storefront for conversions, mobile experience, and brand consistency



Fulfillment & Integrations

Set up and manage fulfillment through Amazon Merchant Fulfilled Network (MFN)

Connect all necessary integrations between Shopify and our existing Amazon operations



Advertising & Growth

Build and manage Google Shopping and Google Ads campaigns to drive traffic and sales

Optimize ad spend for profitability and scale winning campaigns over time



Operations & Customer Service

Handle day-to-day store operations including order management, returns, and customer inquiries

Monitor store performance and report on key metrics (revenue, ROAS, margin, etc.)



Scaling & Team Building

As the store grows, you'll help build out a small team under you to support operations

Continuously identify opportunities to improve conversion rates, expand product offerings, and grow the channel





Proven experience building and scaling Shopify stores (portfolio or case studies preferred)

Hands-on experience running Google Shopping and Google Ads campaigns profitably

Familiarity with Amazon MFN fulfillment or similar multi-channel fulfillment setups

Experience in the supplement, health, or wellness niche is a strong plus

Strong understanding of DTC metrics: CAC, LTV, ROAS, AOV, conversion rate

Self-starter who can operate independently with minimal oversight

Clear communicator who provides regular updates and reporting



To Apply

Please include:



A brief overview of Shopify stores you've built or managed (links appreciated)

Your experience with Google Shopping/Ads, including any performance metrics you can share

Any experience with supplement or health/wellness brands

Your availability and preferred engagement structure

Loom Video of why you are a good fit (No Video No Interview!)

title: Web Designer / Web Developer (Remote – Full Time)
description:
About Us



Ashoori Law is a fast-growing U.S. immigration law firm helping individuals and businesses worldwide navigate the U.S. immigration process. Our team serves clients across the globe and is committed to delivering exceptional legal services and client experiences.



We are looking for a talented, detail-oriented Web Designer / Web Developer who can design and develop visually stunning, conversion-focused, and high-performing websites for multiple brands within our organization.



Position Summary



The Web Designer / Web Developer will be responsible for designing, building, optimizing, and maintaining modern websites that deliver excellent user experiences and fast performance. You will work closely with our marketing and content teams to ensure brand consistency, high conversion rates, and optimal website functionality.



Key Responsibilities

Design and develop visually engaging websites using WordPress (Beaver Builder) and Webflow

Build wireframes, mockups, and prototypes using Figma

Ensure all websites load in under 2 seconds on desktop and mobile

Optimize page speed, images, hosting, caching, and code

Create SEO-friendly website structures (metadata, schema markup, headings, URL preservation)

Collaborate with marketing and content teams to maintain brand consistency

Continuously update, troubleshoot, and maintain website performance

Apply UX, UI, and CRO best practices to improve user engagement and conversions

Stay updated with the latest web design trends, tools, and technologies



Requirements

Proven experience designing websites using WordPress, Webflow, and Beaver Builder

Strong portfolio of modern, high-performing website designs

Advanced skills in Figma

Expertise in speed optimization (CDN, caching, minification, lazy loading)

Strong understanding of typography, layout, responsive design, and accessibility

Knowledge of HTML/CSS for advanced styling and troubleshooting

Understanding of SEO fundamentals and technical requirements

Excellent communication skills and ability to collaborate with a team



Preferred Qualifications

Experience designing conversion-focused landing pages

Knowledge of WCAG accessibility standards

Experience using PageSpeed Insights, GTmetrix, and WebPageTest

Ability to create subtle animations and interactive elements



What We Offer

Competitive monthly compensation

title: Video Content Creator
description:
Video Content Creator



Part-Time Position — eCommerce & Social Media (Full Time is an option after trial period)



We are looking for a creative, resourceful, and committed Video Content Creator*to join a growing e-commerce company focused on developing innovative products that solve everyday problems.



This role is centered around creating engaging video content for social media platforms including Instagram, TikTok,
, and YouTube Shorts. The ideal candidate will have an intuitive understanding of visual storytelling, product marketing, and modern AI-assisted content creation tools.



This individual will work directly with the CEO and help transform ideas, raw footage, images, and product concepts into compelling short-form video content designed to educate, entertain, and convert viewers into customers.



The ideal candidate enjoys experimenting with new tools, understanding trends, and finding creative ways to showcase products through video.



---



Core Responsibilities



The primary responsibilities for the Video Content Creator include the following tasks, listed in order of priority.



---



Video Content Creation & Editing (Primary Responsibility)



The Video Content Creator will be responsible for producing short-form video content for social media and digital marketing channels.



This includes:



* Editing raw video footage into engaging short-form content

* Creating videos from existing images, product footage, and lifestyle media

* Utilizing AI tools to generate, enhance, or assist with video creation

* Producing vertical videos optimized for TikTok, Instagram Reels,
, and YouTube Shorts

* Adding text overlays, captions, sound effects, music, and transitions

* Developing videos that clearly communicate product benefits and use cases

* Creating content designed to hook viewers within the first few seconds



The goal is to consistently produce authentic, engaging, and informative video content that tells a clear product story.



---



AI-Assisted Video Development



The right candidate will be comfortable working with modern AI creative tools to enhance productivity and creativity.



Examples may include:



* AI video generation tools

* AI voiceovers

* AI scripting assistance

* AI image-to-video tools

* Automated captioning and subtitle generation

* AI-assisted editing workflows



We are looking for someone who enjoys experimenting with emerging technology and integrating it into creative workflows.



---



Product Storytelling & Concept Development



A key part of this role is understanding how to communicate the story and benefit of a product visually.



This includes:



* Reviewing product features and identifying the most compelling customer benefits

* Creating short video concepts that highlight real-world use

* Developing simple storyboards or outlines for videos

* Understanding the differences between educational, entertaining, and promotional content



The goal is to create videos that demonstrate the product solving a real problem.



---



Social Media Content Development



The Video Content Creator will assist with the development of social media content across multiple platforms.



Responsibilities include:



* Producing a steady flow of short-form video content

* Helping test different creative formats and messaging

* Adapting videos for different social platforms

* Creating multiple variations of successful content



We are looking for someone who understands how to capture attention and encourage engagement on social platforms.



---



Secondary Responsibilities



Depending on skill level and interests, additional tasks may include:



* Assisting with image and video assets used in Amazon listings

* Creating videos for product pages and website content

* Helping organize creative assets and media files

* Contributing ideas for future video campaigns or product storytelling

* Assisting with development of longer-form videos or product demonstrations



---



Experience / Competencies



The ideal candidate will have experience or familiarity with the following:



* Video editing software (CapCut, Adobe Premiere, Final Cut, or similar)

* Creating content for TikTok, Instagram Reels, or YouTube Shorts

* AI creative tools for video, image, or audio generation

* Basic understanding of visual storytelling and product marketing

* Experience working with Canva or similar design tools

* Ability to organize files and manage creative assets

* Strong communication and willingness to collaborate



Additional assets include:



* Experience working with e-commerce brands

* Experience creating product videos

* Familiarity with Amazon or Shopify content

* Experience with Photoshop or Illustrator

* Understanding of social media trends and viral formats



---



What We Are Looking For



The right individual for this position will be:



* Creative and visually intuitive

* Comfortable experimenting with new tools and ideas

* Organized and able to manage multiple creative projects

* Interested in product storytelling and problem-solving products

* Excited about helping build a growing brand



This person should be able to follow clear guidelines when needed, while also feeling comfortable contributing their own creative ideas and approaches to improve content and workflow.



Over time, the candidate may also help develop standard operating procedures (SOPs) for video creation and content production workflows.



---



Work Environment



* Part-time role

* Work directly with the CEO and product development team

* Opportunity to grow with a rapidly expanding e-commerce brand



---



If you enjoy creating engaging video content, experimenting with AI tools, and telling compelling product stories, we would love to hear from you.

title: Experience Bookkeeper
description:
About Us

PickUpRide is a growing private transportation company based in California, USA, specializing in airport transportation, hotel transfers, and group rides.

We are building a strong financial team and are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Bookkeeper in the Philippines who wants a long-term position with a stable company.

If you are organized, trustworthy, and experienced with QuickBooks Online, we would love to work with you.

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities

You will support our financial operations and ensure accurate bookkeeping. Every work must accurate in your reports to closed them each time.

Daily & Weekly Tasks:

• Record and categorize transactions in QuickBooks Online

• Reconcile bank accounts and credit cards

• Track company expenses and receipts

• Manage Accounts Payable and Accounts Receivable

• Prepare invoices and monitor payments

• Track refunds, chargebacks, and adjustments

• Maintain organized financial records

• Assist with monthly financial reports

Monthly Tasks:

• Prepare Profit & Loss (P&L) reports

• Reconcile financial statements

• Assist with financial data for tax preparation

• Support management with financial insights

________________________________________

Required Qualifications

To qualify for this role, you must have:

? 3+ years bookkeeping experience

? Strong experience with QuickBooks Online

? Good understanding of basic accounting principles

? Experience working with US companies preferred

? Strong attention to detail

? Excellent English communication skills

? Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

________________________________________

Technical Requirements

You must have:

• Fast and reliable internet connection

• Quiet and professional work environment

• Laptop or desktop computer

• Backup internet connection preferred

________________________________________

Work Schedule

We prefer candidates who can work during US business hours (Pacific Time), but some flexibility is possible.

________________________________________

What We Offer

? Long-term stable position

? Friendly and supportive team

? Opportunity to grow into Senior Bookkeeper / Financial Manager

? Performance bonuses based on results

We are not looking for short-term freelancers.

We want someone who wants to grow with the company long term.

________________________________________

How to Apply

To be considered, please include the following:

1?? A short video introduction (1-2 minutes)

Tell us about your bookkeeping experience and why you are a good fit.

2?? Your resume

3?? Answer the following question:

What is the difference between Accounts Payable and Accounts Receivable?

Which of the following is considered an asset?

What is the Profit & Loss statement used for?

What is the difference between Cash Accounting and Accrual Accounting?

If a customer pays an invoice, which account increases?

What should you do if a bank transaction does not match the accounting record?

If expenses are greater than revenue, what does that mean for the business?

How often should bank and credit card accounts be reconciled?

What is the most important responsibility of a bookkeeper?



Applications without these requirements will not be reviewed.



We look forward to working with a dedicated and trustworthy bookkeeping professional.

title: Bilingual (English/Spanish) Lead Caller & Appointment Setter (Facebook Leads – Home Buyers)
description:
We are a fast-growing real estate and mortgage company based in California looking for a bilingual (English/Spanish) Virtual Assistant to call and follow up with
 leads.



These leads are people who have requested more information about buying a home, our available properties (inventory), and financing/loan programs.

Your job is to contact them quickly, build rapport, ask basic questions, and book an appointment with our team.



You are NOT expected to explain mortgage programs in detail.

Your job is to: call, qualify lightly, and schedule.



What you will do (daily responsibilities)



Call new
 leads within 1–2 minutes after they come in (speed matters)



Speak with leads in English and Spanish



Ask basic questions and understand what they need



Book an appointment on our calendar (or transfer the call to our team)



Send follow-up text messages when leads don’t answer



Follow up multiple times with leads over several days



Update notes and statuses in our CRM after every attempt



Basic questions you will ask



Are you looking to buy a home now or just exploring?



What city/area are you looking in?



When would you like to move forward?



Are you currently working / have steady income?



Do you know your approximate credit score?



Have you spoken with a lender before?



Requirements



Fluent English + Spanish (must be strong in both)



Confident and friendly on the phone (not shy)



Experience with lead calling / appointment setting / sales is preferred



Professional communication and strong follow-up skills



Reliable internet + quiet workspace + good headset



Able to work Pacific Time (US hours)



Organized and consistent (we care about accuracy and notes)



Bonus (nice to have)



Real estate, mortgage, insurance, or solar calling experience



CRM experience (any CRM is fine)



How to apply (IMPORTANT)



To make sure you read the job post, start your application with the word MortgagePro.



Also include:



A short voice recording introducing yourself in English and Spanish



Your internet speed



Your availability (hours/timezone)



Any experience calling leads or appointment setting

title: Virtual Receptionist VA (Remote) | Fast Hiring – 24-Hour Review
description:
Important: Our application process moves quickly. If you are selected to proceed to the next interview stages, you must be able to respond promptly. Candidates who do not respond in a timely manner may be passed over.



We are currently seeking a Remote Spa Receptionist to manage inbound calls and book spa appointments. This is a long-term, performance-based position. Calls are recorded and reviewed regularly. Continued placement in this role depends on accuracy, professionalism, booking success, reliable attendance, no missed calls during scheduled shifts, quick response times, and the ability to professionally manage complaints and de-escalate dissatisfied clients.



To apply: Please copy the questions below, paste them into your reply, and answer each question thoroughly.



(1) Location & Utilities: Where in the Philippines are you currently located? How often have you experienced power or internet outages in the past year? Do you have backup solutions (e.g., generator, mobile hotspot) to ensure your work is not affected?



(2) Home Setup: Will you be working from home? Is your workspace quiet and suitable for handling calls? Do you have your own computer or laptop? Please attach a screenshot of your current internet speed.



(3) Availability & Speed: Can you consistently work seven days a week, six hours per day, and remain available for the full shift without missed calls? How quickly do you typically answer inbound calls? What is your current typing speed in words per minute?



(4) Call & Complaint Experience: Describe your experience with answering inbound calls, booking or scheduling appointments, customer service, following scripts, and handling complaints. Provide one real example of how you de-escalated an upset client and the outcome.



(5) Tools & Systems: What programs, tools, phone systems, or VoIP platforms have you used for handling calls? Do you have any issues with background noise, power outages, or internet interruptions? How do you take notes and log client interactions during calls?



(6) Voice Recordings: Please submit two short voice recordings. Recording one should demonstrate booking an appointment from 7:00 PM to 8:00 PM with a total amount of $60. Recording two should demonstrate handling a double charge for a 90-minute massage where the client sees two $90 charges and is requesting a refund. Your tone should be calm, polite, and professional.



(7) Current Job: Do you currently have another job? If yes, where, how many hours per week, and what are your roles and tasks in that job?



(8) Schedule, Pay & Start Date: Are you able to work seven days a week, six hours per day, during Central Standard Time (CST) hours without conflicts? What is your expected hourly or monthly rate? What is your earliest physical start date if hired?



(9) Marketing, Design & Video: Do you have experience with online marketing, creating content using Canva, or producing short video clips such as
 Reels or similar platforms? Please describe your skills and provide samples of your previous work if available.



(10) Fit, Skills & Experience: Briefly introduce yourself and explain why you would be a good fit for this role. Include what you believe is most important when handling spa clients over the phone, especially during complaints, and what other skills or areas you have a lot of experience in.

description:
We are looking for a sharp, highly organized, and proactive Admin Assistant / Operations Specialist to serve as the primary Point of Contact (POC) for our COO. This is not a "data entry only" role; we need an "all-around" player who can audit processes, manage product launches, and ensure nothing falls through the cracks for our COO.



If you are the type of person who spots a mistake before it happens and loves creating order out of chaos, we want to talk to you.



Key Responsibilities

- Executive Support: Act as the gatekeeper for the COO. Monitor communications to ensure the COO never misses a critical message or deadline.

- Operational Audits: Conduct regular "Audits of Everything." This includes inventorying current processes, checking for bottlenecks, and ensuring SOPs are followed.

- CRM Management: Maintain and update our CRM, ensuring data integrity and smooth lead/customer flow.

Product Launch Coordination: Manage the administrative side of product launches, including timeline tracking, review monitoring, and task coordination.

- Financial Admin: Handle chargeback marking and tracking to protect the company’s bottom line.

- Process Improvement: Identify gaps in our current workflow and suggest (or implement) better ways to work.



Requirements

- Experience: At least 2+ years of experience as an Admin Assistant or Ops Coordinator (e-commerce experience is a huge plus).

- Tech Savvy: Proficient in CRM platforms, Microsoft Office (Word and Excel)

title: Real Estate Acquisitions Manager
description:
About Us

We are a dynamic real estate investment company specializing in multi-unit residential properties in Chicago. Our mission is to acquire and transform properties into high-quality spaces, contributing to the revitalization of Chicago’s communities. We are looking for a highly skilled and results-driven Real Estate Acquisitions Manager to help us acquire properties and expand our portfolio.



This role is highly results-driven—you will be responsible for hitting key weekly performance metrics (KPIs) and ensuring a consistent flow of high-quality leads.



Job Description

As our Lead Generation Specialist, you will play a crucial role in identifying, contacting, and nurturing potential property sellers. Your success in this role will be measured by your ability to meet and exceed our weekly KPIs:

? 3,000 sends per week (across SMS,
, ringless voi
, and other channels)

? 50 seller contacts per week (genuine conversations with property owners)

? 5 offers per week (qualified sellers receiving a purchase offer)



Your primary responsibilities will include:

-Managing & optimizing lead generation campaigns via SMS (BatchLeads), ringless voi
 (DropCowboy), and potentially other channels.

-Managing leads and follow-ups via our Podio CRM.

title: GHL Ops Implementer (Systems + Bot Logic + QA) — PH Day Shift (Long-Term)
description:
Role: GHL Ops Implementer (Systems + Bot Logic + QA) — PH Day Shift (Long-Term)

Hours: 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM Philippines time (Remote, no graveyard)

Type: Full-time, long-term. Not a side gig.



If you’re the kind of implementer who ships tested + documented systems (not just “set up”), this will feel like home.



What you’ll own

1) GoHighLevel Builds + Troubleshooting (Daily)

- Pipelines/stages + lifecycle logic

- Tags + custom fields + clean naming conventions

- Forms/surveys + lead capture flows

- Calendars + booking workflows (confirmations, reminders, no-show, reschedule)

- Workflows (If/Else logic, waits, stop conditions, internal notifications)

- Debugging: misfires, duplicates, missing field mapping, wrong triggers



2) Conversation AI Bot & Automation Build (Primary)

- Build structured flows: enquiry ? qualify ? CTA/booking intent ? escalation

- Maintain knowledge base / training content (clean, organised, easy to update)

- Safe fallback rules: unknown ? capture details ? notify staff (no guessing, no hallucinations)

- Improve flows based on real conversations (drop-offs, confusion points, repeated questions)



3) Project Management (Non-negotiable)

- Convert Loom/voice notes into a task plan (owners, deadlines, dependencies)

- Maintain tracker (ClickUp/Notion/Asana — tool doesn’t matter, discipline does)

- Weekly updates: Done / Next / Blockers / Decisions needed

- Changelog + handover docs (simple SOP + quick Loom walkthrough)

- Clear, reliable client communication



4) QA / Testing (Must)

- You test before shipping:

- New lead vs existing lead

- Edge cases (missing fields, random user replies, long delays)

- Stop conditions + duplicate triggers

- Pipeline movement + internal notifications

- You provide QA evidence (test notes + screenshots OR short Loom)



Definition of Done (how we work)

A build is only “done” when it has:

-QA evidence (notes + screenshots / short Loom)

- Changelog entry (what changed + why)

- Handover note (what to watch + where to edit next time)



Must-have skills

- Proven hands-on GHL experience (workflows + calendars + pipelines)

- Strong written English (clear, concise, structured)

- High ownership + detail obsession (testing + documentation)



Strong advantage

- GHL Certified Admin

- Webhooks/APIs basics (payloads, auth, debugging)

- Make/Zapier/n8n

- WhatsApp-first flow design patterns

- UTM / attribution basics

- Marketing background



Not a fit if…

- You need constant prompting

- You build without testing

- You dislike documentation/trackers

- You guess when unsure instead of escalating

- You’re juggling multiple agency clients and can’t commit long-term



Compensation + growth (read carefully)

- Salary band: PHP 27k –50k/ month (based on proof of work + paid practical test)

- Top of range is reserved for implementers who can own builds end-to-end with QA + documentation and minimal supervision.

- Performance reviews: 30 / 60 / 90 days with clear raise criteria (delivery + QA + rework rate).

- Stability: long-term role, PH day shift, clear process, clean handovers.



How to apply (follow exactly)

- Subject: GHL-OPS-READY

- Include: Resume/CV

- WhatsApp number

- Expected salary + earliest start date

- Weekly availability + timezone



Proof of work (required — choose ONE):

- Loom walkthrough of a workflow + calendar flow you built, OR

- Screenshots of workflows/pipelines (blur client names) + short explanation, OR

- Sample changelog/handover/SOP you wrote (redacted)



Answer these 3 questions (bullet points):

- You receive a 12-min Loom of requirements. How do you turn it into tasks and ship safely within 48 hours?

- A workflow fires twice. List likely causes + your debug steps.

- A user asks the bot something not in the knowledge base. What do you reply, and what do you log internally?



Only shortlisted applicants will contacted.

title: Virtual Medical Assistant (Bilingual – English/Spanish)
description:
We are seeking a bilingual (English/Spanish) detail-oriented Virtual Medical Assistant to support our neurology practice by conducting patient intake interviews and preparing comprehensive pre-charts for provider visits. This role is critical to ensuring clinical efficiency and high-quality patient care across our practice locations serving diverse Northern California communities. As the role develops, there is potential to expand responsibilities to include additional administrative support tasks.



Key Responsibilities



Patient Intake

• Conduct thorough telephonic intake interviews with new and returning patients in English or Spanish

• Walk patients through intake forms and accurately document responses in the EHR system

• Collect and verify patient demographics, insurance information, and medical history

• Gather detailed information on chief complaints, symptoms, and relevant medical background

• Coordinate collection of outside medical records and imaging

• Ensure all required documentation is complete prior to scheduled appointments

• Provide language support for Spanish-speaking patients to ensure clear communication and comprehensive data collection



Pre-Charting

• Prepare comprehensive pre-charts for all patient appointments (new patients, follow-ups, IV infusions, procedures)

• Review and integrate outside medical records from Care Everywhere and other sources

• Extract and document relevant lab results (TSH, Hemoglobin A1C, B12/Folate, LDL, etc.)

• Summarize imaging results (MRI, CTA, MRA, VNG, etc.) and place in appropriate chart sections

• Update History of Presenting Illness (HPI) with chronological visit information

• Copy forward and update previous office visit notes for follow-up appointments

• Track ordered tests, referrals, and pending results from previous visits

• Utilize EHR templates and smart phrases

• Ensure all pre-charts are completed and current the day before clinic



Additional Administrative Support (As Needed)



As you demonstrate proficiency in core responsibilities, there is opportunity to expand into additional administrative tasks, which may include:

• Insurance verification and prior authorization coordination

• Referral management and tracking

• Patient appointment scheduling and coordination

• Follow-up on pending tests, labs, and imaging results

• Coordination with external facilities and providers

• Patient communication for appointment reminders and result notifications

• Data entry and database management projects

• Support with compliance documentation and tracking

• Ad hoc administrative projects as assigned by Operations leadership



Required Qualifications

• Fluent bilingual proficiency in English and Spanish (speaking, reading, writing)

• Minimum 2-year experience in medical office administration or clinical documentation

• Strong working knowledge of medical terminology in both English and Spanish, particularly neurology terminology preferred

• Proficiency with Electronic Health Records (EHR) systems; Epic experience highly preferred

• Excellent attention to detail and ability to maintain accuracy in fast-paced environment

• Strong verbal communication skills for patient interactions in both languages

• Ability to work independently with minimal supervision

• Reliable high-speed internet connection and professional home office setup



Preferred Qualifications

• Medical Assistant (MA) certification or equivalent

• Prior experience in neurology, pain management, or specialist practice

• Familiarity with medical billing and coding concepts

• Experience with insurance verification and authorization processes

• Experience serving Spanish-speaking patient populations

• Proven ability to manage multiple priorities and adapt to changing responsibilities



Technical Skills

• Proficient in Epic or similar EHR platforms

• Comfortable navigating Care Everywhere and external records systems

• Strong computer skills including Microsoft Office Suite

• Ability to learn practice-specific templates and workflows quickly

• Adaptable to learning new software systems and administrative tools



Schedule & Compensation

• Hours: Full Time, 40 hours a week 8am-5pm PST (Hours may change), weekends may be required

• Time Zone: Must be able to work Pacific Standard Time business hours

• Compensation: $800 - $950 per month (based on experience)



Work Environment

• 100% remote position

• Must have dedicated, quiet workspace for conducting patient calls

• HIPAA-compliant work environment required

• Reliable technology and backup internet required



Core Competencies

• Language Proficiency: Professional fluency in medical terminology and patient communication in English and Spanish

• Accuracy: Meticulous attention to detail in documentation

• Time Management: Ability to prioritize and complete pre-charts on schedule

• Communication: Professional, empathetic phone manner with patients in both languages

• Cultural Competency: Ability to work effectively with diverse patient populations

• Adaptability: Flexible approach to changing priorities and provider preferences

• Initiative: Proactive problem-solver who can identify opportunities for process improvement

• Confidentiality: Strict adherence to HIPAA and patient privacy standards

• Accountability: Self-motivated with strong follow-through

title: Senior Interior Designer – 2D, 3D & Rendering Specialist
description:
We are looking for a mid-level Interior Designer with expertise in 2D drafting, 3D modelling, and high-quality rendering to support design development and documentation for residential and commercial projects. The ideal candidate can translate design concepts into accurate 2D drawings, detailed 3D models, and visually compelling renderings, delivering work independently with precision and accountability.



Key Responsibilities



2D Design Documentation:

-Develop detailed 2D drawings, including floor plans, space planning, elevations, sections, furniture layouts, and joinery details

-Produce cabinetry, interior construction, and finish details

-Ensure drawings are clear, accurate, and ready for construction

-Update and coordinate drawings throughout different design phases

-Maintain consistency and accuracy across all documentation



3D Modelling & Rendering:

-Build and maintain accurate 3D models to support design development

-Create high-quality renderings for client presentations and internal reviews

-Apply materials, textures, lighting, and camera settings effectively

-Revise models and renderings to reflect design updates and coordination changes



Design Development & Coordination:



-Collaborate with senior designers to refine design intent

-Identify and flag inconsistencies or construct issues in drawings and models

-Ensure alignment between 2D documentation, 3D models, and rendered visuals

-Assist in preparing client presentations and submission materials



Software & Technical Skills (Mandatory)



-AutoCAD – advanced proficiency

-SketchUp – advanced proficiency

-3D rendering software (Enscape, V-Ray, Lumion, Twinmotion) – proficient

-Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, InDesign) – working knowledge



Experience & Qualifications

-Degree in Interior Design or equivalent

-3–6 years of relevant interior design experience

-Proven track record in producing technical drawings, 3D models, and renderings

-Strong understanding of interior detailing and construction methodology

-Experience with residential and/or commercial projects

-Experience working with Singapore clients or exposure to Singapore industry standards is highly preferred due to the nature of the role.



Working Style & Expectations

-Capable of working independently with minimal supervision

-Detail-oriented, organised, and deadline-driven

-Open to feedback and able to implement design revisions

-Communicates reliably and maintains responsiveness in a remote setup

-Takes accountability for accuracy, coordination, and completeness of assigned work





Click this link to apply, 



Please submit your resume together with a portfolio showcasing your drafting works. Applications without a portfolio may not be considered.
