title: GHL & API Integration Specialist Full-Time · Remote (Philippines-based) · PH Day Shift · No Graveyard Shift · Long-Term
description:
Here it is — ready to copy and paste:



GHL & API Integration Specialist

Full-Time · Remote (Philippines-based) · PH Day Shift · No Graveyard Shift · Long-Term



THE ROLE

We're looking for a GHL & API Integration Specialist who owns the technical layer of our client builds — the integrations, webhooks, automation logic, and Conversation AI flows that connect GHL to the outside world.

This is NOT a general VA role. You must have real, hands-on experience building and debugging APIs, webhooks, and automation flows — not just using templates.

? PH Day Shift only — 10:00 AM to 7:00 PM Philippine time. No graveyard shift. No US or UK hours. 



AT A GLANCE



Location: Remote, Philippines-based

Work Hours: Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM PH time (NO graveyard shift)

Budget: PHP 35,000 – 50,000/month depending on experience

Commitment: Full-time, 40 hrs/week, long-term



WHAT YOU'LL OWN

Custom API Builds & Webhooks

-Design and build webhook triggers between GHL and external systems

-Write custom API calls (REST) to connect third-party platforms

-Build and test data flows: lead intake ? CRM tagging ? follow-up automation

-Debug failed webhooks, mis-mapped fields, and integration misfires

-Document all integrations with clear endpoint references and test evidence



Third-Party Integrations (Zapier / Make / n8n)

-Build automations connecting GHL to booking systems, payment gateways, Google Workspace, Slack, Notion, and
/Instagram Lead Ads

-Select the right tool per integration (Zapier vs Make vs n8n vs direct webhook)

-Monitor integration health and fix breakages proactively



GHL Conversation AI & Bot Logic

- Build structured Conversation AI flows: Enquiry ? Qualification ? Booking Intent ? Escalation

- Maintain knowledge bases with categorised FAQs and fallback handling

- Test bots across all scenarios — known queries, unknown queries, edge cases

- Connect Conversation AI outputs to CRM pipelines and tagging logic

- Zero hallucinations — bots must escalate cleanly when uncertain



QA, Documentation & Handover

- Test every build before marking it complete

- Write changelogs and handover notes so the GHL team can maintain systems

- Flag ambiguities before building — never guess on client logic





MUST-HAVE (Non-Negotiable — Missing Any One = No Fit)

- 2+ years hands-on GHL experience — pipelines, workflows, tags, calendars, forms, built for paying clients

- REST API experience — custom API calls, webhooks, payload handling

- Integration platform — real builds in Zapier, Make, or n8n (not just tutorials)

- GHL Conversation AI — built and tested native GHL Conversation AI flows with fallback logic

- WhatsApp automation — built WhatsApp sequences or integrated WhatsApp into CRM flows

- Agency or client-facing delivery — not just internal or personal projects

- Strong written English — communicates clearly, flags blockers early

- PH Day Shift — available 10 AM – 7 PM PH time, Monday to Friday



BONUS POINTS (Flag These Clearly in Your Application)

- n8n experience specifically

- Experience with Singapore, Australian, or UK clients

- GHL connected to payment systems (Stripe, PayNow, or similar)

-
 Lead Ads ? GHL pipeline builds

- 
 or other WhatsApp API platform experience

- Portfolio or Loom videos of real builds



RED FLAGS — We Will Not Proceed If:

- API experience is vague — "familiar with APIs" with no specifics

- GHL experience is generic with no named clients, verticals, or build types

- Only internal or personal projects — no paying client delivery

- Listed tools but cannot walk through a real build using them

- Job hopping every 2–3 months with no explanation



HOW TO APPLY

Send your application with ALL of the following. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.



CV or resume (Google Drive or PDF link)

Portfolio, screenshots, or Loom video showing a real GHL + API build

Your WhatsApp number

Expected monthly salary (PHP)

Earliest available start date

Answers to all three questions below



Application Questions:

Q1: Describe one real API integration you built — what two systems were connected, what tool did you use (Zapier / Make / n8n / direct webhook), and what business problem did it solve?

Q2: A webhook from GHL to an external CRM is firing twice for every contact. Walk me through how you would debug and fix it.

Q3: Have you built a GHL Conversation AI flow? If yes, describe the flow structure — how did you handle fallback when the bot didn't know the answer?

?? Applications without a portfolio/Loom AND answers to all three questions will not be shortlisted, regardless of experience.

title: Senior Accountant
description:
We are seeking a highly experienced Senior / Manager Accounting Lead to take full ownership of the accounting function for a growing organization in the technology / SaaS industry. This role will serve as the primary accounting point of contact, responsible for ensuring accurate GAAP-compliant reporting, improving close processes, and supporting system improvements including NetSuite implementation readiness. The ideal candidate has strong technical accounting expertise, hands-on leadership in managing end-to-end accounting operations, and the ability to operate independently while collaborating with leadership teams.



Job Responsibilities:

Full End-to-End Accounting Ownership

Manage general ledger activities and maintain accurate financial records.

Lead month-end, quarter-end, and year-end close processes.

Handle revenue recognition under ASC 606, preferably within SaaS/software environments.

Manage accruals, prepaids, deferred revenue, and other accounting adjustments.

Oversee fixed assets accounting and capitalization where applicable.

Record payroll journal entries and perform reconciliations.

Supervise AP/AR processes and cash management activities.

Prepare financial statements including Balance Sheet, Income Statement, and Cash Flow.



Operational & Ad-Hoc Accounting Support

Support insurance renewal applications and regulatory documentation.

Assist with government surveys and reporting requirements.

Coordinate miscellaneous tax compliance and regulatory filings.

Provide audit support and maintain proper documentation.

Assist with vendor onboarding and banking documentation requests.

Prepare reports for leadership, investors, or board members when needed.



Process Improvement & Internal Controls

Develop and document accounting policies and procedures.

Implement document retention and financial record management protocols.

Improve month-end close checklists and timelines.

Standardize reconciliation processes and supporting schedules.

Strengthen internal controls and financial oversight.

Identify opportunities for automation and workflow improvements.



NetSuite Implementation Support

Provide accounting guidance for chart of accounts and revenue recognition logic.

Assist with data migration validation and parallel close processes.

Ensure accurate accounting configuration within NetSuite.

Coordinate with implementation partners and internal stakeholders.



Quality Assurance & Escalation

Maintain full reconciliation for all balance sheet accounts.

Conduct internal review of financials before finalization.

Escalate complex GAAP matters to senior finance leadership when necessary.



Work Expectations

Maintain full-time availability (40+ hours per week).

Be responsive to leadership and capable of working independently.

Provide support during critical deadlines, including occasional weekend work.



Qualifications:

5–7+ years of progressive accounting experience.

Strong knowledge of US GAAP and accounting standards.

Experience in the technology, SaaS, or software industry preferred.

Proven experience with ASC 606 revenue recognition.

NetSuite experience is highly preferred.

Strong reconciliation skills and attention to detail.

Ability to work independently as an individual contributor.

CPA designation preferred but not required.



Requirements:

Updated Resume/CV.

Reliable internet connection and personal computer.

Ability to work in a dynamic, fast-paced environment.

UPS or battery backup to ensure work continuity during power interruptions.



Benefits:

Competitive salary with performance-based incentives.

Remote work 

Opportunity to work with high-performing global teams.

Career growth and exposure to advanced financial systems.

HMO coverage for the employee and immediate family members.



Join our team now and be part of the top 1% talent in the Philippines! ????

title: Full-Time Bookkeeper (Remote) Medical / Specialist Clinic Experience Required | Genie + Xero
description:
Full-Time Bookkeeper (Remote)

Medical / Specialist Clinic Experience Required | Genie + Xero



Employment Type: Full-Time (40 Hours Per Week)

Location: Remote (Offshore)

Industry: Specialist Medical Practice



About the Role



Paul Group Virtual is recruiting on behalf of a well-established Australian specialist medical clinic seeking an experienced Full-Time Bookkeeper.



This is not a general bookkeeping role.



We require someone who understands the financial workflows of a medical or specialist clinic environment, including patient billing, health fund reconciliations, Medicare processes, and practice management systems.



Strong English and clear communication are absolutely non-negotiable.



Immediate start available for the right candidate.



???? NON-NEGOTIABLE REQUIREMENTS



Do not apply unless you have:



Proven bookkeeping experience within a medical clinic, specialist practice, or comparable healthcare environment



Strong working experience using Genie Practice Management Software



Strong working experience using Xero



Excellent spoken and written English



Experience communicating professionally with Australian teams



If you do not have Genie and Xero experience, please do not apply.



Key Responsibilities



Daily bookkeeping and financial reconciliation



Managing accounts payable and receivable



Bank and credit card reconciliations



Medicare and health fund reconciliation



Processing specialist billing and patient accounts



Payroll support (if required)

Month-end reporting



Maintaining financial accuracy and compliance



Liaising with practice management and admin teams



You must be comfortable working within a structured, compliance-heavy medical environment.



Systems Used (Mandatory Experience Required)



Genie (Practice Management Software)



Xero (Accounting Software)



Yealink phone system with Linkus (preferred but not mandatory)



Please clearly outline your level of experience with each system.



Ideal Candidate Profile



We are looking for someone who is:



Highly detail-oriented



Calm and structured



Confidential and professional



Experienced in medical billing workflows



Comfortable working with Australian financial standards



Proactive in identifying discrepancies



Able to communicate clearly with practice managers and directors



This is a senior, trusted position.



Employment Details



Full-Time (40 hours per week)



Long-term position



Australian business hours alignment preferred



Competitive hourly rate (AUD, based on experience)



Paid weekly



STRICT APPLICATION REQUIREMENTS



To be considered, you MUST submit:



A summary of your medical or specialist clinic bookkeeping experience



Confirmation of your experience using Genie (years + duties performed)



Confirmation of your experience using Xero (years + functions performed)



A Loom video (3–5 minutes) answering the questions below

Confirmation of full-time availability



Internet speed test screenshot



Applications without a Loom video will not be reviewed.



Loom Video – Please Answer the Following:

How did you use Genie in your previous role?

Have you reconciled Medicare and health fund payments?



How do you ensure financial accuracy in a compliance-heavy environment?



Why should we trust you with full financial oversight?



What is your requested hourly rate in AUD?



This is an opportunity to become a key financial support person within a respected Australian specialist clinic.



We are looking for someone experienced, professional, and ready for long-term stability.



Serious applicants only.

title: Graphic Website Designers: $6 to $8 per hour
description:
Senior Graphic Designer: Custom Website Design & AI-Enhanced Creative (Remote / Freelance ? Fulltime Potential)



We’re a growing US-based web design and digital marketing agency looking for experienced senior-level graphic designers who specialize in custom website design and modern digital branding.



This role is for designers who combine high-level creative thinking, strong execution skills, and professional reliability, and who are excited to leverage AI-assisted design tools thoughtfully (not as shortcuts).



If you take pride in polished, strategic design work and thrive in a professional, fast-moving creative environment, we’d love to connect.



???? What You’ll Be Responsible For: 



+ Custom Website Design (Primary Focus)



+ Designing high-end, custom website UI concepts (not template-heavy work)



+ Translating brand strategy into clean, conversion-focused visuals



+ Creating design systems, layout structures, and scalable visual patterns



+ AI-Enhanced Creative Workflow



+ Using AI tools (ChatGPT, Midjourney, DALL·E, etc.) responsibly for ideation



+ Refining AI-generated concepts into fully professional deliverables



+ Maintaining originality, consistency, and brand integrity



+ Marketing & Brand Graphics



+ Creating A+ content, landing page visuals, digital marketing assets, and brand materials



+ Working across web, social, and occasional print production needs



+ Professional Delivery & Collaboration



+ Managing deadlines independently



+ Communicating clearly with design, marketing, and development teams



+ Maintaining consistent design quality across projects



? What We’re Specifically Looking For (Senior-Level Traits)



+ Strategic Design Thinking: You don’t just make things look good; you solve business and UX problems visually.



+ Attention to Detail: Pixel precision, typography mastery, spacing discipline, and consistent design systems.



+ Professional Reliability: Strong communication, deadline ownership, and proactive project management.



+ Creative Maturity: Ability to accept feedback, iterate quickly, and maintain quality under deadlines.



+ AI Design Judgment: Understanding when AI helps, and when true design expertise matters more.



???? Required Skills & Experience (Strict Criteria)



Please apply only if you meet most of these:



+ Proven experience designing custom websites (portfolio required)



+ Strong Figma workflow (components, auto-layout, design systems)



+ Adobe Creative Suite proficiency (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign)



+ Strong typography, color theory, layout, and UX awareness



+ Experience designing for marketing conversion (landing pages, A+ content, etc.)



+ Familiarity with AI design tools and prompt workflows



+ Understanding of print production basics (CMYK, bleed, DPI, export prep)



Big Plus:



+ Experience working with web developers or design handoff processes



+ Branding and identity design experience



+ Motion/interactive design awareness



???? Application Requirements (Carefully Reviewed)



To be considered, please include these required materials:



+ Your resume or CV



+ Portfolio of graphic design work



+ At least 5 custom website designs you personally created



Short introduction covering:



+ Your experience level



+ Why you’re a strong fit for this role



+ Your primary design tools and workflow



Also Include:



+ Your availability (hours/week)



+ Your remote workspace setup



?? Applications without real website design samples will not be reviewed.

?? Template-only portfolios or heavily AI-generated work without refinement may be declined.



???? Who Typically Succeeds Here



Designers who:



+ Think like senior creatives, not production-only designers



+ Care deeply about design quality and craft



+ Communicate professionally and reliably



+ Want long-term collaboration rather than one-off gigs



+ Enjoy combining traditional design skill with modern AI tools



If you’re passionate about thoughtful design, continuous growth, and meaningful creative work, we’d love to see your portfolio.



Thank you,



Phong (Peter) Nguyen

title: Real Estate Executive Assistant & Property Manager (Full-Time, US CST)
description:
About Us:

We are a Chicago-based real estate investment and property management company. We acquire properties, manage a small portfolio of short-term rentals, and utilize data-driven systems to find new leads. We are looking for a dedicated, long-term, full-time Executive Assistant to become the operational backbone of our company and handle a wide variety of administrative tasks.



IMPORTANT: We are looking for a direct hire. NO AGENCIES. We want someone who is looking for a stable, single-client home.



What You Will Do (The Day-to-Day):

This is a dynamic role. Some days you will be heavily focused on data, and other days you will be doing general administrative research or organizing files. Your responsibilities will include:



General Administration & Ad-Hoc Projects (The Bulk of Your Time): Managing the executive inbox, organizing Google Drive folders, researching new software/tools, creating and updating Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs), and general data entry.



Financial Accuracy: Handling receipts, invoices, and expense tracking. You must be able to cross-reference actual receipts against spreadsheets with 100?curacy. Accuracy is more important to us than speed.



Short-Term Rental Management (1-2 Hours/Week): Managing guest communications via Hospitable, handling Airbnb claims, and coordinating seamlessly with our local cleaning crews (Turno) and handymen in Chicago.



CRM Management & Lead Gen (1-2 Hours/Day): Maintaining our Podio database, running property data (like geocoding or zoning), and ensuring our workflows stay organized. There is also potential for Inside Sales (ISA) work, such as calling leads or coordinating with answering services.



Requirements (Non-Negotiable):



Hours: You must work full-time during US Central Standard Time (CST) business hours. This means working the graveyard shift in the Philippines.



Infrastructure: You must have a primary high-speed internet connection AND a reliable backup internet source (mobile hotspot/pocket WiFi). You must also have backup power (UPS or generator) to work through brownouts/typhoons.



Tech Comfort: You don't need to be a developer, but you must be comfortable learning new platforms quickly (Podio, Google Workspace, Hospitable, Zapier).



Communication: Flawless written English and a comfortable, professional phone voice for calling US-based vendors.



The "Bias for Action": If a guest reports a stain or a document is missing, you don't just report the problem to the owner—you initiate the solution, order the replacement, and present the completed task.



How to Apply:

We receive hundreds of applications, and we only hire people who read the details.



Please apply via
/platfor
ssage.



To prove you have read this entire job post, you must change the subject line of your application to: "Chicago RE Admin - [Insert Your Favorite Color]". If your subject line says anything else, your application will be instantly deleted.



In your message, include a brief summary of your administrative experience and how you stay organized when juggling multiple different types of tasks.



Please include a link to a 1-minute voice recording (using Vocaroo or similar) introducing yourself and explaining your backup power/internet setup.



Note: Finalists will be required to complete a brief skills assessment via TestGorilla to verify data entry and reasoning skills.



Compensation & Performance Bonuses:

-Strong Base Pay: $1,000 USD per month, paid bi-weekly via Wise or PayPal.

-Monthly Operational Bonuses: Up to $200/month in extra pay tied directly to flawless execution. You earn this by maintaining 100?curacy on expense/receipt tracking, Asana task execution, and keeping our Airbnb guest ratings at 4.9+ stars.

-Acquisition Bonuses ($500 per closed deal): > This is NOT a bonus for doing standard CRM data entry on existing leads. To earn this bonus, you must be the originator of the warm lead. This means you either:

1) Actively prospected, cold-called, or texted a raw lead, successfully qualified their motivation, and handed them off to our team.

2) Handled a live inbound lead from our answering service, conducted the initial intake, and successfully booked the appointment. If your proactive communication brings a qualified seller to the table and we buy the house, you get $500.



We want to pay top of the market for a superstar who makes our lives easier and helps the business grow. If you want a long-term home where your attention to detail is financially rewarded, we want to hear from you.

title: Global Disaster/DNA YOUTUBE Video Editor
description:
We are looking for a video editor ASAP for a YouTube channel about global disasters, strange history, and mystery topics. We make long-form videos about earthquakes, tsunamis, volcanoes, geological events, ancient discoveries, DNA mysteries, and historical investigations.



Global Disaster Examples: 

DNA Examples: 
 



We are NOT looking for "AI Video" or "Text-to-Video" creators.



We are looking for a Traditional Video Editor who can tell a visual story using real clips, real news footage, documentaries, interviews, maps, and strong visual pacing following the script.



What You Will Do:

-Follow the Script: We provide script + direction, tools.

-Source Real Clips: You must find real footage from news, documentaries, interviews, archive footage, and public sources. This is the most important part. MUST AVOID RANDOM STOCK FOOTAGE AND AI.

-Edit Fast: Keep the video moving. No dry or boring sections. Good Pacing, Keep Viewer engaged. Use background music when/if necessary.



What We Do NOT Want:

-NO AI Video: Do not use AI generators.

-NO Random Stock Footage: If the script talks about a real event, scientist, location, or disaster, show the real thing.



HUGE PLUS: Can also do the Thumbnails (not a requirement but a huge plus)



Style: Documentary / breaking-news style editing with strong pacing.



You must be able to:

-Deliver 4 videos per week

-Work independently once workflow is understood

-Communicate well & meet deadlines.



How To Apply:

-Start your message with the word ALIENS

-Send 1 video you edited that best matches this style

-Answer this question: If the script says "show real tsunami footage from Japan" or "scientist speaking about DNA testing," where would you search first?



Please expect a 1-2 min sample test request (Script & VO provided).



Will start off with 5 video test and then move to salary.

title: Virtual graphic designer
description:
Remote Graphic Designer (Print Layout + InDesign Expert)

We’re looking for a talented and reliable female graphic designer to join our remote team in a VA capacity. This role is perfect for someone who thrives on layout design, works well independently, and is eager to support a fast-paced, creative studio.



You must be:

• Highly proficient in Adobe InDesign (this is non-negotiable)

• Skilled in Adobe Illustrator and Photoshop

• Experienced with print layout, book/brochure design, ad design and creating mockups

title: Video Editor for Online Course Content
description:

To Apply

title: Senior US Finance & Accounting Recruiter | Direct Hire | US Shift | Base + Uncapped Commission
description:
We are hiring a Senior US Finance & Accounting Recruiter with proven experience placing US-based finance and accounting professionals in direct-hire / permanent placement roles.



This role is for recruiters who know how to fill positions such as Tax Manager, Senior Accountant, Controller, Auditor, Finance Manager, FP&A, and similar accounting/finance roles. If your background is mainly in general recruiting, admin hiring, customer service, or non-finance recruiting, this role will not be the right fit.



We are a growing recruiting firm that partners with US clients to place high-caliber finance talent. We need someone who can source strong candidates, assess fit accurately, manage the recruiting process end-to-end, and consistently drive placements.



What You’ll Do



Source and engage US-based finance and accounting candidates through LinkedIn, Apollo,
, SMS, and phone outreach

Recruit for roles such as Tax Managers, Senior Accountants, Controllers, Auditors, Finance Managers, and other finance-focused positions

Conduct candidate screening and in-depth interviews to assess technical fit, communication, and overall alignment

Present qualified candidate shortlists to clients

Manage candidates throughout the full recruiting lifecycle, from sourcing through offer stage

Build and maintain strong pipelines of finance talent for ongoing and repeat searches

Consistently meet weekly activity, interview, and placement goals



What You Bring



3+ years of US recruiting experience

Strong finance and accounting recruiting experience required

Direct-hire / permanent placement experience required

Proven success placing US candidates with US clients

Strong understanding of finance and accounting roles, compensation ranges, and hiring expectations

Excellent written and verbal communication

Organized, self-driven, competitive, and results-oriented



Please Do Not Apply If



Your experience is mainly in customer service, admin, virtual assistant, or non-recruiting roles

You do not have experience recruiting for finance/accounting positions

You do not have direct-hire / permanent placement recruiting experience

Your background is mostly in non-US recruiting



Why Join Us



Competitive base pay + uncapped commission

Weekly, reliable compensation

Paid Time Off

US Holidays Off

Clear growth path within a stable and growing recruiting firm

Strong leadership, tools, and support to help you succeed



How to Apply (IMPORTANT)

To be considered, please submit the following:



-Your updated resume

-A list of 3–5 finance/accounting roles you have successfully placed

-A short summary of your recruiting achievements, including placements, metrics, or notable wins

The sourcing tools/platforms you use most often





If you know how to identify strong finance talent, manage the recruiting process efficiently, and deliver results, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Outbound GTM Engineer (Clay + Cold Email + LinkedIn)
description:
Hi. I’m Matthew Elonis, founder of 
.



Quick note. This is a systems role. If you enjoy building Clay tables, connecting tools with Zapier or n8n, improving outbound campaigns, and seeing systems generate real opportunities, you will probably enjoy this job.



We help business owners with $2M to $20M in annual profit sell their companies.



Most founders do not wake up one day and Google “investment banker.” Usually someone reaches out to them first and starts a conversation.



That is why we are building a deal origination system that identifies great founder owned companies and starts conversations with them across the United States.



Not spam.



Real conversations with real business owners.



To do this properly we need someone who understands how modern outbound systems work. Someone who knows how to build lead lists, enrich data, launch campaigns, and connect systems together.



This is not a virtual assistant role. I am looking for someone who understands outbound systems end to end.



Someone who knows how tools like Clay, Apollo, Smartlead, LinkedIn outreach, and automation tools work together to create a real pipeline of conversations.



Your job will be to help build and operate that machine.



What you will be doing



You will help run the outbound system that generates conversations with founders.



That includes things like



Building founder lead lists using LinkedIn, Clay, Apollo and similar tools



Enriching those leads with verified
s, phone numbers and LinkedIn profiles



Launching and managing cold
 campaigns



Running LinkedIn outreach campaigns



Monitoring deliverability, reply rates and campaign performance



Connecting systems together using automation tools



Maintaining lead lists and CRM records



Improving the process as we go



Every week the goal is simple. Start new conversations with founders who may eventually want to sell their business.



Compensation



This is a full time remote role.



Base compensation is



$1,200 to $1,500 per month



There are also performance bonuses tied directly to deal origination.



You will earn



$150 for every qualified founder call booked

$1,000 for every signed mandate



Our current close rate from qualified calls to signed mandates is about 33 percent. That means strong performers in this role can earn meaningful bonuses.



Monthly bonuses can realistically reach $1,000 to $5,000 or more depending on performance.



Qualifications



You should already understand modern outbound and automation tools.



Lead sourcing and enrichment tools such as



Clay

Apollo

LinkedIn Sales Navigator

Prospeo or Dropcontact



Cold
 platforms such as



Smartlead

Instantly

ReachInbox



LinkedIn outreach tools such as



HeyReach

Expandi

Dripify



Automation tools such as



Zapier

Make

n8n



You should understand how to connect systems together.



For example



Lead source ? enrichment ? outbound campaign ? CRM ? notifications.



Bonus if you have experience with CRM systems like



HubSpot

Close

Pipedrive

Salesforce



Our goal is to automatically move warm leads into a CRM where they can be tracked and managed.



What I value: 

1) people who TRULY think, not just do.



2) people who enjoy building things that work, and find ways to improve those things.



3) self-starters - you don't need constant pushing from some 'boss' - direction and guidance? Of course! But you can push things along yourself.



4) true curiosity. you will be doing origination but I want people who want to learn and understand the entire business and how what they do INFLUENCES the entire business.



If you like building outbound systems and seeing them generate real opportunities, this role will probably be a good fit.



Final step



If you have read this entire job description you are already ahead of most applicants.



We care about people who pay attention to details and follow instructions.



As a final step please click the link below and answer a few short questions about your experience with outbound systems.



The form should take about 3-5 minutes, promise it's worth it ;)



Apply here:

title: Marketing Manager
description:
Job Overview:

We are seeking a creative and results-driven Marketing Manager to lead marketing initiatives and drive brand growth. The ideal candidate will develop and execute strategic marketing plans across digital and traditional channels, manage campaigns from ideation to execution, and analyze performance to optimize results. You will collaborate closely with Sales, Product, and Creative teams to ensure brand consistency and maximize outreach.



Primary Responsibilities:



Develop and implement comprehensive marketing strategies to increase brand awareness, drive customer acquisition, and support sales goals.



Plan and manage multi-channel marketing campaigns, including digital (SEO, SEM, social media,
) and offline (events, partnerships, print).



Conduct market research to identify customer trends, competitive landscape, and opportunities for growth.



Oversee content creation for websites, blogs, newsletters, social media, and advertising campaigns.



Manage and optimize digital marketing tools and platforms (CRM, marketing automation, analytics).



Set KPIs, track campaign performance, and prepare regular reports on ROI, engagement, and other key metrics.



Work closely with internal teams and external agencies/vendors to execute projects on time and within budget.



Lead and mentor a team of marketing professionals (optional, if managing a team).



Ensure brand consistency across all channels and touchpoints.



Requirements:



Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Communications, or related field (Master’s degree is a plus).



3–7 years of experience in marketing, preferably in [industry if needed: tech, consumer goods, B2B, etc.].



Proven experience designing and executing successful marketing campaigns.



Strong knowledge of digital marketing, SEO/SEM, analytics tools (Google Analytics, HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.).



Excellent communication, project management, and organizational skills.



Creative thinking and strong analytical skills.



Ability to work independently and as part of a cross-functional team.



Preferred Qualifications:



Certification in Digital Marketing, Google Ads, or Analytics.



Experience managing budgets and external agencies.



Familiarity with graphic design tools (e.g., Canva, Adobe Creative Suite) is a plus.

title: SEO and Article Writer
description:
Job Overview



We are looking for a skilled SEO and Article Writer who can create high-quality, search-optimized content that drives organic traffic, improves rankings, and supports our product and marketing goals. This role combines strong writing skills with SEO best practices and close collaboration with the SEO team.



Key Responsibilities



Research, write, and publish original articles, blog posts, tutorials, and guides related to our platform (e.g., digital residency, blockchain, tech trends, and user guides).



Optimize content for SEO by applying target keywords, meta titles, meta descriptions, internal linking, and on-page best practices.



Collaborate closely with the SEO Specialist to align content with keyword strategies, traffic goals, and performance metrics.



Edit and proofread content to ensure clarity, accuracy, tone consistency, and grammatical correctness.



Develop and maintain content calendars aligned with product launches, updates, and marketing campaigns.



Create supporting content such as social media posts, newsletters, landing page copy, and whitepapers as needed.



Track and analyze content performance using analytics tools and improve content based on data-driven insights.



Stay updated on industry trends, including web3, blockchain, AI, and digital platforms, to produce relevant and timely content.



Required Skills & Experience



Proven experience as a content writer, article writer, blogger, copywriter, or SEO writer (portfolio of published work required).



Strong writing and storytelling skills with the ability to produce clear, engaging, and error-free content.



Solid understanding of SEO fundamentals, including keyword research, on-page optimization, content structure, and search intent.



Experience using SEO tools such as Google Analytics, Google Search Console, Ahrefs, SEMrush, Moz, or Screaming Frog.



Ability to research complex or technical topics and simplify them for a general audience.



Strong analytical mindset with experience interpreting performance data and generating actionable insights.



Excellent communication skills and ability to collaborate with cross-functional teams.



Strong time management skills and ability to meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.



Familiarity with content and productivity tools such as Google Docs, WordPress, Grammarly, or similar platforms.



Nice-to-Have Qualifications



Experience writing for industries such as blockchain, web3, crypto, SaaS, or tech startups.



Familiarity with CMS platforms like WordPress or Webflow, and basic HTML/CSS knowledge.



Knowledge of advanced SEO concepts such as technical SEO, international SEO, EEAT optimization, voice search, or AI-driven content optimization.



Experience using SEO tools for content optimization and reporting.



Background in journalism, marketing, or technical writing.



SEO-related certifications (e.g., Google Analytics, SEMrush SEO Toolkit).



Multilingual abilities or experience writing for international audiences.

title: Ads Manager
description:
Ads Manager

Trident Digital | Singapore

Full-time | Remote Setup/Work from Home

Salary: SGD 700–1,000 / month

Working Hours: 9AM - 6PM (SGT)



About the Role

Trident Digital is looking for an experienced Ads Manager to manage our Meta Ads campaigns and help drive measurable results for our clients.

In this role, you will focus on campaign setup, optimisation, and performance tracking, ensuring campaigns generate meaningful outcomes such as leads, calls, and sales.

You will collaborate closely with our Ads Assistant & Landing Page Builder and Copywriter to ensure campaigns run smoothly and all campaign elements—from ads to landing pages—are aligned for the best results.

If you enjoy working with data, testing strategies, and improving campaign performance, this role is a great opportunity to grow within a fast-paced digital marketing agency.



What You’ll Be Doing

Campaign Strategy & Performance

- Plan, launch, and manage Meta Ads campaigns for multiple clients.

- Ensure campaigns are structured correctly and aligned with client goals.

- Monitor campaign performance and optimise based on key metrics such as CPM, CTR, CPC, CPL, and conversions.

- Identify underperforming campaigns and implement improvements.



Campaign Collaboration

- Work closely with the Ads Assistant and Landing Page Builder to ensure landing pages and campaign assets are properly set up.

- Coordinate with the Copywriter to ensure ad messaging aligns with campaign objectives.

- Review creatives, targeting, and campaign setups before launch.



Reporting & Optimisation

- Track campaign performance and provide insights on results and improvements.

- Test different audiences, creatives, and campaign strategies to improve results.

- Stay updated on Meta Ads updates, trends, and best practices.



Process & Organisation

- Follow existing campaign structures and internal SOPs for campaign setup and optimisation.

- Ensure campaign documentation and tracking are kept organised and updated.



What We’re Looking For

Must-haves:

- Strong experience managing Meta Ads campaigns.

- Proven ability to optimise campaigns for lead generation, calls, or sales.

- Strong analytical skills to evaluate campaign performance and improve results.

- Excellent English communication skills (written and spoken).

- Organised and detail-oriented with the ability to manage multiple campaigns.



Nice to have (not required):

- Experience working with service-based businesses such as finance or real estate.

- Familiarity with landing pages or marketing funnels.



Our Team & Culture

You’ll be part of a fast-growing digital marketing agency, working with clients across industries and contributing to campaigns that drive real business results.

Our team values collaboration, continuous learning, and practical execution, giving you opportunities to refine your advertising skills and grow in a supportive environment.



How to Apply

Have a look at our culture deck, if it feels like a good fit, head to the last page and fill in the form.

title: Assistant - Website Conversion Optimizer
description:
Do you have a passion for boosting conversions on websites? If so, we have an exciting opportunity for you =)



At Studio1, we create high-converting websites for a range of clients in various niches all over the world. After our clients' websites go live, we want to make sure they keep performing better over time.



That's why we offer a Website Conversion Optimization service, and we need the right person to assist our lead conversion optimizer.



You'll work directly with her to dive deep into the data, forming smart hypotheses, and driving measurable improvements for our clients.



This is a hands-on, analytical role where your work will have real, visible impact, and where a curious mind and a sharp eye for detail and website conversions will take you far.



What You'll Be Doing

-  Assisting with conducting comprehensive website audits to identify conversion bottlenecks, usability issues, and opportunities for improvement.

-  Assisting with analyzing data from Google Analytics, Microsoft Clarity, heatmaps, and session recordings to uncover what's working and what's not.

-  Assisting with developing data-driven CRO strategies tailored to each client's specific goals and audience.

-  Assisting with creating a prioritized hypothesis spreadsheet for each project, ranking recommended changes by potential impact and statistical significance.

-  Assisting with presenting your findings via video walkthrough and written brief to clients, clearly explaining your reasoning.

- Briefing our design team and copywriter on approved changes, then working with our dev team to build A/B test variations.

-  Helping set up and manage split-testing software on client websites (primarily WordPress, with some Shopify and Webflow).

-  Monitoring test results, declare winners, and roll straight into the next optimization cycle.

-  Staying sharp on CRO trends, best practices, and emerging tools in the industry.



Who We're Looking For

-  Someone who brings a strong foundation in CRO, but equally important, someone who is eager to keep learning, open to feedback, and genuinely coachable. We have our own way of doing things at Studio1, and we'll invest in helping you grow within our system.



The ideal candidate:

-  Has true passion for CRO, A/B testing, and analytics tools.

-  Is highly detail-oriented, you notice the small things that others miss, and you care about getting them right.

-  Is trainable and genuinely open to learning new methods, tools, and Studio1's specific approach.

-  Has a growth mindset and actively seeks to improve their craft.

-  Communicates clearly in both written and spoken English.

-  Is self-motivated, reliable, and works at a consistent pace without needing to be micromanaged.

-  Is a team player who collaborates well with designers, developers, and managers.

-  Is ethical and transparent in all their work and client dealings.

-  Is comfortable on Zoom calls,  both internally with the team and occasionally with clients.

-  Has a fast, reliable computer and internet connection.



About Studio1 Design

-  Studio1 is an Australian-based website design and branding agency with clients across Australia, the USA, and beyond. We've delivered over 2,000 websites, and our work is grounded in psychology-driven design and conversion principles.



Our values:

-  Innovation & Excellence,  we push boundaries and set new standards.

-  Client Success,  your wins are our wins.

-  Integrity & Transparency,  we do things the right way, always.

-  Continuous Learning,  we never stop growing.



The Role Details

-  Full-time position, weekdays only, standard business hours.

-  100% remote,  work from the comfort of your home.

-  Minimum two-year commitment expected.

-  4-week fully paid trial period if selected after the interview.



How to Apply

-  If this role sounds like the perfect fit, we'd love to hear from you.



Send us a cover letter that highlights your relevant skills and experience. Include a link to your CV and examples of websites you've helped optimized (f any, and be sure to include the before, the change, and the results.)



Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a Zoom video call. If your interview is successful, we'll kick things off with a fully paid 4-week trial. After that, and you'll be offered a permanent full-time position.



Good luck! =)



Regards Greg & Isabel

title: Motion Effects + Elementor / WordPress Web Design
description:
We're looking for a creative Elementor developer who geeks out over scroll-driven motion, parallax, and immersive visual storytelling — someone who sees a website as an experience, not just a page.

You should be comfortable working with Premium Addons (Magic Scroll, Image Layers, Lottie Animations, etc.) and know how to use Elementor's Motion Effects to make sections feel alive — fade-ins, parallax depth, scroll-triggered animations, sticky elements, the works.

What matters most to us:

-> You have a portfolio that makes people pause and scroll slowly — not just clean layouts, but sites where the motion and visual layering pull you in.

-> You can take a rough creative direction and run with it — we'll share mood boards, references, and ideas, but we want you leading the design execution.

-> You take feedback well and pivot fast — sometimes the vision shifts mid-build, and we need someone who treats that as part of the creative process, not a setback
